articles.title: StockWatch: Trump Order Lifts Psychedelic Drug Shares
articles.summary:
Among its provisions, the order directs the FDA to provide Commissioner’s National Priority Vouchers (CNPVs) to “appropriate” psychedelic drugs that were granted the agency’s Breakthrough Therapy designation and met the voucher program’s criteria. 
The post StockWatch: Trump Order Lifts Psychedelic Drug Shares appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 特朗普行政命令推动迷幻药股上涨，要求FDA向符合条件的迷幻药颁发优先审评券。这些药物需获得突破性疗法认定，此举可能加速创新迷幻药物的审批流程，属于创新药政策范畴。

articles.title: STAT+: Doctor, wife of acting U.S. attorney general appointed to NIH advisory council
articles.summary: An integrative medicine doctor who is the wife of the acting U.S. attorney general has been named as a member to one of the advisory councils that provides critical funding…
articles.chinese_summary: 美国代理司法部长妻子被任命为NIH咨询委员会成员，她是一名整合医学医生。该任命涉及政治背景，与创新药、生物制造直接关联度低，主要涉及大健康领域的医疗政策与公共健康治理层面。

articles.title: Entire NSF science advisory board fired by Trump administration
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 26 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01361-7Members of the National Science Board, which the US Congress founded in 1950, were given no explanation for their termination.
articles.chinese_summary: 特朗普政府解雇了美国国家科学基金会全体科学顾问委员会成员，该委员会成立于1950年。此事件涉及科研管理政策变动，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域无直接关联，仅间接影响科研资助环境。

articles.title: ProPER: Programmable, multiplexed detection of molecular proximities and RNA life-cycle stages in situ
articles.summary: Proximity detection methods facilitate contextual analysis of biomolecules by reporting their microenvironment, spatial organization and molecular interactions. To expand these detection capabilities towards highly sensitive, quantitative, and multiplexed interaction mapping, we introduce Proximity Primer Exchange Reaction (ProPER). ProPER is a novel ligation-free proximity extension and controlled DNA amplification strategy that enables spatially resolved in situ detection of molecular proximit
articles.chinese_summary: ProPER是一种新型无连接邻近检测技术，通过DNA扩增策略实现分子邻近性的原位检测。该技术具备高灵敏度、定量分析和多重检测能力，为研究生物分子空间组织及RNA生命周期提供了创新工具，在疾病机制研究和精准医疗领域具有应用潜力。

articles.title: Potent and Broad HIV-1 Neutralization by a Bispecific CD4-CD4i Fusion Protein based on Single-Domain CD4-D1 and X5 CD4i antibody
articles.summary: Human immunodeficiency virus (HIV) infection remains a global health threat. Although antiretroviral therapy (ART) has significantly transformed HIV into a manageable chronic disease, emergence of drug resistance to current ART is a continuing concern. Broadly neutralizing antibodies, as well as reagents containing both a soluble CD4 mimetic and an HIV co-receptor inhibitor, such as CD4-CD4i antibodies, are promising strategies for the prevention and treatment of HIV infection. We previously dev
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种基于单域CD4-D1和X5 CD4i抗体的双特异性CD4-CD4i融合蛋白，能有效中和多种HIV-1毒株。该创新生物制剂通过结合可溶性CD4模拟物和共受体抑制剂，为HIV预防和治疗提供了新策略，具有显著的中和广谱性和效力，属于创新药研发范畴。

articles.title: Opinion: The podcast telling the stories behind Ambien, Ozempic, EpiPens, and other game-changing drugs
articles.summary: “We're basically not using our body as directed,” says "Drug Story" host Thomas Goetz.
articles.chinese_summary: 该播客节目通过讲述安眠药Ambien、减肥药Ozempic、急救笔EpiPen等创新药物的研发故事，探讨了药物如何改变医疗实践。虽然不涉及技术细节，但对理解创新药的社会影响和开发历程具有重要价值，与大健康领域的医疗创新高度相关。

articles.title: Dredd-mediated cleavage of Kenny uncouples the IKK complex from selective autophagy to enable innate immunity
articles.summary: Selective autophagy restrains innate immune signalling to maintain tissue homeostasis, yet how this repression is rapidly relieved during infection remains unclear. Here, we show that under basal conditions the inhibitor of {kappa}B kinase {gamma} (IKK{gamma}) Kenny is sequestered at autophagosomes through Atg8 and the selective autophagy receptor Ref(2)P, thereby silencing Imd pathway activity. Bacterial infection disrupts this interaction, releasing the IKK complex to enable immune signalling.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示果蝇中选择性自噬通过隔离IKKγ蛋白Kenny抑制先天免疫信号。细菌感染通过Dredd蛋白酶切割Kenny，解除自噬对IKK复合物的束缚，从而激活免疫通路。该机制研究为理解免疫调控提供新视角，但距离直接药物应用较远。

articles.title: Nancy Cox, a CDC veteran and a stalwart in global flu research, dies at 77
articles.summary: Nancy Cox, a CDC veteran who for decades was a global leader in influenza research, has died at 77.
articles.chinese_summary: 美国疾控中心资深专家Nancy Cox去世，享年77岁。她数十年间在全球流感研究领域担任领导角色，为公共卫生和传染病防控做出了重要贡献。

articles.title: Coordinated Temporal Dynamics of Glucocorticoid Receptor Binding and Chromatin Landscape Drive Transcriptional Regulation
articles.summary: Glucocorticoid receptor (GR) signaling elicits diverse transcriptional responses through dynamic and context-dependent interactions with chromatin. Here, we define a temporally resolved and mechanistically integrated framework for GR-mediated gene regulation. Time-resolved analyses identify three conserved classes of GR chromatin binding (sustained, transient, and late), distinguished by differences in motif strength, chromatin accessibility, and cofactors engagement. Early GR binding preferenti
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过时间分辨分析揭示了糖皮质激素受体（GR）与染色质相互作用的动态模式，识别了持续、瞬时和延迟三种GR结合类型。这些类型在基序强度、染色质可及性和辅因子结合方面存在差异，阐明了GR介导基因转录的时序调控机制，为理解激素信号转导提供了新框架。

articles.title: BAG6 and RNF126 promote the degradation of cytosolic misfolded proteins that contain buried degron motifs
articles.summary: Missense mutations account for the majority of catalogued human disease-associated variants, and many are predicted to destabilize proteins and promote their degradation. To characterize the pathways responsible for recognizing and clearing such variants, we employed a two-pronged approach to identify both quality control components mediating turnover of misfolded proteins and the sequence elements within their substrates that drive this process. Using a panel of unstable cytosolic missense vari
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示BAG6和RNF126在降解含有埋藏降解基序的胞质错误折叠蛋白中的作用机制。通过分析不稳定错义突变蛋白，发现了介导蛋白质降解的质量控制通路及其底物序列特征，为理解遗传病分子机制提供了新视角。

articles.title: A Genetic Method for Distinguishing Cryptic Pocillopora Species in French Polynesia without Sequencing
articles.summary: Pocillopora is a widespread, dominant reef-building coral genus in the Indo-Pacific that exhibits high morphological similarity and plasticity. Given this, genetic tools are needed to robustly identify Pocillopora individuals to the species level. Quick and accurate identification approaches for Pocillopora species are critical to estimating biodiversity patterns under current and future environmental challenges. In recent years, the mitochondrial open reading frame (mtORF) and a histone region
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种无需基因测序即可鉴别法属波利尼西亚隐种 Pocillopora 珊瑚的遗传方法。通过线粒体开放阅读框和组蛋白区域进行快速准确物种鉴定，对评估当前和未来环境挑战下的生物多样性模式具有重要意义。

articles.title: Author Correction: A µ-opioid receptor superagonist analgesic with minimal adverse effects
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10552-1Author Correction: A µ-opioid receptor superagonist analgesic with minimal adverse effects
articles.chinese_summary: 本文报道了一种新型μ-阿片受体超强激动剂镇痛药，具有最小不良反应。该研究属于创新药领域，通过开发高效低毒的镇痛药物，为解决阿片类药物成瘾和呼吸抑制等严重副作用提供了潜在突破性治疗方案。

articles.title: DCN1 inhibitor induces fetal hemoglobin through self-limited regulation of CUL3 neddylation
articles.summary: Few genetic loci are as well-characterized as the globin gene locus, and the substitution of healthy {gamma}-globin (HbF) for missing or mutated {beta}-globin (HbB) is an established therapeutic strategy for {beta}-hemoglobinopathies including sickle cell disease (SCD) and {beta}-thalassemia. Although substantial progress has been made in understanding HbF derepression and globin switching, many current therapeutic strategies involving small molecules increase HbF through broad epigenetic pertur
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种DCN1抑制剂，通过调控CUL3蛋白的neddylation来诱导胎儿血红蛋白表达，为治疗β-血红蛋白病（如镰状细胞病和β-地中海贫血）提供了新的小分子治疗策略。该机制针对特异性调控血红蛋白转换，具有治疗创新药的潜力。

articles.title: Expanding the chemical diversity of RNA by transcriptional incorporation of amino acid- and glycosyl-modified nucleotides
articles.summary: With the increasing interest in RNA-based therapies, there is a pressing need to incorporate new chemis-tries into more complex RNA molecules. These modifications can protect RNA from degradation, improve its pharmacokinetics, and enhance its targeting properties. Here we describe the enzymatic synthesis of chemically modified RNA derivatives using a mutant T7 RNA polymerase to incorporate 23 different base modifications alongside stabilizing ribose modifications, such as 2'-fluoro and 2'-deoxy
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过突变T7 RNA聚合酶，成功将23种碱基修饰及核糖稳定化修饰（如2'-氟、2'-脱氧）转录整合到RNA分子中。该技术能增强RNA的稳定性、改善药代动力学并提升靶向性，对基于RNA的疗法（如mRNA疫苗、RNA药物）的创新开发具有重要推动作用。

articles.title: Japanese Pharma Companies Turning to CDMOs Earlier in Product Life Cycle
articles.summary:
The bottleneck isn’t discovery anymore. It’s execution. In peptides, programs are running into challenges around analytical complexity, scaleup, and the availability of key raw materials such as protected amino acids.
The post Japanese Pharma Companies Turning to CDMOs Earlier in Product Life Cycle appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 日本制药企业正更早地在产品生命周期中转向CDMO合作。文章指出当前药物开发的瓶颈已从发现转向生产执行，特别是在肽类药物领域面临分析复杂性、工艺放大及关键原料供应等挑战，突显了生物制造环节在创新药开发中的关键作用。

articles.title: AI Learns to Predict Breast Cancer Risk from How Single Cells Respond to Pressure
articles.summary:
Researchers created a novel microfluidic platform, AI tool, and risk score that can assess women’s breast cancer risk at the cellular level, based on the how how breast cancer cells respond to being squeezed, and their “mechanical age.” 
The post AI Learns to Predict Breast Cancer Risk from How Single Cells Respond to Pressure appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究人员开发了一种结合微流控平台和AI工具的新方法，通过分析单个乳腺细胞在压力下的机械响应特征来评估乳腺癌风险。这项技术能够量化细胞的'机械年龄'，为精准医疗提供了创新的早期筛查手段，在大健康领域的疾病预防和个性化风险评估方面具有重要价值。

articles.title: Protein structure-informed deep learning enables species-specific codon optimization
articles.summary: Codon usage bias is highly species-specific, posing a major challenge for heterologous protein expression. Existing deep learning approaches to codon optimization rely primarily on DNA or protein sequence information and largely neglect constraints imposed by protein structure and folding. Here, we present Protein structure-Informed Species-specific Codon Optimization (PISCO), a Geometric Vector Perceptron (GVP)-based model that integrates protein sequence, three-dimensional protein structure, a
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了PISCO模型，通过整合蛋白质序列和三维结构信息进行物种特异性密码子优化。该方法解决了异源蛋白表达中的密码子使用偏好问题，显著提升了重组蛋白产量，对生物制造领域的蛋白质生产具有重要应用价值。

articles.title: CellChem: Cellular transcriptional responses reshape molecular representation space for efficient and multi-scale drug discovery
articles.summary: Despite decades of progress in computational drug discovery, deep learning-based molecular representation models remain largely structure-centric, assuming that chemical similarity approximates functional similarity. However, drug effects in cells are shaped not only by chemical similarity but also by molecular interactions in the cellular context. To capture this complexity, we introduce CellChem, a cellular-chemical representation-learning framework that learns cell-guided molecular representa
articles.chinese_summary: CellChem提出细胞化学表征学习框架，通过整合细胞转录反应与分子结构数据，突破传统结构中心模型的局限。该方法能更准确预测药物功能效应，显著提升多尺度药物发现效率，对创新药开发具有重要价值。

articles.title: Decoding Smell from Receptor Structure
articles.summary: Olfaction enables animals to detect and discriminate a vast array of chemicals, yet how odorant receptors (ORs) encode ligand selectivity remains unclear. Although recent advances in protein structure prediction have expanded access to OR structures, linking these to function at scale has been challenging. Here, we combined AlphaFold3-predicted receptor structures with protein language model embeddings and in vivo pS6-IP-Seq measurements of olfactory sensory neuron activation across a chemically
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究结合AlphaFold3预测的嗅觉受体结构与蛋白语言模型，系统解析气味分子识别机制。该成果对创新药研发具有重要意义，为靶向GPCR受体的药物设计提供了新范式，尤其在神经系统疾病治疗靶点发现方面具有潜在应用价值。

articles.title: Opinion: The local news crisis is also a public health crisis
articles.summary: Health and science reporting is often treated as optional coverage. It is anything but.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨地方新闻危机如何演变为公共卫生危机，强调健康与科学报道的必要性。虽然不直接涉及创新药或生物制造技术，但指出了科学信息传播对公众健康决策的重要性，与大健康领域的公共卫生和科学传播高度相关。

articles.title: STAT+: Sanofi MS drug gets positive review in Europe following FDA
articles.summary: A multiple sclerosis drug from Sanofi that was rejected late last year by the FDA found a warmer reception in Europe.
articles.chinese_summary: 赛诺菲多发性硬化症药物在去年遭FDA拒绝后，获得欧洲监管机构的积极评价。该案例体现了创新药在不同监管体系下的审批差异，属于中枢神经系统疾病治疗领域的重要进展。

articles.title: International childhood vaccine campaign grows
articles.summary: In today's Morning Rounds newsletter, a new era in GOP drug policy, an international childhood vaccine campaign grows, and more.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章报道国际儿童疫苗运动的发展，属于大健康领域的公共卫生范畴。该内容涉及疫苗推广和免疫计划，对儿童疾病预防和全球公共卫生具有积极意义，但与创新药研发和生物制造技术直接关联度较低。

articles.title: STAT+: FDA to speed up review of three psychedelics as mental health treatments
articles.summary: Trump's embrace of psychedelics and cannabis is shaking up the GOP’s relationship with mind-altering substances.
articles.chinese_summary: FDA将加速审查三种迷幻药作为心理健康治疗方法。特朗普对迷幻药和大麻的支持正在改变共和党对精神活性物质的立场，这可能影响心理健康治疗领域的政策走向和药物审批进程。

articles.title: AI in Oncology Takes Off, Tackling HIV and Liver Disease, Pharma’s Recent Gains
articles.summary:
In this episode of GEN's Touching Base, editors discuss a variety of cancer news coming out of AACR, CRISPR screen mapping related to HIV infection, tissue engineering in the liver, and business news.
The post AI in Oncology Takes Off, Tackling HIV and Liver Disease, Pharma’s Recent Gains appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论AACR会议发布的癌症研究进展，包括AI在肿瘤学中的应用、CRISPR技术筛选HIV感染相关基因、肝脏组织工程以及制药行业商业动态。内容主要聚焦创新疗法开发与技术突破，与大健康和生物制造领域关联较弱。

articles.title: One Biosciences Chooses Albany, NY, as Its U.S. Location
articles.summary:
Officials at One Biosciences say the company will bring its technology to the Albany hub to address the unmet clinical and scientific needs to characterize the tumor ecosystem via a single-cell profiling approach. 
The post One Biosciences Chooses Albany, NY, as Its U.S. Location appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: One Biosciences选择纽约州奥尔巴尼作为美国基地，将利用单细胞分析技术解析肿瘤生态系统。该技术通过表征肿瘤微环境，有望推动精准医疗发展，满足未满足的临床需求，与创新药研发和大健康领域高度相关。

articles.title: Single-Cell Atlas of the Prenatal Brain Reveals How Down Syndrome Reshapes Development
articles.summary:
A cellular-resolution map of prenatal brain development in Down syndrome has been developed, revealing disrupted neuron production timing, altered cell types, and shared mechanisms with other disorders. 
The post Single-Cell Atlas of the Prenatal Brain Reveals How Down Syndrome Reshapes Development appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过构建唐氏综合征产前大脑的单细胞图谱，揭示了神经元生成时序紊乱及细胞类型改变等发育异常机制。该发现为理解神经发育障碍提供了重要见解，对精准医疗和先天性疾病预防具有潜在价值，但距直接药物开发仍有距离。

articles.title: Genetic compensation in β-actin mutants occurs independently of mutations that destabilize β-actin mRNA
articles.summary: Proper maintenance of gene expression in response to mutations or environmental fluctuations is critical for cell development and survival. Recently, a novel genetic compensation mechanism was described wherein mutant mRNA decay triggers increased transcription of paralogous genes. This effect was reported for several genes, including {beta}-actin (Actb) in mouse embryonic stem cells, where Actb mRNA with a premature termination codon enhances transcription of its paralog, {gamma}-actin (Actg1),
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示了β-肌动蛋白突变体中通过mRNA降解触发同源基因γ-肌动蛋白转录增强的新型遗传补偿机制。该发现阐明了细胞应对基因突变的分子调控网络，为理解基因治疗中潜在补偿效应和开发靶向mRNA稳定性的创新疗法提供了理论基础。

articles.title: Transcriptomic Profiling of Thyroid Eye Disease Orbital Fibroblasts Identifies Sorafenib as a Novel Therapeutic
articles.summary: Thyroid eye disease (TED) is a debilitating condition characterized by orbital fibroblast (OF) activation and excessive hyaluronic acid (HA) accumulation within the retro-ocular space. While IGF-1R blockade with teprotumumab has significantly advanced TED management, incomplete clinical responses and disease relapse underscore the need to identify alternative targets. In this study, we used high-throughput RNA sequencing to map the transcriptomic landscape in TED OFs compared with non-TED OF con
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过转录组分析甲状腺眼病眼眶成纤维细胞，发现索拉非尼可作为潜在治疗药物。虽然不涉及全新药物开发，但通过药物重定位策略为罕见病提供了创新治疗方案，符合创新药领域的药物发现范畴。

articles.title: Sex differences in cardiomyocyte proteomic responses to the cardiotoxic chemotherapy drug doxorubicin
articles.summary: Anthracyclines, including doxorubicin, are widely used chemotherapeutic agents, but dose-dependent cardiotoxicity limits their clinical utility and increases the risk of heart failure in cancer survivors. In paediatric patients, female sex is a significant risk factor for anthracycline-associated cardiotoxicity, yet pre-clinical studies rarely investigate sex differences in immature hearts. Here, we provide a proteomic dataset from primary cardiomyocytes, isolated from postnatal day 2 rat hearts
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过蛋白质组学分析揭示了新生大鼠心肌细胞对阿霉素心脏毒性的性别差异，为理解儿科患者中女性更高心脏毒性风险提供了机制见解。该发现对肿瘤幸存者的长期健康管理及精准医疗具有重要价值，但与大健康和精准医学的相关性高于创新药或生物制造。

articles.title: An RNA-centric interactomics screen identifies novel proviral and antiviral genome binding interactors for tick-borne encephalitis virus
articles.summary: The tick-borne encephalitis virus (TBEV), which belongs to the Orthoflavivirus genus, is a medically significant arbovirus in Europe and Asia. Despite distinct pathobiological outcomes, arboviruses have evolved specific strategies to co-opt cellular factors for replication and immune evasion, that involve both viral proteins and viral RNA. The RNA genome of TBEV, as both the substrate for genome replication and translation and a designated target for innate antiviral immunity, is a nexus for int
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过RNA中心互作组学筛选，发现蜱传脑炎病毒基因组的新型前病毒和抗病毒结合因子。该工作揭示了病毒RNA如何劫持宿主因子进行复制与免疫逃逸，为开发针对RNA病毒的新型抗病毒策略提供了潜在靶点，对创新药物研发具有重要启示。

articles.title: Inside the evidence revolution — how decision-making became data driven
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01359-1Nature's Helen Pearson joins us to talk about her book Beyond Belief.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨医疗决策如何转向数据驱动模式，聚焦证据革命在健康领域的应用。虽然不直接涉及具体疗法技术，但对大健康领域的临床实践、精准医疗和公共卫生决策具有重要参考价值，体现了数据科学对医疗体系的影响。

articles.title: PABPC1 Modulates Immunoglobulin pre-mRNA Alternative Polyadenylation
articles.summary: Alternative polyadenylation is a mechanism by which cells tune gene expression, and dysregulation can lead to development of disease. PABPC1 has been implicated in poly(A) site selection, but its function in gene regulation remains contradictory and poorly defined. Here, we investigate its role in B cell development, where APA controls immunoglobulin secretion. To define this role, we mapped PABPC1-RNA interactions using CLAP-seq and perturbed PABPC1 expression using a degron based strategy. PAB
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨PABPC1在B细胞发育中通过调控免疫球蛋白前体mRNA选择性多聚腺苷酸化来影响基因表达的机制。虽然不直接涉及创新药或生物制造技术，但对理解抗体产生和免疫调节具有基础科学价值，可能间接影响大健康领域的精准医疗和疾病机制研究。

articles.title: Long-lived mammals contain more phosphorylation sites in the SIRT6 C-terminus that enhance PARP1 interaction and resistance to oxidative stress
articles.summary: Sirtuin 6 (SIRT6) is a protein deacetylase and ribosyltransferase that is a vital hub for maintaining epigenetic homeostasis, regulating the transcriptome, and repairing DNA double stranded breaks (DSBs). Comprehensive proteomic profiling of the SIRT6 post-translational landscape, however, remains elusive. The SIRT6 C-terminal domain contains multiple phosphorylation sites. We find that the presence and use of these sites is strongly correlated with maximum lifespan across mammals. Subsequent bi
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现长寿哺乳动物SIRT6蛋白C端含有更多磷酸化位点，这些位点增强与PARP1的相互作用及氧化应激抗性。该机制揭示了物种寿命差异的分子基础，为衰老研究和相关药物开发提供新靶点。

articles.title: STAT+: Utah medical board calls for immediate suspension of state’s AI doctor experiment
articles.summary: A Utah pilot to renew prescriptions using a bot faced backlash from the state's medical board, which called for an immediate suspension.
articles.chinese_summary: 犹他州医疗委员会要求立即暂停该州使用AI医生进行处方续签的试点项目。该实验面临监管反弹，反映了AI在医疗应用中的监管挑战，与数字健康和精准医疗领域相关。

articles.title: Brain tissue near tumours is loaded with plastic
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01281-6Relatively high levels of micro- and nanoplastics around brain tumours might indicate breakdown of the blood–brain barrier.
articles.chinese_summary: 《自然》研究发现脑肿瘤周围组织存在高浓度微纳米塑料，提示血脑屏障可能受损。该发现虽未直接涉及创新药或生物制造技术，但对理解环境因素在神经疾病中的作用具有重要价值，为大健康领域的神经肿瘤学和环境健康研究提供了新视角。

articles.title: Organic Germanium (Ge-132) reduces glycative damage while maintaining cellular stress signaling: evidence of functional dissociation
articles.summary: Organic germanium, particularly carboxyethyl germanium sesquioxide (Ge 132), has been investigated for decades in relation to diverse biological effects, with a strong emphasis on its antioxidant properties. However, the available literature remains dispersed, encompassing heterogeneous experimental models and endpoints that limit mechanistic interpretation. While antiglycative activity has been described at the biochemical level, its downstream gene regulatory consequences under glycative stres
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨有机锗Ge-132在糖化应激条件下减少糖化损伤并维持细胞应激信号传导的作用机制。虽然涉及抗氧化和抗糖化活性，但主要聚焦于基础生物学机制，与创新药开发和大健康领域的抗衰老研究有潜在关联，但距离直接应用尚有距离。

articles.title: J&J lands CE mark for surgical stapler that works with Ottava robot
articles.summary: Johnson & Johnson sees surgeons’ familiarity with Ethicon devices as a differentiator as it enters a robot market dominated by Intuitive Surgical.
articles.chinese_summary: 强生公司旗下外科吻合器获得CE认证，可与Ottava机器人配合使用。该公司凭借外科医生对Ethicon设备的熟悉度，试图在直觉外科主导的机器人手术市场中寻求差异化竞争优势。

articles.title: Edwards raises 2026 forecast as TAVR sales surge
articles.summary: The stronger outlook follows mixed results from other major medical device makers in the latest quarter, after both Abbott and Boston Scientific cut their full-year guidance.
articles.chinese_summary: 爱德华公司因TAVR手术设备销售强劲而调高2026年预测。该消息与其他医疗器械公司季度业绩形成对比，雅培和波士顿科学均下调了全年指引。文章聚焦心脏介入医疗器械市场动态，未涉及创新药或生物制造领域。

articles.title: Opinion: I started medical school at 69 and will begin residency at 72. Here’s what I learned
articles.summary: Starting residency at 72 isn’t for the faint of heart. But that’s what Dawn Zuidegeest-Craft is doing.
articles.chinese_summary: 72岁医生分享高龄开始住院医师培训的经历，文章聚焦医学教育和个人成长，虽涉及老龄化议题，但与创新药、生物制造等生物医药核心技术领域关联度较低，主要体现大健康领域的人生发展价值。

articles.title: Psychedelics get a boost from the White House
articles.summary: In this week’s STATus Report, host Alex Hogan chats with STAT Washington correspondent Daniel Payne about Trump's psychedelics EO.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章讨论白宫关于迷幻药的政策动向，主要涉及政治决策与公共卫生领域的交叉。虽然迷幻药研究属于新兴医疗方向，但内容聚焦政策层面而非具体药物研发或生物技术，与大健康领域的公共健康政策部分相关。

articles.title: Growing use of guest editors has turned some journals into a ‘playground of bad science’
articles.summary: The problematic use of guest editors was spotlighted last week when a genetics journal retracted nearly an entire special issue.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章揭露期刊客座编辑制度的滥用问题，指出某遗传学期刊因撤稿特刊事件暴露该制度可能成为劣质科学的温床。虽不直接涉及医药技术，但对生物医学领域的学术出版规范具有警示意义。

articles.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a Trump deal with Regeneron, reclassifying medical marijuana, and more
articles.summary: President Trump heralded a drug-pricing agreement with Regeneron, closing the last of 17 deals sought by the White House
articles.chinese_summary: 特朗普总统宣布与再生元制药达成药品定价协议，这是白宫寻求的17项协议中的最后一项。文章主要涉及医药政策与药品定价，与大健康领域的医疗政策相关，但与创新药研发和生物制造的直接关联较弱。

articles.title: Hit a glitch in your research? Some ‘night science’ thinking could move it forward
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01294-1Itai Yanai and Martin Lercher outline a creative thinking strategy to liberate you from the daily grind of the lab.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文提出'夜间科学'思维策略，帮助研究人员摆脱实验室日常工作的束缚，通过创造性思考推动研究进展。虽然涉及科研方法论，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的技术创新无直接关联，主要面向科研工作者的思维训练。

articles.title: Author Correction: Commensal yeast promotes Salmonella Typhimurium virulence
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10518-3Author Correction: Commensal yeast promotes Salmonella Typhimurium virulence
articles.chinese_summary: 本文为《自然》杂志发布的作者更正，研究共生酵母如何促进鼠伤寒沙门氏菌的致病性。该基础研究主要涉及微生物组与病原体互作机制，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联较弱，但对理解感染性疾病发病机制有一定学术价值。

articles.title: How much for a fake authorship? Ad database reveals secrets of scientific fraud
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01340-yAn analysis of thousands of paper-mill adverts could help journals to crack down on misconduct.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文通过分析数千篇论文工厂广告，揭示科学欺诈行为模式，旨在帮助期刊识别学术不端。虽涉及科研生态系统，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域无直接技术关联，主要聚焦于学术出版伦理问题。

articles.title: Closure of China’s influential journal ranking leaves academics reeling — what will take its place?
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01277-2Several other lists have been launched in the past year, but some scholars want research evaluation to take new forms.
articles.chinese_summary: 《自然》报道中国有影响力的期刊排名关闭引发学界震动，学者们正在探讨替代方案。该文聚焦科研评价体系改革，与生物医药领域的直接关联有限，主要涉及学术评价机制和政策层面。

articles.title: Cosmic-ray detection heralds era of mega-observatories for neutrinos
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01282-5Radio sensors at South Pole suggest arrays could record neutrinos of unprecedented energies over hundreds of cubic kilometres of ice.
articles.chinese_summary: 该文章报道南极宇宙射线探测技术突破，通过无线电传感器在冰层中探测超高能中微子。这属于基础物理学研究领域，与生物医药领域的创新药、生物制造及大健康等应用方向无直接关联，仅为前沿探测技术的基础科学探索。

articles.title: The memory dealer of Old Jeddah
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01071-0A taste of freedom.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨吉达老城记忆守护者的故事，聚焦文化传承与自由体验，属于人文社科领域。文章内容不涉及生物医药相关的创新药物、生物制造技术或大健康议题，与评审领域无直接关联。

articles.title: From bats at dusk to asteroid quests: Books in brief
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01304-2Andrew Robinson reviews five of the best science picks.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文为《自然》杂志刊登的五本科学书籍简介，内容涉及蝙蝠行为与天体探索等科普主题。作为书评文章，未直接讨论创新药、生物制造或大健康领域的具体技术或产业进展，与生物医药专业领域相关性极低。

articles.title: STAT+: A biotech VC on what Eli Lilly saw in a struggling cancer startup for $3.2B
articles.summary: What did Eli Lilly see in a struggling biotech startup that made the pharma giant want to pay billions for it? Bryan Roberts has some answers.

articles.title: CRISPR Base Editing Repairs Hard-to-Treat Cystic Fibrosis Mutation in Cell Models
articles.summary:
By applying base editing, scientists repaired a cystic fibrosis mutation that is unresponsive to current drugs in cell and organoid models, pointing to a possible treatment for some patients. 
The post CRISPR Base Editing Repairs Hard-to-Treat Cystic Fibrosis Mutation in Cell Models appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究人员利用CRISPR碱基编辑技术，在细胞和类器官模型中成功修复了对现有药物无效的囊性纤维化突变。这一进展为部分患者提供了潜在的治疗方案，展示了基因编辑在难治遗传病治疗中的应用前景。

articles.title: Enabling In Vivo Lentiviral Therapies: Manufacturing Strategies to Improve Purity, Scalability, and Clinical Readiness
articles.summary:
In this GEN Podcast, two experts from SK pharmteco, a global CMO, address these challenges and lay out some best practices that guide the manufacture of lentiviral vectors with the requisite purity, robustness, and economic feasibility required for widespread clinical adoption.
The post Enabling <i>In Vivo</i> Lentiviral Therapies: Manufacturing Strategies to Improve Purity, Scalability, and Clinical Readiness appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本期GEN播客中，SK pharmteco的两位专家探讨了体内慢病毒疗法的生产挑战，提出了提高纯度、可扩展性和临床适用性的制造策略，旨在实现慢病毒载体的大规模临床应用。

articles.title: A CAR-T biotech’s dramatic turnaround, and drugmakers’ tactics to drive more scripts
articles.summary: This week on "The Readout LOUD": a CAR-T biotech's dramatic turnaround, and drugmakers' tactics to drive more scripts. Listen now.
articles.chinese_summary: 本期播客讨论了一家CAR-T生物技术公司的戏剧性复苏，以及制药企业推动处方量的策略。内容聚焦创新细胞疗法商业化和药物营销，与创新药领域高度相关，涉及生物技术公司运营和药物市场推广。

articles.title: Genome editing of phylogenetically distinct bacteria using cross-species retron-mediated recombineering
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03076-6Retron-based systems for genome editing are functional across bacterial species.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种跨物种逆转录子介导的基因组编辑系统，可在不同细菌物种中实现高效基因编辑。该技术突破了传统编辑方法的物种限制，为创新微生物药物开发、合成生物学工具优化及工业生物制造提供了通用型基因编辑平台。

articles.title: AACR 2026 Video Update: Cancer Research Edges Toward an AI-Driven Era
articles.summary:
From organoid models to pathology, AI is increasingly embedded across cancer research areas. Fay Lin, PhD, and Jonathan D. Grinstein, PhD, discuss how challenges, such as adoption and trust continue to hinder AI's impact on patient outcomes.
The post AACR 2026 Video Update: Cancer Research Edges Toward an AI-Driven Era appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: AACR 2026视频更新显示癌症研究正迈向AI驱动时代。AI已广泛应用于类器官模型和病理学等领域，但采纳度和信任度等挑战仍阻碍其改善患者预后。讨论聚焦AI在癌症精准医疗中的应用前景与局限。

articles.title: Heart’s Constant Beating Suppresses Tumor Growth in Cardiac Tissues
articles.summary:
Research findings indicate that mechanical forces associated with the heart’s constant beating suppress tumor growth in cardiac tissues, and indicate that cellular pathways in these tissues alter gene regulation in cancer cells to keep them from proliferating.
The post Heart’s Constant Beating Suppresses Tumor Growth in Cardiac Tissues appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现心脏持续跳动产生的机械力能抑制心脏组织中的肿瘤生长。这些组织中的细胞通路通过改变癌细胞的基因调控来阻止其增殖。该发现揭示了机械生物学在肿瘤抑制中的作用机制，对理解癌症发生和开发新型治疗策略具有重要意义。

articles.title: The Biochemical Basis of Hormesis
articles.summary: Atypical dose-response curves, where the effect of a drug does not follow a monotonic shape, are unsuitable but common in drug development. Here, we develop a high-throughput computational screening to search for features that could induce this type of complex hormetic relation between changes in drug concentration and changes in drug effect. Our study suggests that all hormetic networks share a similar core structure: an incoherent bivalent network motif centered on the target of the drug. In a
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过高通量计算筛选探索药物浓度与效应间复杂毒物兴奋关系的生化基础，发现所有毒物兴奋网络共享以药物靶点为核心的非相干二价网络基序。这一发现对创新药开发中非典型剂量反应曲线的预测和规避具有重要指导意义。

articles.title: Antiviral Potential of Lauric Acid against Dengue Virus 2: Evidence from a Luciferase-Based Replicon Assay
articles.summary: Dengue virus (DENV) infection generates a significant health burden throughout the world, and there are no clinically approved antiviral drugs, as of now. The virus also depends on lipid metabolism in the host to conduct effective replication and this makes lipid-directed compounds promising as therapeutic options. We assessed the antiviral effect of lauric acid, a 12-carbon medium-chain fatty acid, against DENV serotype 2 (DV2) in the presence of a stable cell line, DV2-replicon, expressing all
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估月桂酸对登革病毒2型的抗病毒潜力，通过荧光素酶报告系统证实其抑制病毒复制。鉴于目前尚无临床批准的登革热抗病毒药物，该发现为基于脂质代谢的新型疗法开发提供了实验依据，属于创新药研发范畴。

articles.title: Author Correction: Rewiring an E3 ligase enhances cold resilience and phosphate use in maize
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10560-1Author Correction: Rewiring an E3 ligase enhances cold resilience and phosphate use in maize
articles.chinese_summary: 本文报道通过重编程玉米E3连接酶增强作物耐寒性和磷利用效率的研究。该工作属于合成生物学在农业领域的创新应用，通过蛋白质工程改造植物调控通路，虽非直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但对作物健康管理和可持续农业具有重要价值。

articles.title: Regenerative Medicine: Promise, Hype, and What Actually Works
articles.summary:
Regenerative therapy is any treatment therapy that improves tissue health or function. With that definition, we can include platelet-rich plasma (PRP), stem cells, and autologous conditioned serum (ACS). 
The post Regenerative Medicine: Promise, Hype, and What Actually Works appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨再生医学的现状与挑战，涵盖富血小板血浆、干细胞和自体条件血清等疗法。虽然涉及组织修复技术，但与创新药研发、生物制造的直接关联有限，主要聚焦临床应用和大健康领域的治疗实践。

articles.title: High-fidelity intravital imaging of biological dynamics with latent-space-enhanced digital adaptive optics
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03107-2Intravital imaging is improved by applying deep learning to wave-optics modeling.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种基于深度学习与波动光学模型的活体成像技术，通过潜在空间增强的数字自适应光学系统显著提升生物动态观测的保真度。该技术虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但为精准医学研究提供了重要的成像工具支撑。

articles.title: Wikipedia-based AI model reveals the 100 technologies to watch
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00980-4Researchers mined the online encyclopedia to find the innovations that are gaining momentum fastest in science and industry.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究人员通过挖掘维基百科数据，识别出科学和工业领域发展最快的100项创新技术。该方法利用AI分析技术发展轨迹，虽未直接聚焦生物医药特定领域，但对创新药、生物制造等前沿技术的宏观趋势监测具有参考价值。

articles.title: How your heartbeat could keep cancer at bay
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01296-zPressure on the heart as it pumps blood stops cancer cells from multiplying in mouse hearts.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现心脏搏动产生的机械压力能抑制小鼠心脏中癌细胞的增殖。这一生物力学机制揭示了物理力量在肿瘤微环境中的新作用，为理解癌症转移机制提供了新视角，但对创新药和生物制造的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Loss of phosphorylation sites required for β-arrestin recruitment in the calcium-sensing receptor cytoplasmic region may contribute to hypocalcemia
articles.summary: The calcium-sensing receptor (CaSR) is a class C G protein-coupled receptor (GPCR) with an important role in calcium homeostasis, activating mutations of which cause hypocalcemia. Despite the receptors clinical importance and evidence suggesting {beta}-arrestin-1/2 can modulate CaSR signaling, the residues within CaSR required for {beta}-arrestin recruitment and the role of {beta}-arrestin in desensitization, trafficking and signaling are ill defined. We confirmed that {beta}-arrestin-1 and {bet
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨钙敏感受体(CaSR)中β-arrestin招募位点的缺失与低钙血症的关联。通过分析CaSR胞质区磷酸化位点对β-arrestin招募的影响，揭示了该受体在钙稳态调控中的新机制，为理解遗传性低钙血症的病理基础提供了分子层面的见解。

articles.title: CMS, FDA unveil speedier Medicare coverage pathway for breakthrough devices
articles.summary: The pathway is designed to reduce the delay between FDA authorization and Medicare coverage for certain Class II and Class III breakthrough medical devices.
articles.chinese_summary: 美国CMS与FDA联合推出加速审批通道，旨在缩短突破性医疗器械获得FDA批准与纳入医保覆盖之间的时间延迟。该政策主要针对II类和III类突破性设备，通过优化审批流程改善医疗产品可及性。

articles.title: AcuityMD raises $80M to add AI capabilities to medtech sales software
articles.summary: The company plans to introduce AI agents for personas such as sales reps, leadership and marketing teams.
articles.chinese_summary: AcuityMD筹集8000万美元为医疗器械销售软件添加AI功能，计划为销售代表、领导层和营销团队引入AI代理。该技术主要优化医疗器械销售流程，与大健康领域的医疗技术商业化相关，但与创新药和生物制造直接关联较弱。

articles.title: STAT+: Trump’s boosting of psychedelics, cannabis signal a new era in GOP drug policy
articles.summary: The Trump administration, in a stark departure from the "Just Say No" era, is funding psychedelics research and rescheduling marijuana.
articles.chinese_summary: 特朗普政府资助迷幻药研究并重新安排大麻管制级别，标志着共和党毒品政策从'坚决说不'时代的重大转变。文章聚焦政策变化对公共卫生和药物监管的影响，与创新药开发仅有间接关联。

articles.title: Heart’s beat may help it beat cancer, mouse research suggests
articles.summary: The constant pressure that the heart is under from beating thousands of times a day may create an environment hostile to cancers
articles.chinese_summary: 小鼠研究表明心脏持续跳动产生的机械压力可能创造抑制癌症的环境。这一发现揭示了机械力对肿瘤微环境的影响，虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造技术，但对理解癌症生物学具有潜在意义，属于大健康领域的基础机制研究。

articles.title: STAT+: Trump celebrates closing first round of drug pricing deals, promises more ahead
articles.summary: A deal with Regeneron was the last of 17 initially sought by the White House.
articles.chinese_summary: 特朗普宣布完成首轮药品定价协议谈判，与再生元等17家药企达成协议。文章聚焦政府药品价格管控政策，涉及公共健康领域的医疗成本议题，但与创新药研发和生物制造技术无直接关联。

articles.title: Ribosome collisions trigger tmRNA-mediated rescue through mRNA disengagement
articles.summary: Ribosome rescue pathways maintain translation during normal growth and contribute to stress tolerance. In Escherichia coli, HrpA is a ribosome-collision recognition factor that mediates antibiotic tolerance by resolving stalled ribosomes, yet the fate of the resulting ribosomal intermediate, with a topologically trapped peptidyl-tRNA in the 50S nascent peptide exit tunnel, has remained unclear. Using in vivo single-molecule tracking, we show that under antibiotic treatment, HrpA-dependent collis
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示了大肠杆菌中核糖体碰撞通过HrpA因子触发tmRNA介导的救援机制，解析了抗生素处理下停滞核糖体的命运。该基础发现虽涉及细菌应激耐受机制，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限，主要贡献于分子生物学基础认知。

articles.title: USP9X promotes the degradation of trapped translation factors on collided ribosomes
articles.summary: Various ribosome-associated quality control pathways safeguard translation fidelity by detecting and resolving aberrant translation events. Recently, a pathway that senses stalled ribosomes with an occluded A-site has been described. The small molecules NVS1.1 and Ternatin-4 induce ribosome stalling by trapping eRF1 and eEF1A1, respectively, within the ribosomal A-site, thereby promoting their ubiquitination and proteasomal degradation. In addition to the previously identified factors GCN1, RNF1
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示USP9X在核糖体碰撞质量控制中的作用，通过促进停滞核糖体上捕获的翻译因子降解。虽然涉及蛋白质降解机制，但主要聚焦基础生物学机制，与创新药开发仅有间接关联，与生物制造和大健康领域相关性较低。

articles.title: What 6,000 researchers think about the future of science
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01061-2Funding worries and publishing trends loom large in the minds of scientists surveyed by Nature Index.
articles.chinese_summary: 《自然》期刊对6000名研究人员的调查显示，科研经费担忧和出版趋势是科学家最关注的问题。该文章聚焦科研生态现状，虽未直接涉及具体生物医药技术，但反映了影响行业发展的宏观科研环境因素。

articles.title: We need to talk about failure in science
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01254-9Failure is part and parcel of research, but discussing it sometimes seems to be taboo in science. It doesn’t need to be.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨科学研究中失败讨论的禁忌现象，主张正视科研失败的价值。虽未直接涉及具体医药技术，但对创新药研发领域的失败反思具有启示意义，属于科研方法论范畴。

articles.title: Academics demand apology for scientist investigated for China ties but never charged
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01113-7Jane Ying Wu, who took her own life, was cleared of wrongdoing by the US National Institutes of Health. Her family alleges that her employer destroyed her career.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文报道华裔科学家Jane Ying Wu因涉嫌与中国关系遭调查后自杀的事件。尽管NIH澄清其无不当行为，但家属指控其雇主摧毁了她的职业生涯。主要内容涉及科研界的种族偏见与学术伦理问题，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域无直接关联。

articles.title: Daily briefing: This AI-powered robot is a table-tennis master
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01356-4‘Ace’, a robotic arm, can best elite ping-pong players. Plus, a new network of cells in a mouse’s brain and monkeys in Gibraltar are eating dirt to settle their stomachs.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文报道了一款名为'Ace'的AI驱动机器人，在乒乓球比赛中能击败精英选手。同时介绍了小鼠大脑中新发现的细胞网络，以及直布罗陀猴子通过食用泥土来调理肠胃的现象。这些研究主要涉及机器人技术和基础神经科学，与生物医药核心领域关联较弱。

articles.title: What elite sport prepared me for in the lab — and what it didn’t
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01131-5My career as a goalkeeper taught me how to handle failure during my PhD. Or so I thought.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨职业运动员经历如何帮助作者应对博士期间的失败，属于个人学术成长经历分享。内容聚焦科研心理素质培养，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域无直接关联，仅间接涉及科研人才培养话题。

articles.title: Field re-entrant superconductivity in Eu-doped infinite-layer nickelates
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10547-yField re-entrant superconductivity in Eu-doped infinite-layer nickelates
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究报道了在铕掺杂无限层镍酸盐中发现的磁场重入超导现象。虽然这是凝聚态物理领域的重要发现，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联性较低，主要涉及基础材料科学和量子现象研究。

articles.title: Publisher Correction: Reproducibility and robustness of economics and political science research
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 23 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10503-wPublisher Correction: Reproducibility and robustness of economics and political science research
articles.chinese_summary: 本文为《自然》杂志对经济学与政治学研究可重复性论文的出版更正通知，内容聚焦社会科学方法论，与生物医药领域的创新药、生物制造及大健康均无直接关联。

articles.title: Synthetic biology’s uncertain regulatory future in the wake of Loper Bright Enterprises v. Raimondo
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 22 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03114-3The US Supreme Court’s decision in Loper Bright Enterprises v. Raimondo, along with federal spending cuts, may limit the potential of synthetic biology to provide innovative solutions for environmental challenges, medicine and biomanufacturing.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨美国最高法院Loper Bright案判决及联邦预算削减对合成生物学发展的影响。分析指出监管不确定性和资金限制将阻碍合成生物学在医药创新、生物制造及环境解决方案领域的应用潜力，与生物制造领域高度相关。

articles.title: A functional triangle relationship of topoisomerase IIβ, BARD1, and ERK2 in immediate early gene transcription
articles.summary: Immediate early genes (IEGs) encode master transcription factors, including EGR1, FOS, JUN, and MYC genes that drive robust transcription in the G1 phase of cell cycle. Our previous studies indicate that topoisomerase II{beta} (TOP2B) critically regulates IEG transcription and that the activities of TOP2B are dynamically controlled through post-translational modifications by BRCA1-BARD1 and ERKs. Here, we show that two E2 enzymes, UBCH5b and UBC13/MMS2, differentiate the effects and functions of
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示了拓扑异构酶IIβ、BARD1和ERK2在即刻早期基因转录中的功能三角关系。这些基因编码EGR1、FOS等关键转录因子，驱动细胞周期G1期的转录活动。研究发现TOP2B通过BRCA1-BARD1和ERK的翻译后修饰动态调控基因转录，为理解转录调控机制提供了新见解。

articles.title: Reference-free discovery with barcoded single-cell sequencing
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 22 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03084-6sc-SPLASH extends reference-free analysis to barcoded single-cell and spatial transcriptomics data.
articles.chinese_summary: sc-SPLASH技术将无参考基因组分析扩展至条形码单细胞和空间转录组数据，无需依赖参考基因组即可发现新细胞类型和基因表达模式，为创新药物靶点发现和精准医疗提供重要技术支撑。

articles.title: Tandem recalls Mobi insulin pumps over software malfunction
articles.summary: A malfunction may cause insulin delivery to stop. Tandem instructed users to update their pump software as soon as possible.
articles.chinese_summary: Tandem公司因软件故障召回Mobi胰岛素泵，该故障可能导致胰岛素输送中断。公司已指示用户尽快更新泵软件。此事涉及医疗器械安全与糖尿病管理，属于大健康领域的患者安全问题。

articles.title: Recovery of genomic and transcriptomic profiles from decades-old FFPE brain tissues
articles.summary: Neurological, neurodegenerative, and psychiatric disorders impose substantial morbidity and disability worldwide, yet their molecular basis remains incompletely understood, in part due to limited access to human brain tissue. The Danish Brain Collection, comprising brains from individuals who lived in Danish psychiatric institutions from the 1940s to the 1980s, represents a unique but largely untapped resource for retrospective molecular investigation. Here, we assess the feasibility of extracti
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估从数十年福尔马林固定石蜡包埋脑组织中恢复基因组和转录组谱的可行性。通过丹麦脑库资源，为神经精神疾病的分子机制研究提供新途径，主要推动精准医疗发展，与生物制造和创新药研发间接相关。

articles.title: Host tRNA modifications drive efficient translation of influenza A virus genome and impact host antiviral stress responses
articles.summary: Influenza A virus (IAV), as all other viruses, is completely dependent on the host translation machinery components, including host transfer RNAs (tRNAs), to effectively decode its genome. However, while the human genome is biased towards cytosine (C) and guanosine (G)-ending codons, the IAV genome is skewed towards adenine (A) and uridine (U)-ending codons. Nevertheless, translation of IAV's RNA genome is highly efficient. Here we show that host tRNA and tRNA epitranscriptome dynamics are impor
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示甲型流感病毒(IAV)通过利用宿主tRNA及其表观转录组修饰，高效翻译富含A/U密码子的病毒基因组，并影响宿主抗病毒应激反应。该发现阐明了病毒劫持宿主翻译机制的新机制，为理解病毒-宿主相互作用提供了新视角。

articles.title: Deeper is not always better in plasma proteomics
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 22 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03106-3This Comment discusses depth, robustness and bias in plasma proteomics, concluding that increasing the depth of coverage does not necessarily translate to quantitative robustness.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文评论了血浆蛋白质组学中深度覆盖与定量稳健性的关系，指出增加检测深度未必能提升数据可靠性。该研究对生物标志物发现和精准医疗具有方法论意义，但未直接涉及创新药研发或生物制造工艺。

articles.title: Cryo-FIB lamellae enable ultra-high excitation laser intensities for cryogenic super-resolution fluorescence imaging
articles.summary: Super-resolution cryogenic correlative light and electron microscopy (SR-cryo-CLEM) integrates molecular specificity and structure on the single-molecule level, but contemporary approaches require low laser powers to preserve specimen vitrification. Here, we perform SR-cryo-CLEM via single molecule localization microscopy (SMLM) on thin biological lamellae and demonstrate that their geometry and minimally-absorbent composition permit excitation laser powers three orders of magnitude higher than
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了基于冷冻聚焦离子束薄片技术的超分辨率荧光成像方法，允许使用比传统方法高三个数量级的激光功率而不破坏样品玻璃化状态。该技术主要推动冷冻相关光电子显微镜领域发展，虽与生物医药基础研究相关，但距创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接应用较远。

articles.title: Mediator Tail Subunits Hierarchically Couple Transcriptional Condensates to Gene Activation and Genome Organization
articles.summary: Cells respond to acute environmental stress by rapidly reorganizing transcriptional machinery and genome architecture, yet how these processes are mechanistically integrated remain poorly understood. We find that Mediator Tail subunits function in a hierarchical fashion to coordinate transcription factor condensate assembly, three-dimensional genome organization and transcriptional output during the heat shock response (HSR) in Saccharomyces cerevisiae. We identify the Mediator Tail triad - Med2
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示中介体尾部亚基通过层级调控方式，在酵母热激反应中协调转录因子凝聚物组装、三维基因组结构和转录输出。虽然聚焦基础转录机制，但对理解基因治疗靶点调控和细胞应激反应具有潜在启示意义。

articles.title: Apple fends off Masimo challenge to Apple Watch redesign
articles.summary: Apple can continue selling redesigned Apple Watches with a blood oxygen feature after the International Trade Commission concluded the products do not infringe Masimo patents.
articles.chinese_summary: 苹果成功应对Masimo专利挑战，国际贸易委员会裁定重新设计的Apple Watch未侵犯专利，可继续销售带血氧监测功能的产品。此事涉及医疗设备专利纠纷，与大健康领域的可穿戴健康监测技术相关。

articles.title: Intuitive Surgical lifts 2026 outlook for da Vinci robot procedure growth
articles.summary: The company, whose shares climbed nearly 8% Wednesday morning, also said a recent cyber incident has been contained and did not significantly affect first-quarter results.
articles.chinese_summary: 直觉外科公司上调2026年达芬奇机器人手术增长预期，股价上涨8%。公司表示近期网络安全事件已得到控制，未对一季度业绩产生重大影响。该文主要涉及医疗设备领域，与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Boston Scientific slashes 2026 guidance
articles.summary: CEO Mike Mahoney told investors that the lowered forecast reflects challenges for several businesses, including electrophysiology and Watchman.
articles.chinese_summary: 波士顿科学公司下调2026年业绩指引，CEO表示主要因心脏电生理业务和Watchman左心耳封堵器等产品面临市场挑战。该消息反映医疗器械领域面临短期压力，但与创新药、生物制造等前沿技术领域直接关联度较低。

articles.title: CDRH Director Tarver previews AI guidance at AAMI event
articles.summary: Michelle Tarver said the device center plans to finalize guidance on AI lifecycle management and provide some initial thoughts on generative AI following an advisory committee meeting last year.
articles.chinese_summary: CDRH主任Tarver在AAMI活动上预告将发布AI生命周期管理指南，并分享对生成式AI的初步思考。该内容主要涉及医疗器械领域的AI监管框架制定，与生物医药创新及制造的关联度较低，属于大健康领域的政策监管范畴。

articles.title: Isoform-specific cofactor recruitment through the intrinsically disordered N-terminus of p63 underlies differential transcriptional activities
articles.summary: The transcription factor p63 is critical for epithelial development and implicated in tumorigenesis. However, our understanding of the role of p63 in development and disease has been complicated by its diverse isoforms. As a member of the p53 family member of genes, TP63 encodes for numerous isoforms, including the N-terminal variants TAp63 and {triangleup}Np63, which are generated through alternative promoter usage. TAp63 and {triangleup}Np63 share various structural domains, including the DNA-
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示了转录因子p63不同亚型通过其内在无序N端结构域招募特异性辅因子，从而调控基因表达的分子机制。该发现深化了对p63在胚胎发育和肿瘤发生中功能的理解，为基础癌症生物学提供了新见解，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康的直接关联有限。

articles.title: The ABI5-WRKY45-LSU1 axis confers tolerance of Arabidopsis thaliana to cadmium
articles.summary: Abstract Abscisic acid (ABA) is involved in Cd tolerance in Arabidopsis, but the underlying mechanisms are unclear. In this study, we revealed that the ABI5-WRKY45-LSU1 axis confers the tolerance of Arabidopsis to Cd stress. Under Cd stress, the biosynthesis of ABA is increased, and the expression of transcription factor ABI5 is upregulated. Accordingly, the abi5-8 mutants show increased Cd sensitivity. ABI5 directly binds the ABRE element in the WRKY45 promoter to activate its transcription. Ov
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示了拟南芥中ABI5-WRKY45-LSU1信号轴调控镉胁迫耐受性的分子机制。研究发现镉胁迫会诱导ABA合成，上调转录因子ABI5表达，进而激活WRKY45转录，最终增强植物对重金属的耐受性。该研究属于基础植物生物学领域，与创新药、生物制造及大健康的直接关联性较低。

articles.title: Temporal persistence of vertebrate airborne environmental DNA in a natural open-air setting
articles.summary: Airborne environmental DNA (eDNA) is a promising tool for detecting a wide range of taxa including threatened and invasive species, yet its application in management is constrained by a limited understanding of its temporal persistence, particularly in nature. We investigated the temporal persistence of airborne eDNA in a natural outdoor setting, using Bennetts wallaby Notamacropus rufogriseus as a case study. We captured airborne eDNA from a single Bennetts wallaby carcass, deployed in an area
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究在自然户外环境中调查了脊椎动物空气传播环境DNA的时间持久性，以贝内特沙袋鼠为案例。研究发现空气eDNA可在开放环境中持续存在，为生物多样性监测提供了新方法，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联有限。

articles.title: STAT+: Kyverna Therapeutics plans to submit cell therapy for stiff person syndrome for FDA approval
articles.summary: A one-time cell therapy from Kyverna Therapeutics for stiff person syndrome, a rare disease, improved mobility and reduced disabilities in a late-stage trial.
articles.chinese_summary: Kyverna Therapeutics公司针对罕见病僵人综合征开发的细胞疗法在后期试验中取得积极结果，能显著改善患者活动能力并减轻残疾症状。该公司计划向FDA提交上市申请，这代表创新细胞疗法在自身免疫疾病领域的重要进展。

articles.title: STAT+: From Revolution Medicines, more strong data on KRAS drug and a glimpse of a ‘novel class’ beyond it
articles.summary: A company that is changing the outlook on pancreatic cancer has more promising data for treatments near-term and for a generation beyond.
articles.chinese_summary: Revolution Medicines公司公布其KRAS靶向药物的积极数据，并展示了超越该药物的全新药物类别前景。该研究显著改善了胰腺癌的治疗前景，既包含近期治疗方案，也为下一代疗法奠定基础，属于创新药领域的重要突破。

articles.title: Personalized CRISPR therapies could soon reach thousands — here’s how
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 21 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01243-yA fresh approach to trialling treatments for rare genetic diseases could make their production an economically viable prospect at last.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨了个性化CRISPR疗法治疗罕见遗传病的新策略，通过创新临床试验方法使生产具有经济可行性。文章与基因治疗创新高度相关，涉及精准医疗和大健康领域，同时触及生物制造中的个性化疗法生产挑战。

articles.title: STAT+: Kelonia Therapeutics’ road from floundering to $3 billion
articles.summary: BioAge bets on inflammation, a short Pfizer career, and more biotech news from The Readout
articles.chinese_summary: Kelonia Therapeutics从困境到30亿美元估值的转型之路。该公司开发基于iGPS平台的体内基因治疗技术，通过慢病毒载体实现精准基因递送，为癌症等疾病提供创新疗法。BioAge关注炎症领域，反映了基因治疗和生物技术投资的最新动态。

articles.title: STAT+: At AACR, more strong results for Revolution Medicine’s KRAS drug, plus assurance from NCI’s director
articles.summary: At AACR, Revolution Medicines presented more eye-catching data about its KRAS-targeting treatment, and Anthony Letai declared the state of cancer research steady.
articles.chinese_summary: Revolution Medicines公司在AACR会议上公布其KRAS靶向药物的积极数据，NCI主任对癌症研究进展表示肯定。该研究属于创新药领域，通过靶向KRAS这一关键致癌基因开发新型抗癌疗法，对肿瘤精准医疗具有重要意义。

articles.title: STAT+: With successful trials, Roche takes its MS drug to regulators, but safety questions loom
articles.summary: The Swiss drugmaker Roche presented the latest data for its experimental multiple sclerosis drug, setting the stage for the company to seek approval.
articles.chinese_summary: 罗氏公布其实验性多发性硬化症药物最新临床试验数据，为向监管机构申请上市批准奠定基础。该药物属于创新疗法，但安全性问题仍是监管审查的关键考量因素。

articles.title: CRISPR Screens Map Human T‑Cell Genes That Promote or Block HIV Infection
articles.summary:
Using genome‑wide CRISPR activation and knockout screens in primary human T cells, researchers mapped the human genes that shape HIV infection and identified potent antiviral factors, including PI16 and PPID, with distinct mechanisms of action.  
The post CRISPR Screens Map Human T‑Cell Genes That Promote or Block HIV Infection appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究人员通过全基因组CRISPR激活和敲除筛选技术，在人类原代T细胞中绘制了影响HIV感染的基因图谱，发现了包括PI16和PPID在内的强效抗病毒因子。这项研究为开发新型艾滋病基因疗法和抗病毒药物提供了重要靶点，对创新药物研发具有显著意义。

articles.title: CleanAssure Launched as an ISO Class 5 Controlled Cleanroom for Sterile Single-Use Assemblies
articles.summary:
Freudenberg Medical manufactures silicone and thermoplastic elastomer tubing for bioprocessing and critical fluid transfer and specializes in seamless, overmolded single-use assemblies used in vaccine production, cell cultivation, fluid transfer, and fill-finish operations. 
The post CleanAssure Launched as an ISO Class 5 Controlled Cleanroom for Sterile Single-Use Assemblies appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.

articles.title: STAT+: Insurers refuse to join Medicare pilot offering weight loss drugs to seniors at steep discount

Data from Cosmo’s Phase III program for clascoterone confirmed the drug’s long-term safety profile was comparable to vehicle, supporting suitability for chronic use in a lifelong condition. Clascoterone also showed a novel mechanism designed to target the underlying biology of hair loss and continued efficacy with ongoing use, Cosmo said.

articles.chinese_summary: Cosmo Pharma公布其雄激素性脱发治疗药物clascoterone的III期12个月数据，证实长期安全性良好且持续有效。该药物采用新颖机制靶向脱发根本生物学过程，公司计划2027年提交新药申请，适用于需长期治疗的终身性疾病。

articles.title: Alzheimer’s Linked to Cancer Mutations in Brain Immune Cells

The brain’s resident immune cells, microglia, amass mutations in specific cancer-driving genes that don’t manifest as cancer, but instead may help drive Alzheimer’s disease, pointing to new potential therapeutic strategies.

articles.title: Vaccines mean malaria deaths should be falling — not rising

Using an inducible degron to acutely deplete EIF4G1 in human cells, we combined polysome profiling with mRNA-seq to quantify transcript-specific relative polysome association (RPA). EIF4G1 depletion causes heavy polysome collapse with reciprocal 80S monosome accumulation and activates initiation-specific rib
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过急性耗竭翻译起始因子EIF4G1，揭示了其对不同mRNA翻译的特异性需求，并激活了起始特异性核糖体质量监控机制。虽然深化了对翻译调控机制的理解，但与创新药开发、生物制造及大健康的直接关联有限，主要为基础生物学研究。

articles.summary: Common sex chromosome aneuploidies (SCAs) often present with cognitive and cardiovascular dysfunction in humans. To address SCA effects on gene expression and DNA methylation in relevant cell types, we differentiated neural precursor cells (NPCs) and cardiomyocytes (CMs) from human induced pluripotent stem cells (hiPSCs) with different numbers of sex chromosomes, including isogenic and independent lines. As expected, the expression of genes that escape X inactivation (escapees) mostly increases
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过人类诱导多能干细胞分化神经前体细胞和心肌细胞，探讨性染色体非整倍体对基因表达的影响。主要关注X染色体逃逸基因的表达变化，为基础生物学研究提供新见解，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接应用关联有限。

articles.title: Retracing and rewriting the evolutionary trajectories of mammalian developmental enhancers
articles.summary: Cis-regulatory elements (CREs) such as enhancers play a central role in orchestrating mammalian development, yet how they have gained, lost, maintained or changed function over the course of mammalian evolution remains poorly understood. To address this gap, we densely mapped the functional evolution of five mouse developmental enhancers by testing orthologous sequences from 480 extant and ancestrally reconstructed mammalian genomes (Zoonomia, Cactus) with massively parallel reporter assays (MPR
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过大规模平行报告实验，追溯并重写了哺乳动物发育增强子的进化轨迹。文章聚焦于顺式调控元件的功能演化机制，虽为基础研究，但对理解基因调控网络和进化医学具有潜在意义，与创新药开发的基因治疗等前沿领域存在间接关联。

articles.title: Molecular basis of cooperative assembly of the Ndc80-Ska kinetochore complex on microtubules
articles.summary: Successful chromosome segregation depends on robust kinetochore-microtubule attachments. The outer kinetochore load-bearers Ndc80 and Ska complexes functionally cooperate, but the molecular basis of their interaction remains elusive. Here, we combine cryo-EM and functional investigations of Ndc80:Ska on microtubules. Ndc80 forms longitudinal arrays along single protofilaments using two modules. The HEC1 N-terminal tail stabilizes interactions between microtubule-binding heads regulated by Aurora
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过冷冻电镜技术揭示了Ndc80-Ska复合物在微管上协同组装的分子机制，阐明了有丝分裂中染色体分离的关键结构基础。虽然属于基础细胞生物学研究，但对理解细胞分裂异常相关疾病的发病机制具有潜在意义。

articles.title: Transcriptomic analysis of organotypic porcine retina cultures
articles.summary: Porcine organotypic retinal explant cultures are widely used to study retinal neuro-degeneration under controlled conditions, but the biological process that occurs in the retinal explant over time due to preparation-induced injury and culture are not well understood. Here, we generated a time-resolved transcriptomic reference for porcine neural retinal explants-maintained ex vivo for 10 days. Global expression profiles are strongly separated by culture time, with Day 0 clearly distinct from cul
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过时序转录组分析建立了猪视网膜外植体体外培养10天的基因表达参考图谱。研究发现培养时间显著影响全局表达谱，第0天与培养后样本存在明显差异。该工作为视网膜神经变性研究提供了基础数据，主要属于基础医学研究范畴。

articles.title: Histone H4 acetyl-methyllysine marks accessible chromatin that resists compaction
articles.summary: Certain regulatory DNA regions remain accessible even under conditions of widespread chromatin compaction. These regions are often marked by specific protein factors and histone modifications that help maintain their accessibility. Here, we examine the genomic landscape of acetyl-methyllysine (Kacme), a recently discovered histone post-translational modification. Across multiple systems, Kacme is highly enriched at sites of accessible chromatin, including active promoters, enhancers, silencers,
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究聚焦组蛋白H4乙酰-甲基化修饰（Kacme），发现其广泛富集于开放染色质区域如启动子和增强子，揭示了该修饰在维持染色质可及性中的潜在作用。属于基础机制探索，与药物开发等应用领域关联较弱。

articles.title: Decoding Resistance to Targeted Therapy via New Cancer Models
articles.summary:
Developing resistant models directly from patient tumors can take years due to sample scarcity. However, engineering resistance mechanisms in controlled laboratory models allows researchers to systematically study multiple escape pathways much faster.
The post Decoding Resistance to Targeted Therapy via New Cancer Models appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过工程化构建癌症耐药模型，系统解析靶向治疗耐药机制。文章提出的新型肿瘤模型开发方法能加速耐药通路研究，对创新靶向药物研发和精准医疗策略优化具有重要价值，直接关联肿瘤治疗领域的药物开发挑战。

Here, we investigate how SARS-CoV-2 spike protein causes platelet activation and aggregation. Our three-dimensional ultrastructural analyses showed that invaginated platelet structures, open canalicular system (OCS), expanded upon activation, trapping viral particles in the process. articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示SARS-CoV-2刺突蛋白通过诱导血小板纳米级丝状伪足形成，促进微尺度血小板聚集的机制。发现病毒颗粒被血小板开放管道系统捕获并隐藏，阐明了COVID-19血栓形成的潜在病理机制，为理解病毒感染相关凝血异常提供了新视角。

articles.title: Ratiometric Fluorescent Protein Biosensors Reveal Citrate Dynamics and Cellular Heterogeneity

Tools for monitoring of spatiotemporal citrate dynamics are critical for getting a better understanding of cellular metabolism. Here, we develope genetically encoded excitation ratiometric biosensors for citrate, based on our previous intensiometric green fluorescence protein-based citrate biosensor, Citron1. We find that a single mutation in the Citron1 chromophore-forming tripeptide provid
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了比率型荧光蛋白生物传感器，用于实时监测细胞内柠檬酸盐的动态变化和细胞异质性。该工具基于改进的绿色荧光蛋白结构，通过单点突变提升了检测性能，为代谢研究和细胞异质性分析提供了新技术平台。

Comprehensive phenome analysis of 119 WD40 gene deletion mutants across 22 distinct phenotypic traits revealed phenotypic divergence within the phenome, establishing a strong correlation between virule
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究对植物病原真菌禾谷镰刀菌中的WD40蛋白进行全基因组功能分析，通过119个基因缺失突变体的表型组数据揭示了WD40蛋白在致病性中的关键作用。虽然聚焦基础科研，但对理解真菌致病机制具有潜在应用价值。

However, these approaches often require expensive instrumentation upgrades and robotic automation that remain inaccessible to many research laboratories and core facilities. In this study we address the feasibility of scaling up proteomic screening capabilities with minimal upgrade cost by focusing on (a) strategies for non-automated high
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估了在低扫描频率和无自动化条件下进行深度动态蛋白质组筛选的策略。通过优化样品制备和数据处理方法，证明了无需昂贵设备升级即可实现中等通量蛋白质组分析的可行性，主要面向基础研究方法学优化。

The post StockWatch: Revolution’s Phase III Pancreatic Cancer Data Dazzles Investors, Analysts appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.

While the molecular details of LARP1 binding to the ribosome and to TOP mRNAs are deciphered, the mechanistic link between these two activities is not understood. Here, we show that ribosome binding is an essential step i
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示LARP1蛋白通过其RRM结构域作为核糖体响应性调节因子，调控编码核糖体蛋白的TOP mRNA。该机制阐明了核糖体结合与mRNA抑制间的分子联系，为理解核糖体合成失调相关疾病提供了基础科学依据，但对创新药、生物制造或大健康的直接应用有限。
