articles.title: Multi-objective Engineering of Trimethylamine Monooxygenase for Improved Thermostability and Cofactor Use
articles.summary: Trimethylamine (TMA) is a major contributor to undesirable odours in protein hydrolysates derived from marine by-products, limiting their industrial use. Flavin-containing monooxygenases (FMOs) catalyse the conversion of TMA to the odourless trimethylamine N-oxide (TMAO); however, industrial applications demand enzymes that are both thermally stable and compatible with cost-effective cofactors. A thermostable variant of the Methylophaga aminisulfidivorans FMO (mFMO_20) can function at elevated t
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过多目标工程改造三甲胺单加氧酶，提升其热稳定性和辅因子利用率。该酶能催化鱼腥味三甲胺转化为无味氧化物，解决了海洋副产品蛋白水解物的异味问题。这项工作为食品工业的生物制造提供了更稳定、成本更低的酶催化剂解决方案。

articles.title: The lncRNA FENDRR fine-tunes FOXF1 protein levels through a negative feedback loop governing human embryonic lung fibroblast-to-myofibroblast transition
articles.summary: Proper lung development requires precise spatial and temporal coordination of epithelial, mesenchymal, and endothelial transcriptional programs that drive branching morphogenesis, alveolarization, and pulmonary vascularization. The forkhead box transcription factor FOXF1 is a central regulator of these processes, acting in mesenchymal-derived cells to control cell identity, fibroblast-to-myofibroblast transition, and vessel development. Both experimental and clinical evidence indicate that pulmo
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示lncRNA FENDRR通过负反馈环路调控FOXF1蛋白水平，影响人胚胎肺成纤维细胞向肌成纤维细胞转化。该机制对理解肺发育过程具有重要意义，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限。

articles.title: StockWatch: IPO Market Shows Sign of Life with Avalyn Filing
articles.summary:
The initial public offering (IPO) market showed signs of life for the first time in more than a month as Boston-based Avalyn Pharma filed a registration statement on Wednesday seeking to raise capital to develop its pipeline of respiratory disease treatments.
The post StockWatch: IPO Market Shows Sign of Life with Avalyn Filing appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 波士顿Avalyn制药公司提交IPO申请，拟融资开发呼吸系统疾病治疗管线，标志着IPO市场一个多月来首次复苏。该公司专注于创新疗法开发，但文章未具体说明技术平台。

articles.title: Protenix-v2: Broadening the Reach of Structure Prediction and Biomolecular Design
articles.summary: Advances in biomolecular modeling have broadened the range of problems addressable by structure prediction and design models. Here, we present results from Protenix-v2, a system spanning high-accuracy structure prediction and biomolecular design. On the structure prediction side, Protenix-v2 achieves antibody-antigen success rates with up to 13-point gains over Protenix-v1, while 5-seed performance surpasses previous 1000-seed results. On the design side, Protenix-v2 demonstrates a 100% target-l
articles.chinese_summary: Protenix-v2系统在蛋白质结构预测和生物分子设计领域取得突破，抗体-抗原预测成功率较前代提升13个百分点，设计成功率高达100%。该技术对创新抗体药物开发和靶向治疗设计具有重要价值，直接推动生物医药研发进程。

articles.title: Leveraging quadplexed digital PCR to characterize gene therapy vectors
articles.summary: Currently there is a lack of high-throughput, low material-input methods to screen early-stage product quality of viral and non-viral gene therapy products. Here we propose using multiplex droplet digital PCR (ddPCR) to screen and characterize vector sequences. We describe the adaptation of a Poisson-multinomial model to quantitate integrity of any combination of 4 targets in multiplexed ddPCR. We show the success and limitations of model employment and provide some suggested best practices.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了四重微滴数字PCR技术，用于高通量检测基因治疗载体的序列完整性。通过建立泊松-多项式模型，可同时定量分析4个靶点，为早期基因治疗产品的质量控制提供了低样本量、高效率的解决方案。

articles.title: A Real Time Quaking Induced Conversion (RT-QuIC) Assay for Detection of Misfolded Insulin Protein
articles.summary: Protein misfolding plays a critical role in aging and disease, yet the involvement of specif-ic proteins in metabolic dysfunction is still poorly understood. Here, we report studies on the development of a Real-time Quaking-Induced Conversion (RT-QuIC) assay to detect misfolded insulin, a peptide hormone required for blood glucose regulation. Although RT-QuIC assays were originally designed to amplify misfolded prion proteins implicated in neurodegeneration, we adapted the method to monitor conf
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了实时震动诱导转化(RT-QuIC)检测方法用于监测错误折叠胰岛素。该方法源自神经退行性疾病中朊病毒检测技术，现成功应用于代谢疾病领域，为糖尿病等疾病的早期诊断提供了新型检测工具，在创新诊断技术开发方面具有重要价值。

articles.title: Learning latent conformational landscapes encoded in cryo-EM
articles.summary: Proteins exist as a continuum of conformational states, millions of snapshots of which are captured in every cryo-EM experiment. Current analysis reduces these snapshots to static density maps or discrete classes, discarding the dynamics encoded in the data. Continuous latent-space methods offer a promising alternative, yet whether their learned representations are physically grounded remains unresolved. Here, we show that cryo-EM data can be organized into a probabilistic conformational landsca
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究开发了一种从冷冻电镜数据中学习蛋白质连续构象景观的潜在空间方法。通过保留数据中编码的动态信息，突破了传统静态密度图分析的局限。这项基础技术虽不直接涉及药物开发，但对理解蛋白质功能机制具有重要价值，可能间接支持创新药靶点发现和生物制造过程中的酶工程优化。

articles.title: "Editing the conserved IPA1-TB1 regulatory module reshapes plant architecture and enhances tillering in wheat
articles.summary: Plant architecture is a major determinant of yield potential in cereal crops, where tiller number directly influences spike production and grain yield. The transcriptional regulators Ideal Plant Architecture 1 (IPA1) and Teosinte Branched1 (TB1) constitute a conserved genetic module controlling axillary bud activity and branching in grasses; however, their functional contribution to wheat architecture remains largely unexplored. Here, we employed CRISPR/Cas9-mediated genome editing to investigat
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过CRISPR/Cas9基因组编辑技术，探索IPA1-TB1调控模块在小麦株型构建中的作用。该保守模块控制禾本科植物的分蘖行为，编辑后可重塑小麦株型并增强分蘖能力。研究虽聚焦作物育种，但与基因治疗等技术原理相通，在生物技术应用层面具有一定参考价值。

articles.title: Opinion: Sports betting is creating a twofold public health crisis for some young men
articles.summary: “Even if not everybody is losing a ton of money right now, you're creating this culture of large numbers of gamblers,” Isaac Rose-Berman says on the First Opinion Podcast.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论体育博彩在年轻男性中引发的双重公共卫生危机，涉及赌博文化对心理健康和社会福祉的影响。虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但与公共健康领域的成瘾行为和预防策略相关。

articles.title: Opinion: What STAT readers think about nutrition education in med school
articles.summary: “Is ‘lack of education’ really what we think the problem is in prevention care?” a STAT reader asks.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论医学教育中营养学培训的缺失问题，涉及预防性医疗保健领域。虽然不直接涉及创新药物或生物制造技术，但与公共卫生和精准医疗中的疾病预防理念相关，属于大健康范畴的医疗体系优化议题。

articles.title: In-cell structural insights into fungal ER stress responses
articles.summary: Approximately a third of a cell's proteome is folded in the endoplasmic reticulum (ER). The accumulation of misfolded proteins in the ER results in ER stress. The unfolded protein response (UPR) has evolved to attenuate ER stress by increasing the cell's folding capacity and reducing the folding load in the ER. In metazoans, the latter is notably achieved through mRNA translation inhibition. However, S. cerevisiae lacks the corresponding pathways, and its reliance on translational downregulation
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过细胞内结构分析揭示真菌内质网应激反应机制，重点关注未折叠蛋白反应途径。虽然涉及蛋白质折叠质量控制这一生物制造基础过程，但主要聚焦基础细胞生物学机制，与创新药和健康领域的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Targeted sequencing of mutations via RNA-templated gap filling of oligonucleotides for single-cell RNA-seq
articles.summary: We describe a method for targeted sequencing of expressed mutations in single cells. The approach exploits the reverse transcriptase and nick translation activities of the Bst DNA polymerase (Full Length) from Bacillus stearothermophilus (BstFL) to perform an RNA-templated gap filling and ligation between flanking probes. Integrated with probe-based single cell RNAseq workflows, it enables simultaneous whole transcriptomic and multiplexed mutation profiling from the same cell, overcoming key lim

articles.title: Thiol methyltransferase METTL7B coordinates lipid metabolism and promotes tumor progression in pancreatic cancer
articles.summary: Dysregulated lipid metabolism drives cancer progression, yet the molecular mechanisms linking lipid accumulation to pancreatic cancer remain poorly understood. Here, we identify methyltransferase-like 7B (METTL7B) as a key regulator of lipid metabolism and tumor progression in pancreatic cancer. Integrated analysis of large-scale transcriptomic datasets revealed that METTL7B is upregulated in pancreatic cancer compared with normal tissues, and elevated METTL7B expression is associated with poor

articles.title: Cracking the Code for a Successful Partnership with a CDMO
articles.summary: How can you ensure that you’ve selected the right contract design and manufacturing organization? We’re going to tell you how in this webinar sponsored by Velentium.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文聚焦如何选择合适的合同研发生产组织(CDMO)，探讨建立成功合作伙伴关系的关键要素。内容涉及生物制造过程中的外包策略和质量管控，为创新药开发企业提供生物生产环节的专业指导。

articles.title: STAT+: A new trick for old science, and biotech VCs’ scrambled playbook
articles.summary: CAR-T promise in autoimmunity, GSK's goodbye to leucovorin, and more biotech news
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨CAR-T疗法在自身免疫疾病领域的新应用前景，同时涉及生物科技风投策略调整及制药公司产品线变动。核心聚焦创新疗法临床转化与生物技术投资动态，与创新药领域高度相关。

articles.title: STAT+: Replimune skin cancer drug that became FDA flashpoint is rejected again
articles.summary: A cancer drug candidate that, rightly or wrongly, became a flashpoint at FDA, fails on a second try at approval.
articles.chinese_summary: Replimune公司皮肤癌候选药物在FDA审批中再次被拒，该药物此前已成为监管争议焦点。这一事件凸显了创新肿瘤疗法在监管审批过程中的挑战，对癌症治疗领域的药物开发具有重要参考价值。

articles.title: Drugs from a Text Prompt, Wegovy Pill Competition Dampens Lilly’s Surge
articles.summary:
In this episode of GEN's Touching Base, editors discuss a new wave of agentic AI transforming the modern lab, multiple billion-dollar-plus acquisitions, and the dynamic obesity market.
The post Drugs from a Text Prompt, Wegovy Pill Competition Dampens Lilly’s Surge appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本期GEN节目讨论了三项前沿进展：能够根据文本提示生成药物的新型AI系统正在变革实验室研究；多笔超十亿美元的生物医药并购交易；以及诺和诺德口服版Wegovy对礼来肥胖药物市场的竞争影响。内容聚焦AI驱动的药物研发创新和肥胖治疗市场动态。

articles.title: Dual Recognition Drives Site-Directed G-Quadruplex Stabilization: Exploring Oligonucleotide Design in G4 Ligand-Oligonucleotide Conjugates
articles.summary: G-quadruplex (G4) DNA structures are increasingly recognized for their roles in key cellular processes, including transcriptional regulation and genome stability, making them attractive therapeutic targets. Selective recognition of individual G4s remains challenging due to the high structural similarity among human G4 motifs. The G4 Ligand-conjugated Oligonucleotide strategy addresses this need by combining the G4-binding capabilities of small-molecule G4- ligands with the sequence specificity o
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种G4配体-寡核苷酸偶联策略，通过小分子配体与序列特异性寡核苷酸的结合，实现对特定G-四链体结构的定向稳定。该技术为解决G-四链体选择性识别难题提供了新方案，在创新药物开发（特别是靶向转录调控和基因组稳定的疗法）领域具有重要应用价值。

articles.title: Author Correction: Multi-omic profiling reveals age-related immune dynamics in healthy adults
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10484-wAuthor Correction: Multi-omic profiling reveals age-related immune dynamics in healthy adults
articles.chinese_summary: 本文通过多组学分析揭示了健康成人体内与年龄相关的免疫动态变化，为理解免疫系统衰老机制提供了重要数据。研究结果对精准医学和公共健康领域具有显著价值，可为年龄相关疾病的预防和诊疗策略提供科学依据。

articles.title: Cancer Drug Shortfalls Tied to How BET Inhibitors Hit BRD2 and BRD4 Differently
articles.summary:
Using rapid protein degradation, chemogenomics, and super‑resolution microscopy in mouse embryonic stem cells, the team dissected the distinct contributions of BRD2 and BRD4 to transcription.
The post Cancer Drug Shortfalls Tied to How BET Inhibitors Hit BRD2 and BRD4 Differently appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究团队通过快速蛋白质降解、化学基因组学及超分辨率显微镜技术，在小鼠胚胎干细胞中揭示了BRD2和BRD4在转录调控中的不同作用。该发现解释了现有BET抑制剂类抗癌药物疗效不足的原因，为开发更精准的靶向药物提供了关键机制依据。

articles.title: The Trends Shaping the Medtech CMO Market
articles.summary: L.E.K. Consultants will discuss the major forces shaping the CMO market in this upcoming webinar hosted by MD+DI and sponsored by Epicor.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨医疗技术合同制造组织(CMO)市场的发展趋势，属于生物制造领域。虽然聚焦医疗器械而非创新药，但涉及合同制造、生产流程优化等生物制造核心环节，与CDMO模式高度相关。

articles.title: Opinion: What public health can learn from the MAHA movement
articles.summary: “What MAHA has built, in a relatively short time, is social capital,” writes Monica L. Wang.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨公共卫生领域可从MAHA运动学习的经验，强调社会资本在促进社区健康中的重要作用。文章虽未直接涉及创新药或生物制造技术，但对大健康领域的公共卫生策略和社区健康干预具有参考价值。

articles.title: Cryo-EM Structural Biology Facility Opened in San Diego by FairJourney Bio
articles.summary:
The cryo-EM technology is designed to provide detailed insights across the R&D value chain—from epitope mapping and hit generation to structure-guided lead optimization and candidate selection.
The post Cryo-EM Structural Biology Facility Opened in San Diego by FairJourney Bio appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: FairJourney Bio在圣地亚哥开设冷冻电镜结构生物学设施，该技术可为研发价值链提供从表位定位、先导化合物发现到结构引导的候选药物优化的全程支持。这一平台将显著提升生物制药研发效率，对生物制造工艺开发具有重要价值。

articles.title: First Detailed Insight into Bornavirus Nucleoprotein–RNA Complex Reveals Unique Assembly
articles.summary:
Cryo-EM study reveals the first detailed structure of the Bornavirus nucleoprotein–RNA complex, uncovering unique RNA binding and assembly mechanisms that advance understanding of viral replication and antiviral targets.
The post First Detailed Insight into Bornavirus Nucleoprotein–RNA Complex Reveals Unique Assembly appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 冷冻电镜研究首次揭示了博尔纳病毒核蛋白-RNA复合物的精细结构，发现了独特的RNA结合和组装机制。这一发现推进了对病毒复制机制的理解，为开发抗病毒药物提供了新的潜在靶点，对创新药物研发具有重要价值。

articles.title: Epigenetics at Birth Links Microbiome to Neurodevelopment, Potentially ASD and ADHD
articles.summary:
Researchers have found that the human gut microbiome and epigenetics are intertwined, and that both contribute to early life neurodevelopment, and potentially to the development of ASD and ADHD. 
The post Epigenetics at Birth Links Microbiome to Neurodevelopment, Potentially ASD and ADHD appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现人类肠道微生物组与表观遗传学在出生时即相互关联，共同影响早期神经发育，并可能与自闭症谱系障碍(ASD)和注意力缺陷多动障碍(ADHD)的发生有关。这项研究为大健康领域的精准医疗和公共健康提供了新见解。

articles.title: 2026 Medical Device Manufacturing Outlook: Optimism Grows Despite Lingering Uncertainty
articles.summary: The Q1 2026 Manufacturing Pulse Study reveals optimism in manufacturing, led by medical and aerospace growth, despite ongoing challenges like inflation, labor shortages, and supply chain risks.
articles.chinese_summary: 2026年第一季度制造业脉搏研究显示，医疗设备和航空航天领域引领制造业乐观情绪增长。尽管面临通胀、劳动力短缺和供应链风险等持续挑战，但医疗制造领域仍表现出较强韧性。

articles.title: RPL38 controls 60S ribosomal subunit homeostasis to regulate start-codon stringency and frame selection during C9ORF72 RAN translation
articles.summary: Translation initiation depends on stringent start-codon recognition, yet how ribosomal states modulate initiation stringency remains incompletely defined. Repeat-associated non-AUG (RAN) translation is a non-canonical initiation pathway that generates toxic dipeptide repeat proteins in C9ORF72-associated frontotemporal dementia and amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (FTD/ALS). Here, we performed a dual-luciferase reporter-based siRNA screen to identify factors that differentially regulate canonical A
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过siRNA筛选发现核糖体蛋白RPL38通过调控60S核糖体亚基稳态，影响C9ORF72基因中重复序列的非AUG翻译过程。该机制揭示了核糖体状态如何调节翻译起始严格性，为FTD/ALS等神经退行性疾病中毒性蛋白产生提供了新见解，但对创新药、生物制造或大健康的直接应用有限。

articles.title: Retractable Technologies Cuts Jobs to Save $2.2M & Focus on Domestic Production
articles.summary: Retractable Technologies is cutting 16% of its workforce to save $2.2 million annually, strengthen domestic production, and reduce reliance on Chinese imports.
articles.chinese_summary: Retractable Technologies裁员16%以节省220万美元年度开支，重点加强国内生产并减少对中国进口的依赖。该举措主要涉及医疗器械生产优化，与生物制造领域的供应链本土化相关，但与创新药研发和大健康领域直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Pulse Biosciences hires Liane Teplitsky as COO
articles.summary: The appointment gives a former Abbott leader oversight of efforts to bring a pulsed field ablation device to market.
articles.chinese_summary: Pulse Biosciences任命前雅培高管Liane Teplitsky为首席运营官，负责推动脉冲场消融设备上市。该设备用于治疗心律失常，属于医疗器械领域，与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低，但属于大健康范畴的医疗技术应用。

articles.title: Stryker is fully operational after cyberattack
articles.summary: The company disclosed that it expects a material impact on first-quarter financial results. However, it does not expect an effect on full-year results.
articles.chinese_summary: 史赛克公司宣布在遭受网络攻击后已全面恢复运营，预计将对第一季度财务产生实质性影响，但不影响全年业绩。作为医疗器械制造商，该事件间接关联生物制造领域的安全运营问题。

articles.title: Opinion: I’m a MAHA activist. I went into the public health lion’s den — and it changed how I think
articles.summary: “In my most honest of moments, what I want from the medical community is the chance to trust it again,” a MAHA advocate writes.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨MAHA活动家与公共卫生系统的互动经历，聚焦医患信任重建议题。虽涉及公共卫生领域，但未直接讨论创新药研发、生物制造技术或精准医疗等具体科技内容，主要关注医疗体系的社会人文层面。

articles.title: STAT+: GSK says goodbye to leucovorin (again)
articles.summary: A revised ACIP charter, sports betting and gambling addiction, and other health news from Morning Rounds
articles.chinese_summary: GSK再次停止生产甲酰四氢叶酸(leucovorin)，同时涉及修订ACIP章程、体育博彩与赌博成瘾等公共卫生话题。文章主要关注药品市场动态和公共卫生政策，与创新药研发和生物制造直接关联度较低，属于大健康领域的医药市场与公共卫生范畴。

articles.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about cheap generic obesity drugs in India, high demand for estrogen patches and more
articles.summary: And more pharmaceutical news from the Pharmalot campus via the Pharmalittle newsletter
articles.chinese_summary: 本文报道印度廉价仿制肥胖药物、雌激素贴片需求激增等医药行业动态。内容涉及公共卫生领域的药物可及性问题，但与创新药研发、生物制造技术关联较弱，主要反映大健康市场的需求变化和药品供应情况。

articles.title: Trump administration admits a glaring error in its accusations about New York health care fraud
articles.summary: The Trump administration this week acknowledged it made a significant error in figures it used to help justify a fraud probe into New York’s Medicaid program
articles.chinese_summary: 特朗普政府承认在指控纽约医疗欺诈案件中使用错误数据。此事涉及医疗补助计划(Medicaid)调查，主要反映政府监管与公共卫生政策执行问题，与创新药和生物制造领域无直接关联。

articles.title: Neuron-specific epigenetic repression of Cdk5 impairs hippocampal-dependent memory in male and female mice
articles.summary: Biological sex regulates fundamental neurobiology, as well as the etiology and prevalence of neuropsychiatric disorders. Cyclin-dependent kinase 5 (Cdk5) is a neuronally enriched kinase that regulates synaptic plasticity, neuronal homeostasis, and hippocampal-dependent memory. While Cdk5 protein activity is necessary and sufficient to promote memory in male rodents, its role in females and its gene regulation in either sex remain poorly understood. In males, Cdk5 protein inhibition impairs fear
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过神经元特异性表观遗传抑制Cdk5，揭示了该激酶在雄性和雌性小鼠海马依赖性记忆中的关键作用。研究发现Cdk5蛋白活性在雄性啮齿类动物中足以促进记忆形成，但其在雌性中的作用及基因调控机制尚不明确，为理解性别差异在神经精神疾病中的生物学基础提供了新见解。

articles.title: Impact of Fluorophore and Epitope Position on Destabilized Reporter Performance in C. elegans
articles.summary: Determining spatial and temporal gene expression is crucial for understanding animal development and physiology. Promoter reporters are powerful tools used to dissect how cis-regulatory elements and trans-acting factors control gene expression. Many fluorescent proteins used in promoter reporters, however, have long half-lives (>24 hr) which limit the study of dynamic expression. Destabilizing sequences like PEST reduce the half-life of reporter proteins to provide a more representative readout
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过PEST不稳定序列优化荧光报告蛋白的半衰期，提升对线虫基因表达动态监测的准确性。虽未直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但为发育生物学研究提供了改进工具，间接支持精准医学的基础研究。

articles.title: How sports betting apps hook users
articles.summary: In this week's STATus Report, host Alex Hogan dives into how sports betting apps hook users — and how he himself fell for some too-good-to-be-true promotions.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨体育博彩应用程序如何通过营销策略吸引用户成瘾，涉及行为成瘾和数字健康问题，虽不直接关联医药技术，但对公共健康领域的成瘾行为研究具有间接参考价值。

articles.title: Genetic Variability and Population Structure within the Anopheles tessellatus complex (Theobald, 1901) in Indonesia using ITS2 nuclear and COI, COII mitochondrial sequences
articles.summary: Some Anopheles species that act as malaria vectors are members of species complexes, a concept whereby sibling species cannot be differentiated solely on the basis of morphological characters. Therefore, species complexes represent a major problem in malaria vector control, because within an Anopheles complex, vectors cannot be differentiated from non-vector species, unless molecular techniques are used to identify them. The Anopheles tessellatus species complex is an important potential vector
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过分子标记分析印尼按蚊复合体的遗传多样性与种群结构，旨在解决疟疾媒介识别难题。虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但对精准公共卫生中的疾病防控策略具有基础支撑意义。

articles.title: The middle years of my life and career: balancing two experiments at once
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00195-7When I found out that I was no longer eligible for an early-career grant, I took a moment to pause and reflect on my family life and my work.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文是一位科研人员对职业生涯中期的反思，主要讨论早期职业基金资格失效后如何平衡家庭生活与科研工作。内容聚焦个人学术生涯发展，未涉及创新药、生物制造或大健康领域的具体技术或产业议题。

articles.title: Homelessness of the heart
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01063-0The past is a foreign country.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨心灵漂泊与过去异化等哲学主题，标题'心灵无家可归'暗示精神层面的流离失所。文章未涉及生物医药技术、药物研发或健康管理等内容，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域无专业关联性。

articles.title: Behind the scenes with Artemis II’s scientists during the historic Moon fly-by
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01208-1Nature correspondent Alexandra Witze tells us about being in NASA’s scientific nerve centre.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文记录了《自然》杂志记者在NASA科学控制中心的见闻，聚焦阿尔忒弥斯二号任务的历史性月球飞越。内容主要涉及航天任务执行过程及科学观测活动，与生物医药领域的创新药、生物制造及大健康主题无直接关联。

articles.title: How the butterfly got its name: Books in brief
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 10 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01160-0Andrew Robinson reviews five of the best science picks.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文为《自然》杂志刊登的书评文章，由Andrew Robinson点评五本最佳科普读物。内容聚焦于科学书籍介绍，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域无直接专业关联，属于科普传播范畴。

articles.title: GAO report shows gap between scale of illegal vapes and enforcement
articles.summary: The Justice Department's actions on illegal vapes pales next to the scale of the problem, anti-smoking advocates say.

articles.title: Transcriptional and spatial profiling of fibroblasts from human lungs highlights CTHRC1+ cells as fibrogenic signaling hubs in fibrosis
articles.summary: Lung fibroblasts are key regulators of tissue homeostasis and extracellular matrix (ECM) remodeling, and their aberrant activation drives the progressive parenchymal scarring characteristic of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), a fatal disease with limited therapeutic options. Despite their central pathogenic role, lung fibroblasts are difficult to isolate due to their embedded position within the ECM, and standard in vitro culture conditions may lead to the loss of their native functional and

articles.title: Daily briefing: A treatment to reverse cellular ageing is about to be tested in people
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01207-2‘Partial reprogramming’, which winds back a cell’s biological clock, could enter clinical trials later this year. Plus, a single DNA tweak can make female mice grow testes and why obesity drugs are more effective in some people than others.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章报道了一种逆转细胞衰老的'部分重编程'技术即将进入临床试验，可能成为创新抗衰老疗法。同时探讨了肥胖药物疗效个体差异及基因调控对性发育的影响，这些发现对精准医疗和老龄化健康管理具有重要意义。

articles.title: MuteFree: A novel AAV vector system featuring mutation-free ITRs
articles.summary: Instability of the inverted terminal repeats (ITRs) in AAV transfer plasmids has long hindered consistent and efficient production of therapeutic AAV vectors. The palindromic, GC-rich ITR sequence readily forms secondary structures, making them highly mutable in transfer plasmids. Indeed, a recent survey observed mutated ITRs in ~40% of AAV transfer plasmids from labs around the world. Conventional strategies to mitigate this issue -- such as using specialized E. coli strains, suboptimal culture
articles.chinese_summary: MuteFree开发的新型AAV载体系统解决了转移质粒中反向末端重复序列(ITR)不稳定的长期难题。该技术通过消除ITR突变，显著提高治疗性AAV载体的生产效率和一致性，对基因治疗产品的生物制造工艺具有重要改进意义。

articles.title: STAT+: 5 years after lupus breakthrough, CAR-T is still surprising autoimmunity researchers
articles.summary: CAR-T therapy is toting up more remissions in autoimmune disease, and generating a flood of experimentation and investment.
articles.chinese_summary: CAR-T疗法在自身免疫疾病领域取得突破性进展，系统性红斑狼疮治疗后五年持续呈现缓解效果。该疗法引发大量实验研究与投资热潮，为自身免疫疾病治疗开辟全新方向，持续超出研究人员预期。

articles.title: One woman, three autoimmune diseases: CAR-T therapy vanquishes ultra-rare disease trio
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01108-4Fourteen months after treatment with engineered immune cells, the recipient has no symptoms and doesn’t need to take medication.
articles.chinese_summary: 《自然》杂志报道一名患有三种自身免疫疾病的女性在接受CAR-T细胞治疗后，14个月内症状完全消失且无需服药。该案例展示了CAR-T疗法在自身免疫疾病领域的突破性应用，为传统疗法无效的患者提供了新的治疗希望。

articles.title: RAStoERK: a reference interaction atlas for insights into signaling and disease
articles.summary: The RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK pathway has been extensively studied for its roles in physiology and disease, yet a systems level view of its interplay with the broader cellular context is lacking, limiting insight into paralog specific roles, mutation driven rewiring, and cross pathway integration. To address this, we simultaneously mapped the interactomes of all pathway components and their activating and inactivating mutations, identifying 2,500 high confidence interactors, 88% of which previously unrepo
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究构建了RAS/ERK信号通路的全面相互作用图谱，揭示了2500个高置信度相互作用因子。该图谱为理解信号转导机制、突变导致的网络重构及疾病发生提供了系统视角，对癌症靶向治疗和精准医疗具有重要价值。

articles.title: Expert Reveals the Major Catalyst Behind Medtech M&A in 2026
articles.summary: CDMO platforms are driving Medtech M&A in 2026 as buyers seek specialized capabilities like precision diagnostics and regenerative biomaterials, emphasizing complexity and strategic partnerships.
articles.chinese_summary: 专家指出2026年医疗器械并购的主要推动力是CDMO平台，收购方寻求精准诊断和再生生物材料等专业能力，强调技术复杂性和战略合作在行业整合中的重要性。

articles.title: Medline Hit with FDA Warning Over CAPA Failures, Cleanroom Violations, & Design Testing Deficiencies
articles.summary: Medline Industries faces FDA scrutiny for significant quality system violations.
articles.chinese_summary: Medline Industries因质量体系违规受到FDA警告，涉及纠正措施失效、洁净室违规及设计测试缺陷。这直接关联生物制造领域的GMP合规、生产质量控制和CDMO监管要求，突显生物医药生产质量管理的重要性。

articles.title: CDRH targets hospital readmissions with home device innovation challenge
articles.summary: The center plans to pick nine devices to help support patients and caregivers after a hospital stay.
articles.chinese_summary: CDRH推出家庭医疗设备创新挑战赛，旨在选取九种设备支持患者出院后恢复及护理，通过减少再入院率改善医疗系统效率，属于大健康领域的医疗创新应用。

articles.title: STAT+: A new health care blueprint from a key Democratic think tank
articles.summary: Democrats are focused on health care affordability as costs keep climbing.
articles.chinese_summary: 民主党智库发布医疗改革蓝图，重点关注医疗成本持续上涨背景下的可负担性问题。文章涉及医疗政策制定和公共健康管理，与大健康领域直接相关，但未涉及创新药或生物制造技术。

articles.title: Labguru Customer Portal Launched for CRO/CDMO and Client Collaboration
articles.summary:
The new portal was designed to extend internal workflows to support external collaborators. With this structured approach, labs experience increased efficiency while minimizing version conflicts, human error, and compliance risks.
The post Labguru Customer Portal Launched for CRO/CDMO and Client Collaboration appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: Labguru推出面向CRO/CDMO与客户协作的门户平台，通过结构化工作流程提升实验室效率，减少版本冲突、人为错误和合规风险，主要服务于生物制造领域的合作管理。

articles.title: Seer to Apply Deep Proteomics Tech to Singapore Population Cohort Study
articles.summary:
Under the terms of the partnership, Seer's Proteograph product suite will be used to profile the plasma proteome in samples from 10,000 participants from the PRECISE-SG100k initiative.
The post Seer to Apply Deep Proteomics Tech to Singapore Population Cohort Study appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: Seer公司将利用深度蛋白质组学技术分析新加坡PRECISE-SG100k项目中1万名参与者的血浆蛋白质组。该研究通过大规模人群队列的蛋白质组分析，有助于发现疾病生物标志物，推动精准医疗和公共卫生发展。

articles.title: LINC00205	 acts as a multivalent scaffold promoting FUSP525L recruitment in Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis stress granules
articles.summary: Stress granules (SG) are dynamic, membrane-less ribonucleoprotein assemblies that orchestrate cellular stress responses and rapidly disassemble upon stress relief. In Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS), mutations in RNA-binding proteins such as Fused in Sarcoma (FUS) impair SG dynamics, promoting the formation of aberrant and persistent granules. Although long non-coding RNAs (lncRNAs) are emerging as regulators of ribonucleoprotein organization, their mechanistic role in SG architecture and pa
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示长链非编码RNA LINC00205在肌萎缩侧索硬化症中通过招募突变FUS蛋白促进应激颗粒异常形成的分子机制。该发现为理解神经退行性疾病病理提供了新视角，对开发针对RNA-蛋白质相互作用的创新疗法具有重要价值，特别是在基因治疗和精准医疗领域。

articles.title: Esophagus engineering tackles function
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03100-9A tissue-engineered esophageal graft supports luminal patency in growing minipigs with emerging structural integration.
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究在《自然生物技术》报道了一种组织工程食管移植物，能在生长中的小型猪体内保持管腔通畅并实现结构整合。这项技术属于生物制造领域的组织工程应用，通过工程化方法构建功能性器官，对再生医学和器官替代治疗具有重要价值。

articles.title: Almost half of traded wildlife carry disease-causing pathogens
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01121-7More than 40% of traded mammal species share at least one pathogen with humans, compared with only 6% of non-traded mammals.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究表明超过40%的贸易哺乳动物携带至少一种人类病原体，远高于非贸易物种的6%。这凸显野生动物贸易对公共卫生的潜在威胁，可能加剧人畜共患病的传播风险，与大健康领域的疾病预防和公共安全密切相关。

articles.title: Female mice grow testes after this single DNA tweak
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01120-8Small changes in the non-coding part of the genome have a key role in sex determination.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现通过单次DNA调整可使雌性小鼠长出睾丸，揭示非编码基因组在性别决定中的关键作用。该发现对基因治疗领域具有潜在意义，为性别相关发育障碍的治疗提供新思路。

articles.title: Your nose contains multitudes — of long-lived immune cells
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01111-9Nasal tissue harbours T cells that ‘remember’ a pathogen long after infection is past.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现鼻腔组织含有能够长期‘记忆’病原体的T细胞，这些细胞在感染结束后仍能持续存在。这一发现对理解呼吸道免疫记忆、疫苗开发和预防策略具有重要意义，属于大健康领域的免疫学研究。

articles.title: STAT+: Which U.S. metros have the highest health spending? The answer might surprise you
articles.summary: There's not a consistent theme among the 10 highest and lowest spending metros, which highlights the “irrationality” of U.S. health care spending, experts say.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章分析美国不同都市区的医疗支出差异，揭示医疗资源分配不均和支出不合理性。这反映了大健康领域的公共卫生资源配置问题，对精准医疗和健康政策制定具有参考价值，但未涉及创新药或生物制造技术。

articles.title: Opinion: The Pasteur Institute of Iran illustrates important truths about global public health
articles.summary: “War may command attention, but welfare is built in laboratories,” write Charentan Chatterjee and Guy Vernet.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章通过伊朗巴斯德研究所案例，强调实验室研究对公共卫生建设的重要性。虽然未直接讨论创新药或生物制造技术，但阐述了基础医学研究机构在全球健康体系中的核心作用，为精准医疗和公共卫生政策提供重要启示。

articles.title: STAT+: Biotech VCs, used to a winning formula in drug development, face disruption
articles.summary: For decades, venture capitalists have relied on a tried-and-true recipe to make money in biotech. Now that approach is being disrupted.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨生物技术风险投资传统模式的颠覆，与创新药领域高度相关。VC长期依赖的药物开发盈利模式面临挑战，反映了CAR-T、基因治疗等新兴疗法对投资格局的冲击，以及生物医药创新生态的演变。

articles.title: E2 raises $80M to market thrombectomy platform
articles.summary: The funding round follows high-profile acquisitions by Boston Scientific and Stryker to pick up mechanical thrombectomy devices for blood clot removal.
articles.chinese_summary: E2公司获8000万美元融资用于推广血栓切除平台。该融资背景是波士顿科学和史赛克近期收购了机械血栓切除设备。该技术专注于血管内血栓清除，属于介入治疗器械创新，与创新药开发间接相关但属不同领域。

articles.title: STAT+: FDA rejects an industry proposal to deregulate some AI devices
articles.summary: In this edition of Health Tech: FDA rejects a proposal to deregulate certain types of AI devices, pharma invests $50 million in DTx, and more.
articles.chinese_summary: FDA拒绝放宽部分AI医疗设备监管的行业提案，同时制药公司向数字疗法投资5000万美元。文章聚焦医疗AI监管政策与数字健康投资，主要涉及医疗器械审批和数字疗法发展，与大健康领域的监管政策和健康科技创新相关。

articles.title: DNA Uptake in Cholera May Increase Defense Mechanisms
articles.summary:
Study showed that Cholera bacteria can efficiently acquire genetic elements from extracellular DNA released by other cholerae strains and non-cholera vibrio species, potentially adding to their own antiviral defense arsenals. 
The post DNA Uptake in Cholera May Increase Defense Mechanisms appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究显示霍乱弧菌能有效摄取其他霍乱菌株和非霍乱弧菌释放的胞外DNA，可能增强其抗病毒防御机制。这一发现对理解细菌基因转移、开发新型基因治疗工具及应对细菌耐药性具有潜在意义，属于创新生物医药研究范畴。

articles.title: Do the twist: bacteria can spin ‘pucks’ without touching them
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01112-83D-printed discs harness a previously overlooked feature of bacterial locomotion to power tiny motors.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现细菌能通过旋转运动驱动3D打印圆盘，无需直接接触。这一发现揭示了细菌运动的新特征，有望应用于微纳尺度生物制造，开发新型生物驱动系统或微流体设备，为合成生物学和生物加工提供创新工具。

articles.title: Signal, noise, and sampling: How pool size and replication shape metabolomic inference
articles.summary: Metabolomics provides a direct readout of physiological state and is increasingly used in evolutionary and systems biology. In small organisms such as Drosophila melanogaster, metabolomic analyses typically require pooling individuals to obtain sufficient material, yet pool sizes vary widely across studies with little justification. How pooling and biological replication influence metabolome characterization and the detection of biological signal remains poorly understood. Here, we evaluate the
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究评估了果蝇代谢组学中样本池大小和生物学重复对代谢物表征和信号检测的影响。虽然不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但其关于实验设计与数据分析的方法学改进，可能间接支持大健康领域的精准医学研究。

articles.title: STAT+: Top health officials highlight efforts to make medical records more portable
articles.summary: Health tech companies are working to make medical records more portable, but so far, the effort is voluntary.
articles.chinese_summary: 卫生技术公司正致力于提高医疗记录的可移植性，使患者数据能在不同系统间顺畅流转。目前这些努力仍属自愿性质，但有望推动精准医疗发展，改善公共卫生数据共享。

articles.title: GE HealthCare & Medtronic in Digital Integration Collaboration
articles.summary: GE HealthCare’s bkActiv intraoperative ultrasound (iUS) system will now work with Medtronic’s Stealth Axis surgical navigation system.
articles.chinese_summary: GE医疗与美敦力达成数字整合合作，将GE的bkActiv术中超声系统与美敦力Stealth Axis手术导航系统集成。该合作旨在提升手术精准度和效率，属于医疗设备数字化领域，与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低。

articles.title: One year in: How medtech companies are coping with tariff challenges
articles.summary: A resilient medtech industry navigating the fallout from President Donald Trump’s trade wars is taking proactive steps to manage tariff costs as the administration’s policies continue to evolve.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨医疗器械行业在特朗普政府贸易战关税政策实施一年后的应对策略。虽然涉及医疗技术领域，但主要聚焦关税成本和贸易政策应对，与创新药、生物制造等核心领域关联有限，仅在大健康的医疗设备层面有间接相关性。

articles.title: FDA, medtech industry near MDUFA VI agreement
articles.summary: The FDA said it intends to hire “substantial numbers” of medical device review staff as part of the agreement for the next medical device user fee amendments.
articles.chinese_summary: FDA计划在下一代医疗器械用户费用协议中大幅增加审评人员编制，旨在提升医疗器械审批效率。该举措主要涉及监管流程优化，与医疗设备行业政策直接相关，但对创新药、生物制造等核心领域影响有限。

articles.title: C-section rate in 2025 highest in a decade
articles.summary: Why people overeat, how public health survives in war, and more health news from Morning Rounds
articles.chinese_summary: 文章报道2025年剖腹产率达到十年新高，同时涉及暴食原因、战时公共卫生等健康新闻。内容聚焦公共卫生政策和健康趋势，与创新药和生物制造领域无直接关联，属于大健康范畴的公共卫生报道。

articles.title: STAT+: Genetics may shape GLP-1 outcomes, slightly
articles.summary: The traditional biotech venture model under pressure, PhRMA chief Ubl to exit, and other biotech news from The Readout
articles.chinese_summary: 文章探讨遗传因素可能影响GLP-1药物疗效，与大健康领域的精准医疗相关。同时提及生物技术风险投资模式压力及行业动态，但未深入创新药研发或生物制造技术细节。

articles.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about top pharma lobbyist stepping down, genes and GLP-1 drugs, and more
articles.summary: Steve Ubl, chief executive of PhRMA, plans to step down at the end of the ‌year, after more than a decade leading the main trade group for brand-name drug makers
articles.chinese_summary: 美国药品研发与制造商协会(PhRMA)首席执行官Steve Ubl宣布将于年底卸任，结束其领导品牌药企主要游说团体十多年的任期。该人事变动涉及医药行业政策游说层面，与大健康领域的产业政策存在间接关联。

articles.title: A new trick for old science, and  biotech VCs’ scrambled playbook
articles.summary: This week on "The Readout LOUD": Why is old exon science getting new traction? What’s unsettling biotech VCs? And who will be the next CEO of PhRMA?
articles.chinese_summary: 本期播客讨论三个话题：为何旧外显子研究重获关注、生物科技风投面临的挑战、以及PhRMA下一任CEO人选。内容聚焦行业动态与投资策略，与具体药物研发或生物制造技术关联较弱，主要涉及生物科技领域的商业环境分析。

articles.title: New rules for CDC vaccine panel aim to address lawsuit, empower Kennedy’s allies
articles.summary: The panel had become a flashpoint as RFK Jr.'s health department worked to limit the number of recommended childhood shots.
articles.chinese_summary: 美国CDC疫苗咨询委员会因肯尼迪团队推动限制儿童疫苗接种数量而成为争议焦点。新规旨在回应相关诉讼并增强其盟友影响力，主要涉及公共卫生政策层面，与疫苗推荐指南相关，但与创新药研发或生物制造技术直接关联有限。

articles.title: Prion Protein Deficiency Results in Synaptic, Neural Network and Behavioral Alterations
articles.summary: The cellular form of the prion protein (PrPC) is known for its involvement in the pathogenesis of prion diseases. Recent research implicates the physiological isoform of PrP in neuronal development, excitability, and synaptic plasticity, as well as in other biological processes. However, its precise function in the development and function of neurons remains poorly understood. Here, we investigated its role during different developmental stages, both in vitro and in vivo, using different PrP kno
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨朊蛋白缺失对神经元发育和功能的影响，发现其会导致突触、神经网络及行为改变。该基础研究主要揭示朊蛋白在神经发育中的生理功能，与疾病病理机制相关，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Opinion: Tastiness is not why people overeat
articles.summary: “We can’t afford another sweeping restructuring of the food supply based on imprecise interventions and uncertain science,” writes David L. Ludwig.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章质疑以口味解释过度进食的传统观点，呼吁避免基于不精确干预和不确定科学对食品供应进行大规模重组。主要涉及公共健康营养政策领域，与创新药和生物制造的直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Opinion: As a palliative care physician, I’m nervous about the Medicare infusion of $100 million for ‘functional or lifestyle medicine’
articles.summary: MAHA ELEVATE could open a federal funding pipeline to interventions that can't survive contact with a plausibility filter.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨了美国医疗保险向功能医学投入1亿美元资金的政策争议。作者作为姑息治疗医生，质疑功能医学缺乏科学依据，担忧公共医疗资源被用于未经证实的干预措施。文章主要涉及医疗政策与资金分配，与大健康领域的公共健康议题相关。

articles.title: STAT+: Trump promised to clamp down on health insurers. His policies are enriching them
articles.summary: In December, Trump said he would summon health insurance execs to the White House. It doesn't seem a meeting ever happened.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论特朗普政府针对健康保险公司的政策承诺与实际执行情况，指出其政策反而使保险公司获益。主要涉及医疗保险政策领域，与创新药和生物制造直接相关性较低，属于大健康范畴下的公共政策议题。

articles.title: Judge allows states’ lawsuit over HHS restructuring to move forward
articles.summary: A group of 19 states and Washington, D.C., sued over the department’s sweeping layoffs and reorganization last year. A federal judge on Tuesday struck down the HHS’ bid to dismiss the lawsuit.
articles.chinese_summary: 19个州和华盛顿特区起诉美国卫生与公众服务部大规模裁员和重组，联邦法官驳回了HHS驳回诉讼的请求。此事涉及公共卫生管理架构变动，但与创新药、生物制造等核心技术领域直接关联度较低。

articles.title: A trans-piRNA network and transcriptional antagonism shape piRNA cluster function
articles.summary: PIWI-interacting (pi)RNAs protect animal germlines from transposable elements (TEs) by guiding their sequence-specific repression. In Drosophila germline, piRNAs are encoded in distinct genomic regions, piRNA clusters (piCs), that are transcribed by a non-canonical machinery that is anchored on chromatin by the HP1 paralogue Rhino. Studies of transgenic piCs revealed that piRNA biogenesis depends on cytoplasmic inheritance of piRNAs, however, whether native piCs require trans-generational piRNA
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示果蝇生殖细胞中piRNA簇通过跨代piRNA网络和转录拮抗机制调控转座子沉默的分子机制。虽然属于基础生物学突破，但与创新药开发、生物制造及大健康产业无直接关联，主要推动表观遗传学和生殖生物学领域发展。

articles.title: Disentangling mitochondrial copy number variation and PCR amplification bias in DNA metabarcoding
articles.summary: DNA metabarcoding is a central tool in biodiversity research and monitoring, producing detailed taxa lists with comparatively little time and effort. One of its limitations, however, is the lack of quantitative data on biomass or abundance. This limitation has two main reasons: 1) template copy number variation and 2) primer-induced amplification bias. Many metabarcoding markers are mitochondrial and mitochondrial copy numbers vary in animal tissues, potentially decoupling sequence counts from b
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨DNA元条形码技术中线粒体拷贝数变异和PCR扩增偏倚对物种定量分析的影响。虽然涉及分子生物学技术，但主要聚焦生态监测方法学优化，与生物医药核心领域关联度较低。

articles.title: Should academic misconduct be catalogued? Proposed US database sparks debate
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01147-xRepository would require US universities to register research fraud and workplace harassment.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文讨论美国建立学术不端行为数据库的提议，要求大学登记研究欺诈和职场骚扰。该议题主要涉及科研诚信体系建设，与生物医药领域的技术创新、生产制造或健康管理无直接关联，仅间接涉及科研环境治理。

articles.title: How to thrive in science when you move abroad
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00550-8Sonali Majumdar offers a toolkit to support international scientists, their supervisors and mentors.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文为《自然》杂志发表的职业指南，聚焦国际科研人员的职业发展挑战，提供面向科学家、导师和主管的支持工具包。内容主要涉及学术生涯规划与跨文化适应，与生物医药领域的直接技术关联较弱。

articles.title: Liquid or solid? Oobleck droplets are both
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01109-3High-speed cameras can observe the strange behaviour of a cornstarch–water mixture.
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究通过高速摄像机观察玉米淀粉-水混合物的奇异行为，发现这种欧不裂液滴同时表现出液态和固态特性。虽然揭示了非牛顿流体的独特物理性质，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联性较弱，主要属于基础物理学研究范畴。

articles.title: I was with Artemis II’s scientists during the Moon fly-by. Here’s what I saw
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 09 April 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01138-yNature correspondent Alexandra Witze describes the joy and tension at mission control in Houston.

articles.title: A luciferase-based assay for assessing IRES-mediated translation in Wheat Germ Extract
articles.summary: Efficient protein synthesis in eukaryotic cells typically requires a 5' cap structure on messenger RNAs (mRNAs). However, under stress conditions or in viral infection, translation can also occur independently of the cap via internal ribosomal entry sites (IRES). IRES elements are therefore key regulators of protein expression in both viral and cellular contexts. Here we describe a cell-free protocol to quantitatively assess IRES-mediated translation using wheat germ extract (WGE) and a firefly
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种基于萤火虫荧光素酶的检测方法，利用小麦胚芽提取物无细胞系统定量评估内部核糖体进入位点（IRES）介导的翻译机制。该技术主要应用于基础生物学研究，与病毒翻译和细胞应激反应相关，但与创新药、生物制造或大健康领域的直接关联有限。

Following tissue homogenisation and lysis, genomic DNA is extracted, digested and DNA-RNA hybrids are isolated using the hybrid-specific S9.6 monoclonal antibody. Although TRP channels play key roles in peripheral sensation, their expression and functional relevance in the cerebral cortex remain poorly defined. articles.title: ZDHHC17 Links S-Acylation, Huntington Disease, VCP-associated Multisystem Proteinopathy, and Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis.
articles.summary: Protein mislocalization is an important contributor to neurodegeneration. We have identified disrupted S-acylation as a driver of mislocalization. S-acylation, the addition of long-chain fatty acids to cysteine residues, is mediated by the ZDHHC family of S-acyltransferases, and regulates protein localization by modulating protein hydrophobicity. Among these enzymes, we have identified ZDHHC17 as a central node in neurodegenerative disease. Although decreased ZDHHC17 activity is correlated with

articles.title: In vitro Cleavage Requirements and Specificities of Mycobacterial RNase E
articles.summary: Regulation of RNA pools allows for adaptation to changing environments and stress, which is especially important in pathogenic bacteria such as Mycobacterium tuberculosis. RNA degradation is a significant contributor to RNA abundance, and Ribonuclease (RNase) E has a rate-limiting role in degradation of a majority of mycobacterial transcripts. However, many open questions remain about the RNA substrate requirements and specificities for efficient cleavage by mycobacterial RNase E. Here, using bo

articles.title: Proteolytic dissection of eIF4G reveals the closed-loop mRNP as an architecture for translation repression.
articles.summary: Formation of a "closed-loop" mRNP, in which the 5' cap and 3' poly(A) tail are bridged by eIF4E-eIF4G-PABP interactions, has long been proposed to drive efficient translation initiation. Direct tests of this model in mammalian cells have remained elusive. Using auxin-inducible degron (AID) technology to acutely deplete eIF4G1, we find that global translation is only partially reduced and recovers without restoration of eIF4G1 levels. We identify eIF4G3 as an underappreciated contributor to basal

In this study, we profiled the DNA species packaged within rAAV capsids and identified plasmid backbone sequences and host cell genomic DNA (hcDNA) as predominant contaminants. In this study, Celastrol administration significantly attenuates the fasting-induced elevation of blood {beta}-hydroxybutyrate. articles.title: Determination of suitable reference genes for RT-qPCR analysis in Gryllodes sigillatus (Orthoptera: Gryllidae)
articles.summary: The tropical house cricket Gryllodes sigillatus is a major species used in the edible insect farming industry. Despite the rapid expansion of this sector, diagnostic tools for detecting infections in these species remain limited. The lack of validated reference genes compromises the reliability of RT-qPCR-based gene expression analyses, which are essential for the development of molecular tools for disease diagnosis and health monitoring in insect production systems. articles.title: Tm guided exon exon junction RT-PCR enables specific detection of RNA variants lacking easily distinguishable exonic regions
articles.summary: Accurate detection of RNA splice variants is often hindered when transcripts lack large distinguishable exonic regions, making conventional PCR strategies challenging. We developed a simple melting temperature (Tm) guided exon exon junction (EEJ) RT PCR method to enable variant specific detection under these conditions. articles.title: Exon-Skipping Antisense Oligonucleotides for H3.3K27M-Altered Diffuse Midline Glioma Therapy
articles.summary: Diffuse midline gliomas (DMGs) are a deadly class of pediatric high-grade brain cancers. Approximately 80% of pontine DMGs feature a dominant, somatic, heterozygous point mutation in the non-canonical histone H3.3-coding gene H3-3A. This dominant-negative mutation replaces lysine 27 with methionine (K27M) and prevents global K27 di- and tri-methylation of all wild-type histone H3 proteins. articles.title: RNA polymerase loss by nuclear rupture drives LMNA cardiomyopathy
articles.summary: Localized rupture of the nuclear envelope has recently been reported in various pathologies, including cancer, neurodegenerative disease, myocardial infarction, as well as dilated cardiomyopathy caused by Lamin A/C gene mutations (LMNA-DCM). Whether and how nuclear rupture contributes to disease remains unknown. Here, we report that nuclear rupture causes global transcriptional deficiency in a mouse model of LMNA-DCM. articles.title: Stress-Induced PTBP1 Reprograms Neuronal Function and Activates Cellular Senescence
articles.summary: Chronic oxidative stress is a major contributor to neuronal aging. Due to the lack of homologous recombination (HR) DNA damage repair, high oxygen consumption in neurons causes DNA damage accumulation with age, resulting in a decline in neuronal function, senescence-like phenotypes and onset of neurodegenerative diseases. Cannibalism enhances multicellular differentiation by prolonging or preventing commitment to endospore formation under starvation conditions. articles.summary: Toxoplasma gondii is a globally prevalent zoonotic parasite with multiple life stages and transmission routes, including ingestion and transplacental transmission. It is a major cause of abortion in sheep, goats and pigs, among other production animals, worldwide. While Type II strains are common in livestock in North America and Europe, non-archetypal, non-clonal genotypes are highly prevalent in South America. articles.title: SRSF1 regulates polyadenylation site selection independently of and through coordination with U1 snRNP
articles.summary: Proper polyadenylation site (PAS) selection is critical for RNA isoform determination. Core spliceosomal components, including U1 snRNP, regulate PAS choice, but whether they work with other splicing factors in this role remains unclear. Here, we establish that the splicing factor SRSF1 regulates PAS selection independently of and through interactions with U1 snRNP. articles.title: TXNDC15 modulated quality control at the endoplasmic reticulum shapes ciliogenesis
articles.summary: At the endoplasmic reticulum (ER), membrane protein quality control is tightly regulated to ensure excess subunits are recognized and degraded to protect cellular homeostasis. Using genome wide CRISPR screens, we identified a factor of unknown function, thioredoxin domain containing protein 15 (TXNDC15), and showed that it regulates membrane protein stability by tuning the activity of the E3-ubiquitin ligase, MARCHF6. articles.title: MCM10 and SLD-2/RECQL4 jointly activate the CMG helicase during metazoan DNA replication initiation
articles.summary: Eukaryotic cells regulate the assembly and activation of the essential DNA helicase at the heart of the chromosome replication machinery, to ensure that the chromosomes are copied just once per cell cycle. The Mcm10 protein is essential for helicase activation in budding yeast, but an equivalent role for MCM10 orthologues in animal cells has not been explored. articles.title: MCM10 and RECQL4 have cooperative and redundant roles in activating the CMG helicase during the replication initiation
articles.summary: DNA replication initiation requires activation of the CMG helicase to establish the replisome. This process involves the extrusion of single-stranded DNA (ssDNA) from the central channel of MCM double hexamers, allowing the two CMG helicases to pass each other; however, the factors that mediate this process in human cells remain unclear. articles.summary: Major depressive disorders (MDD) are predicted to become the first cause of burden of disease worldwide in 2030, but 30% of patients still do not respond to antidepressants. Current rodent models of MDD mainly result either from one genetic or one environmental risk factor exposure, not recapitulating the multifactorial and polygenic nature of MDD. articles.title: Combining Novel Dual HIF Inhibitors with Immunotherapy Erases Multiple Tumor Types in Mice

articles.summary: Latent HIV-1 proviruses remain the major barrier to curing HIV infection. Although many of these proviruses are defective, with large internal deletions and hypermutations, the mechanisms underlying their formation are still poorly understood. In this study, we applied CRISPR/Cas9 knockout screens to identify DNA damage response (DDR) proteins that contribute to the formation of defective HIV-1 proviruses carrying large internal deletions. Using an HIV-1-based dual-fluorophore vector as a model,

articles.summary: Genetic diversity shapes phenotypes, yet even genetically identical individuals differ. In nine-banded armadillo (Dasypus novemcinctus) quadruplets, we previously showed that allele-specific expression (ASE) imbalances provide a stable molecular fingerprint of individuality. Here, we test whether such transcriptomic individuality reflects functional biological differences. articles.title: Disrupting miR-466l-3p and HuR Cooperation with Target Site Blockers Reveals a Therapeutic Strategy to Destabilize mRNA Transcripts
articles.summary: MicroRNAs (miRNAs) typically regulate gene expression by promoting mRNA degradation, but select miRNAs, such as miR-466l-3p (miR-466), can instead stabilize transcripts in coordination with RNA-binding proteins (RBPs) like HuR. We identify conserved AU-rich elements (cAREs) within the 3'-UTRs of IL-17A, GM-CSF, and IL-23A as critical cis-regulatory binding site where miR-466 facilitates HuR recruitment to promote mRNA stability. Using site-directed mutagenesis, RNA pulldown, and MS2-TRAP assays

articles.title: MicroRNAs are required within a critical time window to define neural patterning during early human brain development
articles.summary: MicroRNAs (miRNAs) are key post-transcriptional regulators of cell state transitions, yet their function in early human brain development is largely unknown. Here, we present a longitudinal analysis of miRNA function in developing human forebrain organoids. We show that mRNAs and miRNAs expression mirrors known developmental gene programs and that miRNA biogenesis peaks at neural commitment. To test the function of miRNAs in regulating commitment, we impaired their biogenesis at defined stages.

articles.title: Comparison of Three Herd-Level Surveillance Methods for Porcine Reproductive and Respiratory Syndrome Virus
articles.summary: This study aimed to evaluate DARO Systems detection of Porcine Reproductive and Respiratory Syndrome Virus (PRRSV) against serum and oral fluid surveillance methods within a controlled study consisting of one PRRSV infected seeder pig and 46 naive nursery pigs. Findings showed DARO Systems comprehensive herd-level surveillance approach detected PRRSV earlier than traditional testing methods.

articles.summary: Alternative splicing (AS) is traditionally understood to increase transcript and protein diversity by generating multiple coding isoforms from a single gene. In addition, many alternative isoforms are degraded through non-sense mediated decay (NMD). Furthermore, we show here that AS also produces nuclear long non-coding RNAs (lncRNAs) from protein-coding genes, which can serve regulatory functions rather than expanding proteomic complexity. articles.summary: Phase variation is viewed as a simple stochastic ON/OFF switch helping bacteria survive unpredictable environments. In minimal-genome pathogens like Mycoplasma bovis, simple sequence repeats (SSRs) introduce frameshifting InDels in key phase-variable genes, such as the Type III restriction-modification mod genes, typically assumed to result in binary expression. articles.summary: Hypoxia is a defining feature of the solid tumour microenvironment and a major determinant of therapeutic response. Hypoxia-inducible factors (HIFs) are central regulators of transcriptional reprogramming under hypoxic stress. Hypoxia can paradoxically elicit both tumour-promoting and tumour-suppressive outcomes, suggesting regulatory mechanisms beyond canonical HIF-dependent pathways. A3 is proteolytically cleaved and circulates as full-length (A3-FL), N-terminal (A3-Nter) and C-terminal (A3-Cter) fragments. Investors zeroed in on the mere 0.9% dip in body weight and 3.3% decline in waist circumference (both placebo-adjusted) reported in the 32-participant 240 mg dose cohort following a six-month follow-up review during the Phase I INLIGHT trial (NCT06842186), designed to assess WVE-007 in healthy individuals living with overweight or obesity conditions. 
The post Wave Plummets 50% on Obesity Data appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: WVE-007在INLIGHT一期临床试验中表现不佳，240mg剂量组随访6个月后，体重和腰围仅分别下降0.9%和3.3%（扣除安慰剂效应），导致投资者信心受挫。

articles.title: African Trypanosomes Use a Molecular Shredder to Avoid Detection in the Bloodstream
articles.summary:
African trypanosomes evade immunity by switching surface proteins and using ESB2, an RNA “shredder,” to control gene expression via RNA decay, revealing new vulnerabilities and potential treatments for sleeping sickness.
The post African Trypanosomes Use a Molecular Shredder to Avoid Detection in the Bloodstream appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 非洲锥虫通过切换表面蛋白并利用ESB2 RNA“分子粉碎机”调控基因表达，从而逃避宿主免疫。这一发现揭示了新的治疗靶点，为昏睡病治疗提供新思路。

articles.title: Lilly Grows AI Footprint with Up-to-$2.75B Insilico Collaboration
articles.summary:
Lilly has agreed to pay Insilico $115 million upfront, as well as development, regulatory, and commercial milestones. Insilico will grant the pharma giant an exclusive global license to develop, manufacture, and commercialize “potentially best-in-class, novel oral therapeutics."
The post Lilly Grows AI Footprint with Up-to-$2.75B Insilico Collaboration appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 礼来与英矽智能达成高达27.5亿美元的合作，支付1.15亿美元首付款。英矽智能授予其新型口服疗法的全球独家许可，旨在开发潜在同类最佳的创新药物。

articles.title: Why Data Infrastructure Determines AI Success in Drug Discovery
articles.summary:
The goal is to make good data practices the path of least resistance. Perhaps the most important requirement is software that experimental scientists can use naturally within their existing workflows.
The post Why Data Infrastructure Determines AI Success in Drug Discovery appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 文章强调数据基础设施是AI药物发现成功的关键。核心在于构建易于实验科学家使用的软件系统，使其能在现有工作流程中自然应用良好数据实践。

articles.title: Link Between Ceramide Transport and Cell Senescence Could Inform Aging Biology Research
articles.summary:
An in vitro study showed how impaired transport protein and buildup of ceramides at the endoplasmic reticulum can help lock cells into replicative senescence, potentially pointing to avenues for research on cell aging. 
The post Link Between Ceramide Transport and Cell Senescence Could Inform Aging Biology Research appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 体外研究表明，神经酰胺转运蛋白功能障碍导致其在内质网积聚，从而促使细胞进入复制性衰老。这一发现为细胞衰老机制研究提供了新方向。

articles.title: Autism Risk Genes Largely Shared Across Global Populations
articles.summary:
A large autism genomics study in Latin American populations identifies shared risk genes across ancestries, supporting universal genetic architecture, improving diagnostic equity, and highlighting the importance of diverse representation in genetic research.
The post Autism Risk Genes Largely Shared Across Global Populations appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 针对拉丁美洲人群的大型自闭症基因组研究发现，不同族裔间自闭症风险基因高度共享，证实了普适的遗传结构。这有助于提升诊断公平性，并凸显了基因研究中多样化人群的重要性。

articles.title: SELECTIVE TRANSCRIPTOMIC VULNERABILITY OF MEMBRANE-INTEGRATED ARCHITECTURES DURING NEURAL TISSUE VITRIFICATION
articles.summary: Cryopreservation is essential for long-term storage of biological tissues. Yet, surprisingly, the precise molecular impact of cryopreservation on tissue transcriptomes remains poorly defined. This study provides the first resource of whole-genome transcriptomic changes following cryopreservation. This study used bulk RNA sequencing to examine how preservation method (snap freezing or vitrification) affects transcriptomes in mouse cerebral cortex and hippocampus. This allowed us to separate cryop
articles.chinese_summary: 研究首次系统揭示了神经组织玻璃化冷冻对转录组的影响，发现膜整合结构相关基因特别易受损伤，为优化低温保存技术提供了分子层面的重要依据。

articles.title: Meiotic cohesin paralogs govern cell survival by exhibiting flexibility in partner choice
articles.summary: Erroneous loading of the ring-shaped cohesin complex, especially at centromeres, cause chromosomal segregation defects in both mitosis and meiosis. Mitotic cohesin subunits of this complex, either get replaced or co-exist with their meiotic paralogs during meiosis and also in certain cancers. However, it is unclear whether meiotic paralogs can partner mitotic subunits to form hybrid complexes in somatic cells and if there are any functional consequences on cancer progression. Here, we provide a
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现减数分裂黏连蛋白旁系同源物在染色体分离中具有灵活性，能够通过改变结合伙伴来维持细胞存活，这对理解染色体异常和癌症发生具有重要意义。

articles.title: A lysyl oxidase (LOX)/bone morphogenetic protein-1 (BMP1) complex to facilitate collagen remodeling
articles.summary: Collagen biosynthesis within the extracellular matrix (ECM) relies on finely regulated enzymatic steps to ensure proper collagen maturation and fibrillar assembly. Among these, bone morphogenetic protein 1 (BMP1) and the canonical lysyl oxidase (LOX) act on the collagen telopeptide to promote procollagen processing and oxidative cross-linking, respectively. However, the mechanisms that ensure precise coordination of their activities remain poorly understood. Using NanoBiT assays, we identified a
articles.chinese_summary: 研究揭示了LOX/BMP1复合物在胶原蛋白成熟过程中的关键作用，该复合物通过协同作用于胶原端肽，促进前胶原交联和细胞外基质的纤维组装。

articles.title: A uniquely leptin sensitive hypothalamic neuron population limits hyperphagia and weight gain in diet-induced obesity
articles.summary: Despite widespread loss of leptin responsiveness in obesity, endogenous leptin continues to restrain feeding, yet the neural substrates that remain sensitive and mediate this effect are unknown. Combining spatial transcriptomics with single-nucleus RNA sequencing in mice with diet-induced obesity (DIO), we show that while most hypothalamic leptin receptor (Lepr) neurons minimally respond to elevated leptin, a single population defined by glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor (Glp1r) co-expression ret
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究通过空间转录组学发现，在饮食诱导肥胖小鼠中，下丘脑特定神经元群体仍保持瘦素敏感性，能够抑制过度摄食和体重增加，为肥胖治疗提供了新靶点。

articles.title: Tau-induced elevation in promoter-proximal RNA polymerase II pausing is linked to decreased expression of long neuronal genes in a Drosophila tauopathy model.
articles.summary: Tauopathies, including Alzheimers disease, are age-related neurodegenerative disorders characterized by abnormal phosphorylation and buildup of microtubule-associated protein tau. Gene expression dysregulation is a key molecular feature of tauopathies, but how aging and disease interact to disrupt crucial transcriptional regulators and pathways remains largely unknown. Here, we examined how pathological tau affects gene expression programs in age-related neurodegenerative disease using a well-es
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现在果蝇tau蛋白病模型中，Tau蛋白异常会增强RNA聚合酶II在启动子近端的暂停，导致长神经元基因表达下调，揭示了转录调控异常在神经退行性疾病中的新机制。

articles.title: Critical roles of MCM8 in meiotic recombination during mouse spermatogenesis
articles.summary: Meiotic DNA double-strand break (DSB) formation and repair by homologous recombination is crucial for ensuring proper chromosome segregation. In mice, the mini-chromosome maintenance family protein, MCM8, has been proposed to function in meiotic recombination and its loss leads to infertility, but the underlying mechanisms are poorly understood. Here we used cytological and genomic assays to infer the role of MCM8 during meiotic recombination in mouse spermatocytes. We show that MCM8-deficient s
articles.chinese_summary: 研究证实MCM8蛋白在小鼠精子发生过程中调控减数分裂DNA双链断裂修复，其缺失导致重组缺陷与不育，阐明了该蛋白在生殖遗传中的核心功能。

articles.title: PIWI proximity proteome reveals Set1-mediated piRNA biogenesis for transposon silencing in telomere
articles.summary: Silencing complexes formed by PIWI-clade Argonaute (Ago) proteins and PIWI-interacting RNAs (piRNAs) are essential guardians of genome integrity, controlling the deleterious activities of transposable elements (TEs) in animal germline. However, our understanding of PIWI-piRNA-directed TE silencing remains incomplete. Here, we systemically characterize the proximity proteome of PIWI members, Piwi, Aubergine (Aub), and Ago3 in the germline of Drosophila ovaries. Functional screening identifies pre
articles.chinese_summary: 利用PIWI邻近蛋白质组学技术，揭示Set1介导的piRNA生成机制在端粒区转座子沉默中的关键作用，深化了对基因组稳定性守护机制的理解。

articles.title: Engineering macrophage-targeted trispecific immune cell engagers for tumor immunotherapy
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03104-5Immune cell engagers (ICEs) have emerged as a promising strategy for cancer immunotherapy, but their efficacy in solid tumors remains limited, partly as a result of the difficulty of coordinating activating and inhibitory signals within the same immune cell. Here, we report a logic-gated cis-targeting strategy that enables ICEs to coordinate activating and inhibitory signals within macrophages, thereby enhancing
articles.chinese_summary: 开发了靶向巨噬细胞的三特异性免疫细胞衔接器，通过协调激活与抑制信号克服实体瘤治疗障碍，为肿瘤免疫治疗提供了新型高效工具。

articles.title: Massively parallel promoter mapping identifies edits to boost sorghum gene expression
articles.summary: Nature Biotechnology, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41587-026-03060-0Non-transgenic crop improvement via cis-regulatory editing is limited by rare activating alleles and incomplete promoter maps. A massively parallel reporter assay in sorghum protoplasts quantifies more than 30,000 CRISPR-mimicking variants across three photosynthesis genes, finely mapping cis-regulatory modules and pinpointing compact edits that drive upregulated protein production.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究通过高通量平行报告系统分析高粱原生质体中3万多个顺式调控元件，构建了完整启动子图谱，识别出可增强基因表达的非转基因编辑靶点，为作物改良提供了新策略。

articles.title: Dawkins’s paradox: dissecting the body’s battle to keep selfish genes in check
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00970-6An essay series by specialists in evolutionary biology, philosophy and more examines the ‘paradox of the organism’.
articles.chinese_summary: 进化生物学等多领域专家探讨“机体悖论”，解析生物体如何抑制自私基因的机制，揭示生命进化的内在矛盾。

articles.title: Quantum simulations verified by experiments for the first time
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00959-1Physicists cross-checked quantum computer predictions against experimental data about materials' properties.
articles.chinese_summary: 物理学家首次通过实验验证量子模拟结果，将量子计算机对材料特性的预测与实验数据交叉比对，实现理论突破。

articles.title: Now is the time for scientific societies to guide global research
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-025-04155-5Electrical engineer Ratko Magjarević explains the benefits of joining and leading scientific societies.
articles.chinese_summary: 电气工程师Ratko Magjarević呼吁科学团体引领全球科研发展，强调加入和领导专业组织对推动科学进步的关键作用。

articles.title: Anthony Leggett obituary: physicist who brought quantum theory to the macro world
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01010-zThe polymath also trained as a philosopher and won a Nobel prize for his theory of superfluids.
articles.chinese_summary: 纪念物理学家Anthony Leggett，他因超流体理论获诺贝尔奖，将量子理论引入宏观世界研究，兼具哲学家背景的跨学科思维。

articles.title: Countdown to Artemis: is NASA’s Moon mission the dawn of a new space age?
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00998-8As humans, we must be intentional about whether, and how, we explore space.
articles.chinese_summary: 探讨阿耳忒弥斯登月计划是否开启太空新时代，强调人类需要审慎思考太空探索的必要性及实施方式，涉及伦理与战略考量。

articles.title: Inside the ‘self-driving’ lab revolution
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00974-2AI-powered robotic tools are muscling in on tasks typically done by humans. What does the future hold?
articles.chinese_summary: 人工智能驱动的自动化实验室正取代传统人工操作，通过机器人系统加速科学研究进程，预示着科研模式的根本性变革。

articles.title: How buildings and cities can be aligned with life
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00971-5Following nature’s patterns, not fighting them, is the way forward for the built environment.
articles.chinese_summary: 提出建筑与城市规划应遵循自然模式而非对抗，通过仿生设计实现与生命系统的协调，为可持续发展提供新范式。

articles.title: Why I made a river my co-author
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-00973-3Anne Poelina gives first authorship to a source with deep knowledge about water — the river itself.
articles.chinese_summary: 作者将河流列为论文第一作者，创新性地赋予自然实体学术署名权，体现了对传统知识体系的尊重与跨物种合作的理念。

articles.title: Static electricity is a mystery but invisible carbon may be key
articles.summary: Nature, Published online: 30 March 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01012-xA thin layer of carbon on the surface of oxide grains changes how they exchange static charge.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现氧化物颗粒表面的薄层碳改变了静电交换方式，揭示了碳在静电现象中的关键作用，为理解静电机制提供了新视角。

articles.title: STAT+: AI drug developer Insilico Medicine and Lilly ink commercialization deal worth up to $2.75 billion
articles.summary: Lilly has signed a deal with AI drug developer Insilico that’s worth $115 million up front and approximately $2.75 billion in biobucks
articles.chinese_summary: 礼来与AI制药公司Insilico达成商业化协议，首付款1.15亿美元，潜在总额高达27.5亿美元，凸显AI药物开发的商业价值。

articles.title: Whole-genome pre-amplification as a viable approach for genomic screening of FFPE-derived DNA samples
articles.summary: Whole-genome sequencing (WGS) enables comprehensive analysis of tumour genomes, but its use in formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded (FFPE) samples is limited by DNA fragmentation and low yields. Whole-genome amplification (WGA) methods such as multiple displacement amplification (MDA) can boost DNA availability but distort copy-number alteration (CNA) profiles. DNA ligation-mediated MDA (DLMDA) mitigates this bias by reconstituting fragmented templates, yet its performance in FFPE-derived DNA remain
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究提出全基因组预扩增（WGA）方法，可有效提升福尔马林固定石蜡包埋（FFPE）样本中低质量DNA的产量，克服全基因组测序应用瓶颈，为临床肿瘤基因组筛查提供可行方案。

articles.title: KDM2B controls HIF levels and activity through its JmjC and CxxC domains
articles.summary: Hypoxia-inducible factors (HIFs) are key regulators of cellular responses to low oxygen (hypoxia), controlling the expression of genes required for survival and adaptation. KDM2B, a chromatin-modifying enzyme, is a direct target of HIF-1, but its precise role in regulating HIF and the hypoxia response remains unclear. Here, we investigated the role of KDM2B in the response to hypoxia in a variety of cell lines. Our analysis reveals that KDM2B depletion regulates HIF activity in a cell type depen
articles.chinese_summary: 阐明KDM2B通过其JmjC和CxxC结构域双向调控HIF蛋白水平与活性。该染色质修饰酶在缺氧应答中形成关键反馈回路，影响细胞适应机制。

articles.title: Chromatin remodelling enables enhancer resetting to facilitate the ERK transcriptional response
articles.summary: During development, cellular identity is ultimately determined by transcriptional output: lineage-specific genes must be activated, while genes associated with alternative fates must be repressed. This process depends on the activity of chromatin remodelling complexes, which regulate the accessibility of transcription factors to chromatin regulatory elements. In addition, cellular identity is shaped by exposure to intercellular signals. Understanding the mechanisms by which extracellular signals
articles.chinese_summary: 揭示染色质重塑复合物通过重置增强子状态调控ERK信号通路转录响应。该机制在发育过程中协调细胞特异性基因表达与命运决定。

articles.title: Rapidly evolving aphid gall effector proteins exhibit saposin-like folds
articles.summary: Many insects manipulate plants by injecting effector proteins. In one extreme example of this molecular hijacking, Hormaphis cornu aphids inject bicycle proteins into Hamamelis virginiana (Witch Hazel), contributing to the development of novel organs called galls. Bicycle proteins share no amino acid sequence similarity with proteins of known function. Here, we report the crystal structures of two divergent bicycle proteins. Both proteins contain saposin-like folds: one with multiple disulfide b
articles.chinese_summary: 发现蚜虫分泌的Bicycle效应蛋白通过Saposin-like结构域诱导植物形成虫瘿。这类快速进化蛋白虽无序列同源性，但通过共同结构域实现宿主操纵。

articles.title: Barcode Crosstalk in ONT Multiplex Sequencing: Quantification and Mitigation Strategies
articles.summary: Multiplexing samples in long-read sequencing with Oxford Nanopore Next Generation Sequencing Technology (ONT) by ligating specific native barcodes to individual DNA samples enables significant increases of high throughput sequencing combined with a significant reduction of sequencing costs. However, this advantage carries the risk of barcode misassignment/crosstalk. Employing ONT multiplex sequencing with samples, we observed misassigned barcodes so called barcode crosstalk, after ONT library pr
articles.chinese_summary: 研究量化了牛津纳米孔多重测序中的条码串扰问题，并提出了有效缓解策略。通过优化实验流程，可在降低测序成本的同时保障高通量数据的准确性。

articles.title: Cytosolic and ER-associated ribosomes share rRNA 2'-O-methylation landscapes across human cell types
articles.summary: Ribosome heterogeneity arising from variable rRNA 2'O methylation (2'O Me) has been proposed as a potential mechanism for translational specialization, but whether such heterogeneity contributes to compartment specific translation remains unknown. Here, we systematically compare the 2'O Me landscapes of cytosolic and endoplasmic reticulum (ER)-associated ribosomes across three human cell types: HEK293 cells, H9-derived neural progenitor cells (NPCs), and neurons differentiated from these NPCs. U
articles.chinese_summary: 系统比较发现人细胞中胞质和内质网相关核糖体的rRNA 2'-O甲基化谱高度一致，表明核糖体异质性可能不是区室特异性翻译的主要调控机制，对理解翻译调控具有重要意义。

articles.title: Expansion and optimization of the auxin-inducible degron 2 (AID2) system in Candida pathogens
articles.summary: The auxin-inducible degron (AID) technology is a convenient and powerful tool for protein functional characterization in a broad array of eukaryotic species. We recently demonstrated that the original AID and improved AID2 systems are very effective at rapid protein depletion in Candida albicans and described a limited set of reagents for their use in certain auxotrophic lab strains. With an eye towards broader applicability with improved flexibility, we report here a new series of template vect
articles.chinese_summary: 成功将改良型生长素诱导降解系统（AID2）扩展应用于念珠菌病原体，实现了快速高效的蛋白功能研究，为真菌遗传学工具开发提供了重要技术支撑。

articles.title: Label-free toehold mediated strand displacement on 3D printed hybrid paper-polymer platform for protein sensing
articles.summary: A programmable 4-input cascade DNA logic gate utilizing toehold mediated strand displacement (TMSD) was implemented on a 3D printed hybrid paper-polymer vertical flow device (3D HPVF) for on/off sensitive and specific fluorescence detection of platelet derived growth factor BB (PDGF BB). Polypropylene was 3D printed directly on paper and thermally cured to create micro paper analytical devices (uPADs). The 3D HPVF comprised of three layers of uPADs enclosed in a casing that clamped each uPAD sec
articles.chinese_summary: 开发基于3D打印纸-聚合物混合平台的免标记链置换DNA逻辑门系统，实现了血小板衍生生长因子BB的高灵敏特异性荧光检测，为便携式蛋白传感提供了创新技术路径。

articles.title: Alternative polyadenylation drives isoform-dependent m6A remodeling during Zika virus infection
articles.summary: Viral infection can reprogram host gene expression by selectively remodeling the cellular epitranscriptome. N6-methyladenosine (m6A) is a reversible RNA modification that is dynamically altered during infection by Flaviviridae viruses, including Zika virus (ZIKV), yet the mechanisms underlying transcript-specific m6A changes remain poorly understood. Here, we integrated glyoxal and nitrite-mediated deamination of unmethylated adenosine sequencing (GLORI-seq) and METTL3 RNA immunoprecipitation an
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现寨卡病毒感染通过选择性多聚腺苷酸化驱动异构体依赖性m6A表观转录组重塑，揭示了病毒调控宿主基因表达的新机制，为理解黄病毒科病毒致病机制提供新视角。

articles.title: STAT+: Amid focus on food, FDA leader briefs lawmakers on priorities
articles.summary: Infant formula safety, updating labels, defining ultraprocessed foods, and expanding inspections of processing plants are among the priorities.
articles.chinese_summary: FDA向国会通报工作重点，包括婴儿配方奶粉安全、标签更新、超加工食品定义及扩大食品加工厂检查范围等关键领域。

articles.title: Agentic AI, Virtual Cell, LNP Vaccine Boosters, Engineered Organs, and Mergers
articles.summary:
In this episode of GEN's Touching Base, editors discuss agentic AI regulation, a new virtual cell model, LNP improvement of vaccine delivery, engineered organs segments, and corporate mergers.
The post Agentic AI, Virtual Cell, LNP Vaccine Boosters, Engineered Organs, and Mergers appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 本期节目涵盖五大热点：代理AI监管、虚拟细胞模型、LNP疫苗递送优化、器官工程进展及企业并购，展现生物技术前沿动态。

articles.title: Gut-Immune Link Identified in Multiple Sclerosis-Related Neuroinflammation
articles.summary:
Researchers studying patients with MS and a mouse model of the disease identify the role of gut-derived cells in antigen presentation as a key initiator of autoimmune neuroinflammation.
The post Gut-Immune Link Identified in Multiple Sclerosis-Related Neuroinflammation appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 研究通过MS患者及小鼠模型发现，肠道来源细胞的抗原呈递作用是自身免疫性神经炎症的关键起始因素，揭示肠-免疫轴在MS中的新机制。

articles.title: Bioengineered Implants Deliver Multi-Drug Therapy in Animal Models
articles.summary:
By generating its own oxygen supply, a new implantable device keeps drug-producing cells alive and functional for weeks, supporting sustained therapeutic delivery for treating chronic conditions.
The post Bioengineered Implants Deliver Multi-Drug Therapy in Animal Models appeared first on GEN - Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology News.
articles.chinese_summary: 新型生物工程植入装置通过自主供氧维持产药细胞活性，在动物模型中实现长达数周的持续多药治疗，为慢性病管理提供新方案。

articles.title: lncOriL, a novel polyadenylated mitochondrial lncRNA common to zebrafish and human
articles.summary: Even though teleost fish and mammals share the same mitochondrial gene content and organization, the teleost mitochondrial transcriptome is still poorly understood. We characterized the mitochondrial transcriptome during zebrafish (Danio rerio) early development by long-read direct RNA sequencing. All heavy-strand specific mRNAs were found to carry 3 poly-A tails of approximately 50-60 residues, and the transcriptome profile was distinctive but practically invariant between stages. Three unusual
articles.chinese_summary: 首次在斑马鱼早期发育中发现新型多聚腺苷酸化线粒体长链非编码RNA lncOriL。该RNA在人类中保守存在，拓展了对脊椎动物线粒体转录组复杂性的认知。

articles.title: The tumour suppressor RBM5 activates the helicase DHX15 to regulate splicing
articles.summary: Pre-mRNA splicing determines the expressed proteome and is frequently dysregulated in cancer. The tumour-suppressor RBM5 controls an exon network regulating apoptosis, yet its molecular mechanism is elusive. Using in vivo spliceosome capture and cryogenic electron microscopy, we determined structures of precatalytic spliceosomes arrested by RBM5 immediately after U2 snRNP branchpoint recognition. Despite intron diversity, the U2-pre-mRNA duplex, branchpoint adenine, and downstream polypyrimidine
articles.chinese_summary: 研究发现肿瘤抑制因子RBM5通过激活解旋酶DHX15调控前体mRNA剪接。利用冷冻电镜技术解析了其分子机制，揭示了RBM5在癌症中调控凋亡相关外显子网络的新途径。
