Surgical survivorship was analysed using Kaplan-Meier method and the log-rank test. Patient Rela
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估了膝关节内侧开放楔形高位胫骨截骨术后对齐方式对患者长期预后的影响。通过对203例膝关节的回顾性分析，发现术后冠状面对齐是否达到最佳标准与患者报告结局无显著相关性，但会影响手术存活率。该研究为膝关节骨关节炎的手术治疗提供了临床证据。

articles.title: Small RNAs as systemic signals in plant defense: mechanisms, challenges, and future directions.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨小RNA作为植物防御系统信号分子的机制、挑战与未来方向。虽然涉及生物信号传导机制，但与人类创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联有限，主要属于基础植物生物学研究范畴。

articles.title: Competing forms of protein-protein association and DNA binding exhibited by BrxC from the BREX phage restriction system.
articles.summary: Bacteriophage exclusion (BREX) defense systems restrict phage infection via inhibition of phage DNA replication, while also modifying and protecting the bacterial genome. Type I BREX systems encode six conserved proteins, including a site-specific DNA methyltransferase. Host methylation requires a subset of BREX proteins, whereas phage restriction generally requires them all, suggesting that distinct but overlapping complexes mediate these activities. Full details of the mechanism and regulation of BREX remains to be understood. Here, we characterize the behavior and structures of the conserved BrxC AAA+ ATPase protein. BrxC forms multiple competing assemblages--various self-associating multimers, as well as a complex with BrxB-PglZ--that can be uncoupled via distinct point mutations, lead
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究揭示了BREX噬菌体限制系统中BrxC蛋白的多种自组装形式及其与BrxB-PglZ的复合物形成机制。通过点突变解耦不同组装状态，阐明了蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用和DNA结合的竞争关系。虽然深化了对细菌防御系统的理解，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限，主要为基础生物学研究。
articles.journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology

articles.title: Development and Psychometric Evaluation of a Medical Device-Related Pressure Injury Risk Assessment Scale.
articles.summary: Medical device-related pressure injuries are a significant and largely preventable patient safety problem, yet existing pressure injury risk scales do not adequately capture device-specific risk factors in adults. This methodological study developed and psychometrically evaluated a standardized risk assessment scale to identify medical device-related pressure injury risk in hospitalized adult patients. An initial item pool was generated from an extensive literature review and clinical expertise, and content validity was assessed by seven experts using the Davis technique (content validity index = 0.96). The scale was administered to 160 adults receiving at least one medical device in medical, surgical and oncology wards and intensive care units of a university hospital. Const
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发并验证了一种医疗器械相关压力性损伤风险评估量表。通过文献回顾和临床经验建立初始条目，经专家评估内容效度后，对160名使用医疗器械的住院成人患者进行测试。该量表专注于预防医疗器械导致的皮肤损伤，属于医疗质量与患者安全领域。

articles.title: Design strategies for flexible core biopsy needles: insights from patent literature.
articles.summary: Flexible biopsy needles are essential for minimally invasive cancer diagnostics, enabling core biopsy sampling through endoscopic and catheter-based procedures. These approaches allow clinicians to access deep-seated or anatomically challenging lesions while reducing patient risk compared to traditional percutaneous methods. However, the shift toward minimally invasive techniques imposes competing design demands on the biopsy needle tip, which must be miniaturized and flexible enough to navigate narrow lumens while maintaining cutting efficiency and retaining adequate tissue samples for clinical diagnosis. This review presents a patent-based analysis of flexible core biopsy needle designs, focusing on mechanisms at the needle tip that govern tissue cutting and retention. We systematically
articles.chinese_summary: 本文通过专利分析探讨柔性核心活检针的设计策略，重点研究针尖组织切割与保留机制。该技术通过内窥镜等微创方式改善深部肿瘤取样，虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但对癌症精准诊断具有辅助价值，属于医疗器械技术创新范畴。

articles.title: Pre-post changes in operating room nurses' knowledge and attitudes toward medical device-related pressure injuries after a problem-based and simulation-based training program: a single-group pretest-posttest study.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估问题导向与模拟培训对手术室护士医疗器械相关压力性损伤认知态度的影响。虽涉及医疗设备使用安全，但与创新药、生物制造直接关联较弱，主要属于临床护理质量改进范畴。

articles.title: TELD vs. IELD for Lumbar Disc Herniations: A Prospective Multicenter Study of Recovery Trajectories Using High-Frequency PROMs.
articles.summary: Full-endoscopic lumbar discectomy can be performed via transforaminal (TELD) or interlaminar (IELD) routes, yet comparative evidence on early recovery trajectories remains limited. To evaluate postoperative pain and disability patterns after TELD and IELD and identify approach-specific recovery characteristics and predictors. Prospective multicenter cohort study. 573 patients undergoing ambulatory full-endoscopic lumbar discectomy (351 TELD, 222 IELD). VAS back pain, ipsilateral leg pain, and Oswestry Disability Index (ODI). Patient-reported outcomes were collected via the SpineHealthie platform daily during week 1 and at 2 weeks, 1, 3, 6, and 12 months. Linear mixed-effects ANCOVA models adjusted for baseline PROMs, age, BMI, disc morphology, and L5/S1-level were used to compare trajector
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究比较经椎间孔与经椎板全内窥镜腰椎间盘切除术的早期恢复轨迹，通过高频患者报告结局评估术后疼痛和功能障碍模式。作为脊柱外科临床研究，主要关注手术技术优化和精准康复评估，与大健康领域的精准医疗和医疗质量提升相关。
articles.journal: The spine journal : official journal of the North American Spine Society

articles.title: Dietary pollen and carbohydrate sources influence longevity, physiology, and gut microbiota in honey bee (Apis mellifera).
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨花粉和碳水化合物来源对蜜蜂寿命、生理及肠道微生物的影响。虽不直接涉及创新药或生物制造，但通过微生物组研究为健康衰老机制提供基础科学参考，与精准健康有一定间接关联。

articles.title: Temporal trends in causes, management and outcomes of cardiac tamponade complicating TAVI: A 12-year single-center experience.
articles.summary: Cardiac tamponade is an uncommon but life-threatening complication of transcatheter aortic valve implantation (TAVI). Despite advances in imaging, device design, and operator experience, it remains associated with high morbidity and mortality. We retrospectively analyzed all consecutive TAVI procedures performed at a high-volume tertiary center between 2013 and 2025. Baseline characteristics, procedural details, mechanisms of tamponade, and outcomes were obtained from institutional databases. Among 2354 TAVI procedures, 29 cases of tamponade occurred (1.2%). The mean age was 78 years, and 65.5% were women. Balloon-expandable valves were used in all but one case. Annular rupture was the leading mechanism (51.7%), followed by LV and RV perforation (13.8% each), while 20.7% had an inde
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究回顾性分析2013-2025年2354例TAVI手术，发现29例发生心脏压塞(1.2%)，主要机制为瓣环破裂(51.7%)。研究聚焦TAVI并发症的临床管理趋势和预后，与医疗器械应用相关，但与创新药、生物制造直接关联度较低，属于大健康领域的临床医学研究。

articles.title: Expanding Prescriptive Privileges for Clinical Nurse Specialists: Evidence From Practice.
articles.summary: The purpose of this paper is to show how a critical care clinical nurse specialist (CNS) with prescriptive authority can address immediate patient needs, drive quality improvement, and improve population health outcomes. A review of the current legislative landscape suggests that CNS practice could be enhanced by adding prescriptive authority for the purposes of improving patient, nurse, and system outcomes. Though 41 states support CNS prescribing, many factors may hinder its implementation. By examining the values of a CNS authorized to prescribe in their healthcare organization with real-time reflections (scenarios), the ability to enhance direct patient care, reduce delays, and foster nurse engagement is revealed. CNSs who elect to obtain prescriptive privileges may have opportunities
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨扩大临床护理专家处方权对改善患者护理、减少延误及提升护士参与度的作用。虽然涉及医疗系统优化和公共卫生改进，但与创新药研发、生物制造技术无直接关联，主要聚焦于医疗服务模式和政策层面。

articles.title: Synergistic Action of Alpha-cypermethrin, Propolis Nanoemulsions and Other Activator Adjuvants for Peach Fruit Fly, Bactrcera zonata Management.
articles.summary: The peach fruit fly, Bactrocera zonata (Saunders), is a major pest affecting over fifty tropical and subtropical fruit crops. It is a significant concern due to its rapid development of resistance to insecticides under intense selection pressure, alongside environmental and health concerns. This study investigated innovative nanotechnology-based adjuvants, specifically propolis nanoemulsions (PN), used alone or combined with selected activator adjuvants like tannin (T), argal (Si), and urea (U). The goal was to enhance the synergistic toxicological effects of alpha-cypermethrin (α-CP) and evaluate their impact on biochemical and biological parameters. Results demonstrated that the combination of α-CP with PN-Si-U achieved the highest control efficiency against adult B. zonata a
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究针对桃果实蝇的杀虫剂抗性问题，开发了基于蜂胶纳米乳剂的增效助剂。通过将α-氯氰菊酯与纳米乳剂及活化助剂复配，显著提升了杀虫效果。该研究属于农业害虫防治领域，与创新药、生物制造及大健康的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Comparative analysis of naked mole-rat thermogenesis and its potential to maintain euthermia in response to cold.
articles.summary: The naked mole-rat (NMR) is a subterranean rodent known for its unique thermal biology, exceptional longevity, and resistance to cancer and hypoxia. However, its thermal biology remains controversial, with various reports describing NMRs as poikilotherms, heterotherms, mesotherms, or partial homeotherms. Here, we investigated whether the thermogenic potential of NMR brown adipose tissue and its UCP1 differ from those in mice and whether the lack of thermal insulation causes extreme changes in NMR body temperature upon cold exposure. Through longitudinal molecular, thermal, metabolic, and behavioral measurements, we found that NMRs initiated nonshivering thermogenesis and elevated body temperature but could not sustain it due to excessive heat loss. Our results suggest that NMRs represent a
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究对裸鼹鼠产热机制进行对比分析，发现其虽能启动非颤抖产热并升高体温，但因热量流失无法维持恒温。该发现揭示了裸鼹鼠独特的热生物学特性，与其长寿、抗癌等特殊生理特征存在潜在关联，但对创新药、生物制造等领域的直接应用价值有限。
articles.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America

articles.title: C. elegans somatostatin/allatostatin C signaling regulates sleep, metabolism, survival, and memory via a sleep-active neuron.
articles.summary: Somatostatin/allatostatin C signaling regulates sleep, metabolism, memory, and longevity, but the underlying neuronal mechanisms remain unclear. We investigated the Caenorhabditis elegans somatostatin/allatostatin C ortholog NLP-99 and its receptor NPR-16. We found that the wake-active AIY neurons release NLP-99 to activate NPR-16. NPR-16 is Gi/o coupled and acts cell nonautonomously to activate the sleep-active RIS neuron while acting autonomously in RIS to inhibit calcium activation and the release of the sleep-inducing FLP-11 neuropeptides. During larval arrest, strong NPR-16 expression in RIS causes NLP-99/NPR-16 signaling to inhibit sleep, reducing lipid storage and survival. In well-fed adults, NPR-16 expression is stronger outside of RIS, and NLP-99/NPR-16 signaling is required for
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过线虫模型揭示神经肽NLP-99及其受体NPR-16通过调控睡眠活性神经元RIS，介导睡眠、代谢与生存的协同调控机制。该基础研究为理解神经环路对生命过程的整合调控提供了新见解，但对创新药、生物制造及大健康的直接应用价值有限。

articles.title: Accuracy and Reproducibility of Digital Area and Depth Measurements of Surface Wounds: Benchtop and Clinical Validation.
articles.summary: Background/Objectives: Accurate and reproducible wound measurement is essential for monitoring healing and guiding treatment decisions. Conventional ruler-based techniques are prone to geometric overestimation and operator variability. This study evaluated the accuracy and reproducibility of the MolecuLightDX wound imaging device for measuring wound surface area and depth compared with ruler-based measurements and ground truth digital photography methods. Methods: This investigation comprised two companion studies: a prospective, paired, multicenter clinical study comparing MolecuLightDX measurement with the ruler method against an image-based ground truth, and a bench and clinical validation of the AutoDepth feature against a calibrated three-dimensional optical scanner. The area of study
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估MolecuLightDX伤口成像设备在测量创面面积和深度时的准确性与可重复性。通过与传统尺测法和数字摄影基准方法比较，验证该设备在临床和实验环境中的性能。研究聚焦伤口监测技术，属于医疗设备创新领域，与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Educational Needs of Intensive Care Unit Nurses Regarding Medical Device-Related Pressure Injuries: A Cross-Sectional Study.
articles.summary: Medical device-related pressure injuries (MDRPIs) are common in intensive care units (ICUs) and can cause patient harm when prevention, detection or management is inadequate. Device-specific education for ICU nurses is essential to support evidence-based MDRPI prevention and management. To identify ICU nurses' perceived educational needs related to MDRPIs by years of clinical experience and to examine domain- and content-specific needs by medical device type. A cross-sectional survey was conducted among nurses working in eight adult ICUs at a 1200-bed tertiary hospital in South Korea. The questionnaire assessed demographics, prior MDRPI education and perceived learning needs across eight domains. Data were analysed using descriptive statistics and the Kruskal-Wallis test with Bonferroni-ad
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究调查ICU护士对医疗器械相关压力性损伤的教育需求，通过横断面调查发现护士在不同临床经验和设备类型下的学习需求差异。研究聚焦护理实践中的设备使用教育，与大健康领域的医疗质量提升相关，但与创新药和生物制造领域无直接关联。

articles.title: Mapping Biomedical Engineering Education and Research in Sub-Saharan Africa: A Bibliometric and Systematic Analysis.
articles.summary: Biomedical engineering (BME) education is critical to the growth of engineering-driven healthcare entrepreneurs and the enhancement of health systems globally. This study examines the evolution of BME education research over the past 20 years, with a focus on Sub-Saharan Africa (SSA), using a mixed-methods approach that includes bibliometric analysis and a systematic literature review. Between 2000 and 2025, there were almost 370,000 BME-related publications indexed in PubMed alone. Bibliometric data indicates a large global growth, mostly because of advances in artificial intelligence and digital health. However, compared to major producers like the US and China, SSA is notably underrepresented, and African contributions account for a very small percentage of overall output. These differe
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过文献计量学方法分析撒哈拉以南非洲生物医学工程教育与研究发展。结果显示该领域全球增长迅速，但非洲地区贡献度极低，存在明显区域不平衡，主要关注教育体系与研究能力建设而非具体疗法开发。
articles.journal: Advances in medical education and practice

articles.title: Stoichiometric hydrogen peroxide versus hypochlorite generation via dual-cell continuous flow system enables singlet oxygen-dominated phenol oxidation.
articles.summary: Current electrochemical processes utilizing singlet oxygen (1O2) for wastewater treatment face limitations due to inefficient hydrogen peroxide (H2O2) generation and uncontrollable stoichiometric ratios between H2O2 and hypochlorite (ClO-). To address these operational bottlenecks, this study developed a dual-cell continuous-flow system that decouples the production of H2O2 and ClO- to degrade phenol and other organic contaminants. The system features a natural air diffusion cathode (ADC) for energy-efficient H2O2 generation without aeration and a dimensionally stable anode (DSA) for active chlorine production. By optimizing the applied current ratio (ADC:DSA = 2:1), an optimal 1:1 H2O2/ClO- stoichiometric molar ratio was achieved. This precise control successfully maximized 1O2 production
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种双室连续流电化学系统，通过解耦过氧化氢和次氯酸盐的生产并优化其化学计量比，实现了单线态氧主导的苯酚氧化。该系统采用自然空气扩散阴极节能生产H2O2，利用尺寸稳定阳极产生活性氯，为有机污染物降解提供了新策略，主要应用于水处理领域。
articles.journal: Water science and technology : a journal of the International Association on Water Pollution Research

articles.title: Isolation and Genome Annotation of TicTac, an EK1 Cluster Bacteriophage with Podovirus Morphology.
articles.summary: TicTac was discovered in the soil underneath a mint bush in Pocatello, Idaho, USA. The bacteriophage has a podovirus morphology, infects Microbacterium foliorum NRRL B-24224 and is grouped with bacteriophages in cluster EK1 based on sequence similarity. The genome size is 53,876 bp with 59.0% GC content. Annotation of the genome provided evidence for 57 predicted protein-coding genes, of which 18 have predicted functions, including multiple minor tail proteins.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究从美国爱达荷州薄荷丛土壤中分离出具有短尾病毒形态的TicTac噬菌体，其感染Microbacterium foliorum并归类于EK1簇。基因组大小为53,876 bp，GC含量59.0%，预测含57个蛋白编码基因，其中18个功能已知，包括多个次要尾蛋白。该基础研究对微生物学和病毒分类学具有学术价值。

articles.title: Sunlight Inactivation of Influenza A Virus and Bacteriophages on an Acrylic Surface.
articles.summary: Seasonal epidemics and pandemics of influenza cause a large public health burden, with transmission occurring via contact with contaminated fomites. Sunlight has been shown to inactivate viruses in water, but its effect on viruses on surfaces remains poorly understood. This study investigated the inactivation of bacteriophage MS2, bacteriophage Phi6, and influenza A virus H1N1 (IAV) on an acrylic surface exposed to both natural and simulated sunlight. Findings demonstrate that sunlight can rapidly inactivate viruses on an acrylic surface, with the time required for 99% inactivation ranging from 2.1 to 4.2 h for MS2, 0.72 to 0.83 h for Phi6, and 0.26 to 0.35 h for IAV. Human saliva protected MS2 against sunlight inactivation relative to its inactivation in laboratory buffer but had no effec
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨了自然和模拟阳光下丙烯酸表面流感病毒和噬菌体的灭活效果。结果表明阳光能快速灭活表面病毒，流感病毒H1N1仅需0.26-0.35小时即可达到99%灭活。该发现对理解病毒环境传播和公共卫生干预具有重要意义。

articles.title: Application of the Technology Acceptance Model to Predict Nursing Students' Intention to Use Informatics: Cross-Sectional Study.
articles.summary: Nursing informatics is essential for digital health transformation; however, the technology acceptance of undergraduate nursing students in Saudi Arabia remains underexplored. This study examined factors influencing nursing students' intention to use informatics technologies using the technology acceptance model. A cross-sectional survey was conducted with 132 undergraduate nursing students. Data were analyzed using descriptive, correlational, and hierarchical regression analyses. Perceived usefulness (mean 3.68, SD 1.22) and perceived ease of use (mean 3.64, SD 1.32) were the strongest predictors of acceptance, together explaining 87% of the variance (R²=0.87; β=0.323 for usefulness, P<.001; β=0.195 for ease of use, P=.032). Only 25.8% (n=34) of the students often used
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究应用技术接受模型调查沙特护理学生对信息技术的使用意向，发现感知有用性和易用性是主要影响因素。该研究关注数字健康转型中的护理信息学应用，与大健康领域的医疗信息化和公共卫生相关，但与创新药和生物制造直接关联较弱。

articles.title: Self-Reported Interpersonal Safety Concerns During Outdoor, Daytime Physical Activities by Sex and Race/Ethnicity, SummerStyles - United States, 2022.
articles.summary: PurposeTo identify differences in interpersonal safety concerns during outdoor, daytime physical activities by sex and race/ethnicity.Design and SettingWe analyzed data from the 2022 SummerStyles, a nationwide online survey of US households.Sample3,772 adults.MeasuresParticipants reported the presence and types of interpersonal safety concerns during outdoor activities, including harassment or violence, non-violent crime, being alone, being around strangers, or police presence.AnalysisWe estimated the weighted prevalence of concerns and used Wald chi-square and pairwise testing to identify differences by sex and race/ethnicity. We used logistic regression to explore these differences by race/ethnicity, stratified by sex and adjusted for age, household income, and urbanicity.Results26.6% of
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过美国全国性调查分析户外体育活动中的安全顾虑差异，发现26.6%成年人存在人际安全担忧，女性及少数族裔群体风险更高。该研究属于公共卫生领域，关注体育活动参与的社会障碍，但与创新药、生物制造等生物医药核心技术无直接关联。
articles.journal: American journal of health promotion : AJHP

articles.title: Flexible Scheduling and Manageable Workloads as Drivers of Infection Preventionist Retention.
articles.summary: Work-life balance is a crucial factor influencing job satisfaction and retention. Infection preventionists (IPs) face unique post-pandemic challenges, including heavy workloads, staffing shortages, and limited scheduling flexibility. Little is known about how these dynamics influence IP retention. This qualitative study explored how organizational, leadership, job, team, and personal factors shape IPs' experiences of work-life balance and their decisions to leave the field. A qualitative descriptive design was used. Twelve virtual focus groups were conducted with four IP subgroups: tenured IPs, transitional IPs, former IPs, and IP leaders. Participants discussed drivers of retention and attrition, including organizational culture, workload, leadership, team dynamics, and personal considera
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨工作生活平衡对感染预防专家留任的影响，分析了组织文化、工作量、领导力等因素。虽涉及医疗人力管理，但与创新药、生物制造的直接关联有限，主要属于大健康领域的人力资源管理议题。

articles.title: Expected Value of Sample Information Calculations for Risk Prediction Model Development.
articles.summary: Risk prediction models are often advertised as deterministic functions that map covariates to predicted risks. However, they are typically trained using finite samples, and as such, their predictions are inherently uncertain. This uncertainty has been addressed in terms of uncertainty around metrics of model performance (e.g., confidence interval around c-statistic), as well as uncertainty or instability of predictions. Correspondingly, sample size calculations for model development studies target the precision of estimates of summary statistics and the stability of predictions. However, when evaluating the clinical utility of a model (as in net benefit [NB] calculations in decision curve analysis), statistical inference is less relevant. From a decision-theoretic perspective, the finite s
articles.chinese_summary: 本文从决策理论角度探讨风险预测模型开发中的样本信息期望值计算，关注模型临床效用评估而非具体疗法。与创新药、生物制造直接关联较弱，主要涉及医疗决策方法论，适用于精准医疗中的模型验证环节。

articles.title: Shift of nitrogen metabolism drives the evolution of multidrug resistance in wastewater microbiomes under long-term fluoride stress.
articles.summary: The discharge of fluoride-containing industrial wastewater poses novel challenges to biological wastewater treatment systems. In particular, the long-term impacts of fluoride (F-) stress on key metabolic fluxes (e.g., nitrogen transformation) and the dissemination risk of biological pollutants (e.g., antibiotic resistance genes) in biological treatment systems remain unclear. This study systematically investigated the nitrogen removal performance, microbial community structure, and resistome evolution in a sequencing batch bioreactor under prolonged (120-day) stress from 20 mg/L F-. The results indicated that long-term F- exposure severely inhibited nitrification, decreasing the ammonia removal efficiency from 99.6% to 74.7%. Conversely, the significant enrichment of denitrifying bacteria
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨长期氟化物胁迫对废水处理系统的影响，发现氟抑制硝化过程并降低氨氮去除率，同时促进反硝化菌富集和抗生素抗性基因传播。虽涉及微生物代谢与耐药性演化，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联较弱，主要属于环境微生物学研究范畴。

articles.title: Nationwide Real-World Outcomes of Robot-Assisted Radical Prostatectomy Using the Hinotori Surgical Robot System in Japan.
articles.summary: The Hinotori Surgical Robot System is the first domestically developed robotic platform approved in Japan and is increasingly used for robot-assisted radical prostatectomy (RARP). However, nationwide real-world data remain limited. This study evaluated perioperative, oncological, and functional outcomes of Hinotori-assisted RARP to establish pragmatic benchmark data during its diffusion phase. This multicenter retrospective study included consecutive patients who underwent Hinotori-assisted RARP at 24 institutions in Japan, each performing at least 20 procedures between April 2023 and March 2024. Perioperative outcomes, Clavien-Dindo-graded complications, biochemical recurrence-free rates, and urinary continence at 3 and 6 months were assessed descriptively. Exploratory analyses str
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估日本国产Hinotori手术机器人系统在前列腺癌根治术中的全国性真实世界数据，分析围手术期、肿瘤学和功能学结果。虽然涉及医疗技术创新应用，但主要聚焦外科手术效果评估，与创新药、生物制造领域直接关联度较低，属于大健康范畴的手术治疗技术评估。
articles.journal: International journal of urology : official journal of the Japanese Urological Association

articles.title: Comparative Assessment of Two Nitinol Fatigue Datasets to Support Cardiovascular Medical Device Durability.
articles.summary: Comparisons of fatigue performance between datasets are relatively common practice, although there is not a standardized metric for conducting such analyses. In this work, two recently published nitinol fatigue datasets with relevance for cardiovascular medical devices are used to probe a range of comparative metrics. Results highlight the importance of selecting an appropriate metric as well as the importance of test planning as both can affect the final conclusion regarding the similarity of two datasets. Additionally, an unsuccessful attempt was made to predict high cycle fatigue strength based on low cycle (i.e., censored) fatigue data using a Coffin-Manson relation, which reinforces the importance of conducting fatigue tests to as many cycles as the intended device lifetime. Lessons l
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究比较两种镍钛诺材料的疲劳性能数据集，评估心血管医疗器械耐久性。结果显示测试指标选择对结论有显著影响，并强调疲劳测试需覆盖设备全生命周期。该研究主要关注材料工程领域，与创新药、生物制造和大健康的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Pediatric Pleomorphic Xanthoastrocytomas: A Multicenter Neuroradiological and Clinical Correlation Study.
articles.summary: Pleomorphic Xanthoastrocytomas (PXAs) are rare pediatric brain tumors accounting for approximately 1% of primary brain neoplasms in children and young adults. Despite recent imaging and molecular advances, gaps remain in our understanding of their diverse imaging characteristics and clinical outcomes. This study provides a large international, multi-institutional analysis of pediatric PXAs focusing on neuroimaging and clinical outcomes. We conducted a retrospective international multi-center study including 63 pediatric patients with histologically confirmed PXAs. Neuroimaging data were reviewed, and molecular analyses were recorded with emphasis on BRAF V600E mutations and CDKN2A/B deletions. Treatment modalities and clinical outcomes, including progression-free and overall survival, were
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究针对儿童多形性黄色星形细胞瘤(PXA)进行国际多中心回顾性分析，重点探讨神经影像特征与临床预后的相关性。通过对63例患儿进行影像学评估及BRAF V600E突变等分子分析，填补了该罕见脑肿瘤在影像学表现与治疗效果认知上的空白。

articles.title: Pre-use acceptability of telemedicine among nursing students: a quantitative cross-sectional study.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过横断面调查探讨护理学生对远程医疗使用前的接受度，属于医疗健康服务领域。虽然涉及医疗技术应用，但与创新药研发、生物制造等核心领域关联较弱，主要聚焦于医疗服务实施和健康教育层面。

articles.title: Characteristics of Value-Based Oral Health Care: A Scoping Review.
articles.summary: This review presents a scoping review exploring the characteristics of value-based oral health care (VBOHC) and the potential to transform the delivery of dental services. VBOHC represents a shift from the traditional fee-for-service model, which prioritises service volume, to a system focused on improving patient outcomes, enhancing preventive care, and optimising cost-efficiency. To identify and synthesise the defining characteristics of VBOHC and assess the potential to enhance patient outcomes, cost-efficiency, and care delivery in dental systems. Following methodology per the Joanna Briggs Institute and guidance per PRISMA-ScR reporting (Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-analyses extension for Scoping Reviews), a scoping review was undertaken to include literat
articles.chinese_summary: 本文通过范围综述探讨基于价值的口腔医疗特征，旨在从传统按服务收费模式转向注重改善患者结局、加强预防护理和优化成本效益的医疗体系。主要关注口腔医疗服务模式转型，与创新药和生物制造领域直接关联较弱。

articles.title: Hyperbaric oxygen therapy for knee osteoarthritis: treatment mechanism, potential advantages, and limitations.
articles.summary: Knee osteoarthritis is a common chronic joint disease. Although there are many treatment options available for knee osteoarthritis, most focus on alleviating symptoms rather than halting disease progression, repairing cartilage, reversing joint damage, or restoring the structure and function of the knee. Hyperbaric oxygen therapy works by increasing tissue oxygen concentrations by increasing higher atmospheric pressure. This therapy can directly improve the hypoxic microenvironment in knee osteoarthritis. Hyperbaric oxygen therapy can also improve oxygenation, reduce oxidative stress and regulate inflammatory responses. In addition, it plays an important role in promoting angiogenesis, cartilage repair and regeneration, and healing of damaged joint tissue. This review explores the therapeu
articles.chinese_summary: 本文探讨高压氧疗法治疗膝骨关节炎的机制、优势与局限。通过提高组织氧浓度改善缺氧微环境，调节炎症反应，促进血管生成和软骨修复。属于物理疗法创新应用，与创新药/生物制造直接关联较弱，主要涉及大健康领域的治疗技术探索。

articles.title: Population Perspectives on Nurturing Relational Health from Early Life: A Systematic Review Series.
articles.chinese_summary: 该系统性综述从人口视角探讨早期关系健康培养，聚焦儿童发展的社会心理因素。虽未直接涉及创新疗法或生物制造，但通过研究早期干预对长期健康的影响，与大健康领域的公共卫生和预防医学存在间接关联。
articles.journal: Clinical child and family psychology review

articles.title: The Mark Coventry Award: Five-Year Outcomes of a Randomized Controlled Trial on Cemented Versus Uncemented Total Knee Arthroplasty: The KneeFix Trial.
articles.summary: Uncemented total knee arthroplasty (TKA) components were developed to improve fixation relative to cemented implants. While uncemented femoral components have yielded favorable results, outcomes for earlier uncemented tibial and patellar designs have been inconsistent. Contemporary trabecular-metal implants aim to enhance biological fixation by optimizing osseointegration, yet randomized data comparing fully uncemented constructs including the patella, are limited. We conducted a prospective, single-blinded randomized controlled trial (RCT) comparing 5-year radiological, clinical, and patient-reported outcomes of fully-cemented and fully uncemented trabecular-metal TKA with patella resurfacing. Between 2017 and 2020, 316 knees (280 patients) were randomized 1:1 to fully-cemented (n = 158)
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究比较了全膝关节置换术中骨水泥与非骨水泥固定方式的5年疗效。作为一项随机对照试验，它主要关注骨科植入物的临床效果评估，与生物医药领域的创新药和生物制造直接关联较弱，但属于大健康领域的医疗器械临床应用范畴。

articles.title: Anaerobic/oxic/anoxic-membrane bioreactor process coupled with polyaluminum chloride for simultaneous nitrogen and F(-) removal in semiconductor wastewater, and membrane fouling mitigation: Performance and mechanism.
articles.summary: To address the stringent discharge standards of fluoride (F-) and nitrogen (N) in semiconductor wastewater treatment, a novel anaerobic/oxic/anoxic membrane bioreactor (A/O/A-MBR) coupled with polyaluminum chloride (PAC) was developed. This study investigated the system performance, membrane fouling mitigation, microbial community dynamics, and the synergistic removal mechanisms. Results indicated that an optimal PAC dosage of 800 mg/L (at pH 7.0) reduced the effluent F- concentration to below 4 mg/L (81.5% removal efficiency) and maintained the total inorganic nitrogen (TIN) removal efficiency above 81% (effluent TIN = 5.7 mg/L). PAC addition significantly enhanced the conversion of influent COD into intracellular carbon sources, increasing the proportion of endogenous carbon storage from
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种厌氧/好氧/缺氧膜生物反应器结合聚合氯化铝的新工艺，用于处理半导体废水中的氟化物和氮。结果表明，该系统能有效降低氟浓度至4mg/L以下，总无机氮去除率达81%以上，同时缓解膜污染并改变微生物群落结构。

articles.title: Effect of the SAFE-CARE nursing bundle on artificial airway-related complications in adult ICU patients: a before-and-after interrupted time-series study.
articles.summary: To evaluate the effectiveness and sustainability of the SAFE-CARE nursing bundle in reducing artificial airway related complications in adult ICU patients, and to assess whether it provides a practical model for low and middle income countries and under resourced ICUs. This single center retrospective before and after interrupted time series study included adult patients who received invasive mechanical ventilation with an artificial airway retained for at least 24 h. The control group was February to December 2023 and the intervention group was January to December 2024. Primary outcomes included pericuff microaspiration (PM), ventilator associated pneumonia (VAP), medical device related pressure injury (MDR-PI), and unplanned extubation (UE). Secondary outcomes included duration of
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估SAFE-CARE护理方案对降低成人ICU患者人工气道并发症的效果，重点关注微误吸、呼吸机相关性肺炎等指标。该研究属于临床护理质量改进领域，与大健康中的医疗质量提升相关，但与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Efficacy and safety of e.p.t.q. hyaluronic acid fillers in the context of aesthetic facial rejuvenation or beautification: a post-market clinical follow-up study.
articles.summary: This study was conducted to assess the efficacy and safety of e.p.t.q. hyaluronic acid (HA) fillers (JETEMA Co., Ltd., Yongin, Korea) in the context of aesthetic facial rejuvenation or beautification. The patients were evaluated for changes in the Wrinkle Severity Rating Scale (WSRS) scores, the Mid-Face Volume Deficit Scale (MFVDS) scores and the Medicis Lip Fullness Scale (MLFS) scores at 24 weeks from baseline and those in the investigator- and patient-assessed Global Aesthetic Improvement Scale (GAIS) scores at 24 weeks from 4 weeks and rates of adverse events (AEs), serious AEs (SAEs) and serious adverse device effects (SADEs). The WSRS, MFVDS and MLFS scores reached the highest level at 4 weeks and showed declines thereafter until 24 weeks. Moreover, there were significant changes in
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估e.p.t.q.透明质酸填充剂在面部年轻化美容中的疗效和安全性。通过皱纹严重程度、中面部容积缺失和唇部丰满度等量表评估，结果显示疗效在4周达峰后逐渐下降至24周，并记录了不良事件发生率。

articles.title: Diet and multiple sclerosis: Behaviour change techniques in the digital health application levidex.
articles.summary: Multiple sclerosis (MS) is a chronic disease affecting the central nervous system. People with MS (PwMS) have a strong need for lifestyle-related information, and their motivation to change dietary behaviour is typically high. A recent randomised controlled trial showed that the digital health application (DiGA) levidex led to an increase in diet quality in an early MS cohort. This study aimed to provide an analysis of the diet-related behaviour change techniques (BCTs) applied in 'levidex'. The BCT Taxonomy v1 (BCTTv1) was used to report BCTs of diet-related content in levidex. BCTs were independently coded by two raters using MAXQDA 2022. Disagreements were resolved by a third rater. Inter-rater reliability was assessed as percentage agreement and coefficient kappa. Identified BCTs were
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估数字健康应用levidex在改善多发性硬化症患者饮食质量中使用的行为改变技术。文章聚焦数字健康干预和慢性病管理，与生物医药领域的创新疗法和生物制造直接关联较弱，主要属于大健康领域的数字医疗和慢性病管理范畴。

articles.title: Enrichment Strategies for Comammox Nitrospira: Ecological Insights and Technological Innovations.
articles.summary: Comammox Nitrospira, microorganisms capable of converting ammonia to nitrate independently, are ubiquitous in diverse ecosystems and play pivotal roles in global nitrogen cycling and sustainable wastewater treatment. However, their cultivation and purification remain challenging due to their slow growth rates. This review systematically summarized enrichment strategies from ecophysiology and niche differentiation perspectives. We first depict their distribution across natural and engineered systems, revealing their dominance in oligotrophic habitats and even some mesotrophic habitats. By analyzing the niche differentiation among ammonia-oxidizing microorganisms, we highlight how substrate affinity, oxygen tolerance, and metabolic versatility determine the competitiveness of comammox Nitros
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述了Comammox Nitrospira（完全氨氧化菌）的富集策略，重点分析其生态分布及与其它氨氧化微生物的生态位分化。该研究主要涉及环境微生物生态学和废水处理技术，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联性较低，但可为环境生物技术提供基础理论支持。

articles.title: Prolyl hydroxylase-dependent proteolysis enables the orthogonal hypoxia responses in plants.
articles.summary: Vascular plants and metazoans use selective proteolysis to control responses to hypoxia, although through distinct biochemical mechanisms. The reason for this divergence is puzzling, since the molecular components necessary for both strategies are conserved. To explore the alternative scenario where plants and animals respond to hypoxia through the same mechanisms, we engineer a three-components system aimed to target proteins for degradation in an oxygen dependent manner in Arabidopsis thaliana. When used to control transcription, the synthetic system partially restores hypoxia responsiveness in oxygen-insensitive mutants. Additionally, we demonstrate its potential to regulate growth under flood-induced hypoxia. Our work highlights the use of synthetic biology to reprogramme signalling pa
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过合成生物学方法在植物中构建了氧依赖性蛋白降解系统，探索植物与动物缺氧响应机制的差异。虽然涉及合成生物学技术，但主要聚焦基础植物生物学机制，与创新药和生物制造的商业应用关联较弱，属于基础科学研究范畴。

articles.title: Assessing the adequacy of funding for robotic-surgery hospital stays: a focused cost analysis based on 1,722 procedures in a French university hospital.
articles.summary: Context: Robotic-assistance is increasingly used in French hospitals and funded through standard Diagnosis-Related Group (DRG) tariffs. We evaluated the actual costs of robotic-assisted surgical procedures (RASP) and compared these with hospital revenues to assess whether current funding levels are sufficient to cover procedural costs. Materials and methods: This cross-sectional study was conducted in Lyon University Hospitals (France). We examined all RASP performed over January 2023-June 2024. We matched medical device usage data from the DaVinci system manufacturer’s database with the hospital database, calculated related costs, and compared these against the costs/ tariffs of DRGs using the national cost benchmarks. Results: Based on a final sample of 1,722 procedures, we observ
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估法国大学医院1722例机器人辅助手术的实际成本与医保支付标准的匹配度，聚焦医疗资金充足性问题。研究通过匹配手术设备使用数据与医院数据库进行成本分析，属于医疗健康管理领域，与创新药和生物制造无直接关联。

articles.title: Work as Imagined Versus Work as Done: A Usability Evaluation of an RFO Sponge-counting System in Real Operating Room Conditions.
articles.summary: Retained foreign objects are surgical items accidentally left inside the patient after skin closure at the end of an operation. The surgical count is the primary method for preventing retained foreign objects, and surgical sponge detection devices are increasingly used to aid in prevention. The objective of this study was to investigate usability, functionality, and user responses to 1 such sponge accounting device. Interactions with the sponge accounting device were directly observed during 17 surgical procedures (including laparoscopic, cesarean section, and general surgery). Data was collected quantitatively through a categorical time study and the System Usability Scale, in conjunction with qualitative ad hoc in situ interview data. Thirteen participants completed the System Usability
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估手术海绵计数系统在真实手术室环境中的可用性，通过观察17台手术并收集定量和定性数据。研究聚焦于预防手术异物遗留，属于医疗设备安全领域，与手术质量提升相关，但与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Device failures and patient adverse events from EUS: 26-year FDA MAUDE analysis (2000-2025).
articles.summary: EUS has emerged as an essential instrument in the field of gastroenterology, significantly enhancing both diagnostic evaluations and therapeutic procedures. By delivering high-resolution imaging and precise guidance, EUS facilitates a range of interventional techniques. This study sought to examine the adverse events linked to EUS devices following their approval by the US Food and Drug Administration. We performed a retrospective analysis utilizing postmarketing surveillance data sourced from the Food and Drug Administration's Manufacturer and User Facility Device Experience (MAUDE) database. This analysis encompasses data from January 1, 2000, to August 31, 2025. A total of 7608 reports detailing 8778 device-related issues and 7875 patient complications were analyzed. The most commonly r
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过FDA MAUDE数据库分析2000-2025年超声内镜设备故障及患者不良事件，共分析7608份报告。研究发现设备故障主要涉及成像问题和机械故障，患者并发症包括感染和穿孔。该研究聚焦医疗器械安全性评估，与创新药和生物制造领域直接关联有限。

articles.title: High-grade angiosarcoma arising beside a pelvic orthopedic implant: a case report.
articles.summary: Angiosarcomas are very rare, malignant tumors of the endothelial lining of blood vessels and most present cutaneously, while only 10% present as deep soft tissue angiosarcomas. Literature is sparse regarding secondary deep soft tissue angiosarcoma, especially in cases that have formed surrounding a foreign body such as orthopedic implants. A 59-year-old Caucasian male presented with a 1-year history of occasional headaches and non-intentional weight loss. One month prior to consult, he began to experience progressive pelvic pain on weight-bearing, up to 10/10 in severity, with associated swelling of the left leg. Further diagnostics revealed a hypervascular tumor on the anterior left hemipelvis, directly over his initial pelvic injury and orthopedic implants placed 33 years ago. Biops
articles.chinese_summary: 本文报道一例59岁男性在骨盆骨科植入物旁发生高级别血管肉瘤的病例。该罕见深部软组织肉瘤发生在33年前植入的骨科器械周围，属于异物相关肿瘤的个案研究，主要涉及植入物并发症与肿瘤学领域。
articles.journal: International journal of surgery case reports

articles.title: Introducing the Concept of Label-Prosthesis Mismatch and Its Classification.
articles.summary: • All stented bioprosthetic aortic valves are mislabeled. • Labeled diameters are oversized compared to true diameters with various severity. • Label oversizing has been converted into the concept of label-prosthesis mismatch. • A simple classification of label-prosthesis mismatch is described (grade 0-6). • This study should help surgeons in their choice of prosthetic valves. • This study should also be an incentive for the industry towards correct labeling. [Figure: see text]
articles.chinese_summary: 本文提出'标签-假体不匹配'概念及分级系统，指出带支架生物主动脉瓣普遍存在标签直径大于实际直径的问题。该研究旨在辅助外科医生选择假体瓣膜，并促进行业规范标签标注，主要涉及医疗器械临床实践领域。
articles.journal: Structural heart : the journal of the Heart Team

articles.title: Reusable Hepatic Imaging Tool: A Reusable 3D-Printed Tool for Hepatic Intravital Microscopy.
articles.summary: Hepatic function and dysfunction can be assessed by directly visualizing the dynamic processes of the liver using confocal-based intravital microscopy (IVM). In particular, excellent spatial and temporal precision can be achieved in the extraction of both qualitative and quantitative information. On the microscope stage, maintaining physiological tissue conditions while achieving stability and repeatability remains challenging. Increased weight and hepatic lipid content have a detrimental effect on this process in animal models of Type II diabetes (T2D) and non-alcoholic fatty liver disease (MAFLD). To overcome these constraints, we have created RHIT, a revolutionary imaging instrument design that improves tissue access and stability. RHIT is a reusable, scalable hepatic imaging device man
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种可重复使用的3D打印肝脏活体显微镜成像工具RHIT，旨在改善肝脏组织的稳定性和可及性。该工具主要用于糖尿病和脂肪肝动物模型的肝脏功能可视化研究，属于生物医学成像技术领域，与创新药物开发和生物制造关联较弱。

articles.title: Recent technological advances in device-assisted enteroscopy.
articles.summary: Device-assisted enteroscopy (DAE) has revolutionized small bowel evaluation by allowing endoscopic access for both diagnosis and therapy. Since the introduction of double-balloon enteroscopy, newer techniques such as single-balloon enteroscopy, spiral enteroscopy (SE), and balloon-guided systems have expanded clinical options. However, conventional DAE remains limited by procedural complexity, prolonged procedure times, and incomplete enteroscopy. In response, novel technologies have emerged to improve efficiency and outcomes. Among these, motorized power SE (PSE) represents a significant advancement, enabling deeper insertion and single-operator capability. Despite promising early results, PSE has been withdrawn from the market owing to safety concerns, particularly esophageal injuries. N
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述设备辅助小肠镜(DAE)的技术进展，包括双球囊/单球囊小肠镜、螺旋式小肠镜等新型系统。重点讨论电机驱动螺旋式小肠镜(PSE)在提升操作效率和插入深度方面的创新，以及因安全性问题退市的现状。该研究属于消化内镜领域的医疗器械创新，与创新药/生物制造直接关联度较低，主要适用于大健康领域的医疗技术范畴。

articles.title: Effect of Implementing a Nursing-Led SKINCARE Bundle for Preventing Medical Device-Related Pressure Injury in Critical Care Units.
articles.summary: Medical device-related pressure injuries (MDRPIs) are generally preventable yet increasingly recognised complications in critical care units, contributing to patient harm, prolonged hospitalisation and higher costs. A nursing-led skincare bundle may provide a structured, evidence-based approach to standardising practice for the prevention of MDRPIs. This study aimed to evaluate the effect of implementing the SKINCARE bundle on the prevention of MDRPIs in critically ill patients. A quasi-experimental study in critical care units evaluating the effect of a SKINCARE bundle, which included skin assessment, repositioning, moisture management, securing medical devices and protecting the skin with special dressings, on preventing MDRPIs. A total of 110 critically ill patients were included and eq
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估护理主导的SKINCARE方案对预防重症监护病房医疗器械相关压力性损伤的效果。该方案包括皮肤评估、体位调整、湿度管理等标准化措施，涉及110名危重患者。研究属于临床护理改进领域，与医疗器械使用安全相关，但与创新药、生物制造的直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Complications Associated With AMT Nasal Bridle Use: An FDA MAUDE Analysis.
articles.summary: Nasal bridles have been used with increasing frequency and can be deployed at bedside. They are effective in reducing dislodgement of nasogastric tubes in the hospital setting and may increase caloric intake. Adverse events associated with device malfunction or improper use can occur and have a detrimental effect on patients. This study utilized the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) Manufacturer and User Facility Device Experience (MAUDE) database to explore patient-related adverse events associated with nasal bridle use between 2000 and 2023. Twenty-four unique adverse events were reported: 15 were associated with foreign body retention, 4 with septal laceration on placement or removal, 3 from septal tears secondary to forceful patient removal, 1 associated with skin irritation, and 1 pr
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过FDA MAUDE数据库分析2000-2023年鼻腔固定装置相关不良事件，发现主要并发症包括异物残留、鼻中隔撕裂等。该研究关注医疗器械临床使用安全，属于大健康领域的医疗安全范畴，与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低。
articles.journal: World journal of otorhinolaryngology - head and neck surgery

articles.title: Ultrasound Screening of Lateral Hinge Fracture after Medial Open Wedge Proximal Tibial Osteotomy.
articles.summary: Open wedge proximal tibial osteotomy includes open wedge high tibial osteotomy (OWHTO) and open wedge distal tuberosity tibial osteotomy (OWDTO). These techniques differ in fixation stability and risks, including lateral hinge fracture (LHF), which is a known factor in delayed bone healing. Early detection of LHF is crucial for optimizing bone union. This study evaluated the accuracy of LHF assessment using a non-invasive ultrasound device. We hypothesized that (1) ultrasound would detect lateral hinge fractures with high diagnostic accuracy compared with CT, and (2) greater dynamic widening at the hinge site measured by ultrasound would be associated with delayed bone union. We analyzed 61 knees (33 OWDTO, 28 OWHTO) in 33 women (mean age 60 years, range 27-78). LHF was assessed using radi
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估超声在检测胫骨近端开放楔形截骨术后外侧铰链骨折的准确性。研究发现超声与CT相比具有高诊断准确性，且超声测量的铰链部位动态增宽与延迟骨愈合相关。该技术属于骨科手术优化领域，与大健康中的医疗技术创新相关，但与创新药和生物制造直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Isolation and characterisation of virulent bacteriophage targeting canola rhizosphere bacteria Klebsiella grimontii and Bacillus sp.
articles.summary: Rhizosphere bacteria can have a range of impacts on their plant host. Bacteriophage, viruses which specifically infect and kill bacteria, shape diverse microbial communities by lysing beneficial, commensal and pathogenic bacterial species. Phage mediated bacterial lysis could therefore be deployed to target bacterial species in the rhizosphere to suppress disease without reducing the positive effects of other bacterial communities on the host plant. Here we isolated, sequenced, and characterized four virulent bacteriophage that target two Canola-root associated bacterial isolates, Klebsiella grimontii and Bacillus sp. Genomic and biological analysis showed all four phages are strictly lytic with no lysogenic markers, antibiotic resistance genes or virulence factors. Phylogenetic analysis p
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究从油菜根际分离并表征了四种针对克雷伯菌和芽孢杆菌的烈性噬菌体。这些噬菌体具有严格裂解特性，不含溶原性标记、抗生素耐药基因或毒力因子。研究展示了利用噬菌体靶向调控根际微生物群落以防治植物病害的潜力，但主要聚焦基础微生物学研究，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联有限。

articles.title: Communicating Safely: Standardizing Nursing Clinical Reports in a Neonatal Unit.
articles.summary: Clinical documentation during nursing handovers is critical for safe neonatal care. Poorly structured or inconsistent documentation can lead to miscommunication, delayed interventions, and fragmented care. A 2021 audit in a tertiary neonatal unit revealed only 2% of nursing handover reports followed the recommended Introduction, Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan (ISOAP) format, posing significant risks to patient safety. This quality improvement initiative aimed to improve compliance with ISOAP documentation format for nursing handovers in a tertiary Neonatal Intensive Care and Special Care Nursery (NICU/SCN), addressing both paper-based and digital systems. A 3-year quality improvement project was conducted using the Institute for Healthcare Improvement's Model for Improvement. Two
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过质量改进项目，在新生儿重症监护室推行ISOAP标准化护理交接报告格式，旨在减少沟通错误和干预延迟，提升患者安全。主要关注临床文档规范化和护理流程优化，与医疗质量改进相关。
articles.journal: Advances in neonatal care : official journal of the National Association of Neonatal Nurses

articles.title: Diffusion-weighted imaging of the fetal brainstem and cerebellum before and after prenatal myelomeningocele repair.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究采用弥散加权成像技术评估胎儿脑干和小脑在产前脊柱裂修复手术前后的变化。该研究聚焦于胎儿神经外科手术的影像学评估，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联度较低，主要属于临床医学中的胎儿外科和神经影像学研究范畴。

articles.title: Rapid elongation drives the exceptionally fast aggregation of the most common localized human amyloid medin.
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究聚焦于人类最常见的局部淀粉样蛋白medin的快速聚集机制，发现其异常快速的伸长驱动了聚集过程。这一基础研究主要涉及蛋白质错误折叠和心血管疾病机制，与创新药开发有一定间接关联，但与生物制造和大健康领域直接相关性较低。

articles.title: Dot-blot ELISA assay demonstrates strong agreement with hemagglutination inhibition for the detection of canine parvovirus antibodies in sera of healthy, vaccinated blood-donor dogs.
articles.summary: To compare canine parvovirus (CPV) antibody titers in sera of community blood-donor dogs using the hemagglutination inhibition (HI) assays from 2 state veterinary diagnostic laboratories (VDLs) and a dot-blot ELISA assay to determine intermethod agreement. Stored sera (-80-°C freezer) from 100 healthy community-based blood-donor dogs were selected. Dogs represented various breeds and ages. Available vaccination history was retrospectively assessed. Sera were thawed and delivered to the VDLs, with HI and the dot-blot ELISA assay performed the following day. Of 100 samples, 96 dot-blot ELISA results were within a 2-fold dilution of the corresponding HI titer from the Colorado State University VDL, and 92 were within a 2-fold dilution of the HI titer from the New York State VDL. The dot-
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究比较两种检测犬细小病毒抗体方法（血凝抑制试验与斑点印迹ELISA）在健康献血犬中的一致性。结果显示新型斑点ELISA与传统方法高度吻合，主要涉及疫苗免疫效果评估和诊断检测技术优化，属于兽医诊断方法学改进研究。
articles.journal: Journal of the American Veterinary Medical Association

articles.title: Genomic and biological characterization of lytic phages infecting Pseudomonas syringae associated with almond bacterial blast.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究报道了感染与杏仁细菌性疫病相关的Pseudomonas syringae的裂解噬菌体的基因组和生物学特性。该研究聚焦植物病原体控制，虽涉及微生物治疗，但与人类创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联有限，主要属于农业生物技术基础研究范畴。

articles.title: Phage Cocktail Designed for Wastewater Bioremediation Has Limited Effect on Crustacean Filtrator Microbiome Diversity and Health.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估噬菌体鸡尾酒在废水生物修复中对甲壳类滤食动物微生物组及健康的影响。结果显示其对微生物多样性影响有限，主要涉及环境微生物生态，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域关联较弱。

articles.title: Influence of Operative Techniques on Clinical and Laboratory Outcomes in Class II Resin-Based Composite Restorations: A Systematic Review.
articles.summary: BACKGROUND Operative technique is a major determinant of the long-term success of Class II resin-based composite restorations. Variations in adhesive strategy, layering approach, matrix system, and curing protocol influence marginal integrity, polymerization stress, postoperative sensitivity, and secondary caries. Because resin-based composite placement is technique-sensitive, synthesizing evidence on how specific operative steps affect outcomes is essential. This systematic review evaluated the influence of operative techniques on the clinical and laboratory performance of Class II resin-based composite restorations. MATERIAL AND METHODS A comprehensive search of PubMed, Cochrane Library, and Embase identified 57 records. After duplicate removal and screening, 21 studies were included (11
articles.chinese_summary: 本文系统评价了II类树脂基复合修复体中粘接策略、分层技术、成型系统和固化方案等操作技术对临床及实验室结果的影响。虽然涉及材料科学和临床实践，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域相关性较低，主要属于牙科材料学的专业研究范畴。
articles.journal: Medical science monitor : international medical journal of experimental and clinical research

articles.title: Sustainable treatment of bio-treated municipal solid waste leachate by catalytic ozonation-MBR using a catalyst derived from Fenton iron sludge.
articles.summary: For bio-treated leachate treatment, conventional nanofiltration-reverse osmosis (NF-RO) systems are plagued by high costs, membrane fouling, and the generation of large volumes of hazardous concentrate, which poses a severe secondary pollution risk. Meanwhile, the disposal of Fenton iron sludge (FIS), a toxic byproduct of advanced oxidation, presents a critical environmental liability. To mitigate these issues, we valorized FIS into a high-performance FIS/γ-Al2O3 catalyst and integrated it with catalytic ozonation and membrane bioreactor (MBR) for bio-treated leachate treatment. The FIS/γ-Al2O3 catalyst enhanced ozone decomposition kinetics by 7.8-fold (0.264 vs. 0.034 min-1) compared to non-catalytic ozonation, significantly improving UV254 (39.4%), TOC (42.1%), and COD
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究利用芬顿铁泥制备催化剂，结合催化臭氧化与膜生物反应器处理垃圾渗滤液。该方法解决了传统膜处理成本高、污染重的问题，同时实现了危险废物的资源化利用，属于环境工程领域的废水处理技术。

articles.title: Computationally predicted persistence of micro- and nanoplastics: Decay of polyethylene terephthalate in neutral, acidic and alkaline media.
articles.summary: Polyethylene terephthalate micro- and nanoplastics (PET-NPs) constitute a prevalent and enduring environmental risk, yet detailed mechanistic kinetics of their breakdown in environment remain poorly studied. This work presents robust multi-scale computational methodology which extends a semi-empirical computational procedure for predicting multistep chemical reaction kinetics for polymers, specifically focusing on PET nanoparticles degradation under neutral, acidic, and alkaline conditions. Our approach combines Density Functional Theory calculations with an adapted Shrinking Core Model to predict degradation rates, eliminating the reliance on empirically adjusted rate constants. Model accuracy was confirmed by strong agreement with experimental PET degradation data. Our findings reveal a
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发多尺度计算方法预测聚酯微纳塑料在酸碱环境中的降解动力学，通过密度泛函理论与收缩核模型揭示其环境持久性机制。工作聚焦环境风险评估，与医药健康领域直接关联度较低。

articles.title: Impact of micropollutants and the process configuration on the performance of moving bed membrane biofilm reactor (MBMBR).
articles.summary: This study investigates the removal performance of selected micropollutants (ibuprofen, diclofenac, naproxen, carbamazepine, and triclosan) from domestic wastewater using a moving bed membrane biofilm reactor (MBMBR) process, consisting of two moving bed biofilm reactors (MBBRs) in series followed by a membrane bioreactor (MBR). While the integration of MBBR and MBR processes leverages the advantages of both technologies, systematic studies on determining the optimal configuration, particularly in the presence of micropollutants, remain quite limited in the literature. Within the scope of the research, the effects of sludge recirculation (hybrid growth) from the MBR to different MBBR units on treatment performance were evaluated over 140 days with three different periods. The results showe
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估移动床膜生物膜反应器对废水中微量污染物（布洛芬、双氯芬酸等）的去除性能，探讨污泥回流配置对处理效果的影响。属于环境工程领域，与生物医药核心主题关联度较低，主要涉及水处理技术优化。

articles.title: Characterization of the Complete Genome of Arthrobacter globiformis Cluster FF Bacteriophage QuinnAvery.
articles.summary: Phage QuinnAvery produces turbid plaques in Arthrobacter globiformis B-2979 lawns, displays a siphovirus morphology, and is clustered with FF actinobacteriophages. The 43,177 bp genome of QuinnAvery is predicted to contain a tRNA-Arg(TCT) gene and 69 protein-coding genes. Homologs of a subset of QuinnAvery's predicted genes have putative roles in viral structure, particle assembly, host cell lysis, and lysogeny. QuinnAvery's genome is predicted to contain two tyrosine integrases, similar to many other cluster FF phages. However, the area immediately surrounding the integration cassette in QuinnAvery is distinct from all other annotated members of cluster FF.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究报道了噬菌体QuinnAvery的完整基因组特征，该噬菌体感染球形节杆菌，属于FF簇。基因组分析揭示了其溶原性潜力和独特整合区域，为基础微生物学研究提供数据，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联有限。

articles.title: Robust ammonia oxidation by "Candidatus Nitrosacidococcus tergens" across a broad pH range.
articles.summary: Acidophilic ammonia-oxidizing bacteria (AOB) have only recently been discovered. These organisms hold great promise for acidic wastewater treatment; however, their physiology remains poorly understood compared to that of neutrophilic AOB. Here, we investigated the physiology of the acidophilic AOB "Candidatus Nitrosacidococcus tergens" sp. RJ19 across a broad pH range (2.5-7.0) using a specialized bioreactor system. We monitored nitrogen (N) transformations combined with microbial community composition and transcriptomic profiles, focusing on nitrogen metabolism and proton stress responses. Our results show that above pH 6.0, "Ca. Na. tergens" performs complete and stoichiometric conversion of ammonium to nitrite, coinciding with isotopic fractionation effects specific for ammonia oxidatio
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究报道了嗜酸性氨氧化细菌'Candidatus Nitrosacidococcus tergens'在宽pH范围内的生理特性，重点关注其氮代谢和质子应激反应。该菌在pH>6.0时能将铵完全转化为亚硝酸盐，在酸性废水处理领域具有应用潜力，但属于基础微生物学研究范畴。

articles.title: Free Energy and Flexibility Analysis of Autoinhibited Human BRAF.
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究通过自由能和灵活性分析探讨人源BRAF蛋白的自抑制机制，属于基础生物物理研究。虽涉及癌症相关靶点，但未直接涉及创新药开发、生物制造或大健康应用，主要为分子机制的理论研究。
articles.journal: Journal of chemical information and modeling

articles.title: Sperm performance of coastal northern pike (Esox lucius L.) from the Baltic Sea shows no impairment between freshwater and brackish conditions.
articles.summary: Declining coastal populations of northern pike (Esox lucius) in the Baltic Sea have raised concerns about potential reproductive constraints, including reduced sperm quality linked to changing salinity regimes. This study tested whether sperm performance in coastally collected pike is impaired by activation in freshwater versus brackish water. Sperm velocity and motility were measured from adult males collected at two Baltic Sea locations (Sankt Anna, 2024; Hanöbukten, 2025) and activated in either deionized (0 ppt) or local brackish water (6-7 ppt). We found that sperm velocity and motility declined rapidly over time post-activation, but did not differ significantly between salinity treatments during the critical fertilization window ( ≤ 20 s). At later time poi
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估了波罗的海沿岸白斑狗鱼在淡水和微咸水环境中的精子性能。结果显示在受精关键窗口期（≤20秒）精子活力和速度不受盐度处理影响，但随时间迅速下降。该研究聚焦鱼类生殖生态学，与生物医药领域的创新药、生物制造及大健康直接关联性较低。

articles.title: Clear cell renal cell carcinoma metastatic to the pancreas and gastrointestinal tract: a clinicopathologic study of 32 cases.
articles.summary: Metastatic clear cell renal cell carcinoma (CCRCC) involving the pancreas or gastrointestinal (GI) tract is rare and diagnostically challenging. This study characterizes clinicopathologic features, latency, and outcomes in a large institutional cohort. Thirty-two cases of CCRCC metastatic to pancreas or GI tract (stomach, duodenum, ampulla, jejunum, colon) were identified between 2015 and 2025. Clinical data, treatment history, outcomes, and pathologic features including tumor grade and immunohistochemistry were reviewed. The cohort included 19 males and 13 females (median age at diagnosis, 59 years). Metastatic tumor size ranged from 2.0 to 16.9 cm (mean, 8.7 cm). Fourteen patients (44%) had oligometastatic disease, most commonly to the pancreas (86%). Eighteen patients (56
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究回顾性分析32例胰腺及胃肠道转移性透明细胞肾细胞癌的临床病理特征。结果显示转移灶体积较大（平均8.7cm），44%为寡转移，胰腺是最常见转移部位。该研究聚焦于转移性肿瘤的病理诊断与临床管理，与创新药研发、生物制造及大健康产业直接关联度较低，主要贡献于肿瘤学临床诊断领域。

articles.title: Genome Sequence of Arthrobacter Phage StuartMinion.
articles.summary: Bacteriophage StuartMinion, isolated from an environmental sample collected in Kunia, Hawai'i, has a siphovirus morphology and is capable of infecting Arthrobacter globiformis B-2979. The genome is 35,207 bps, with 61 predicted genes and a GC content of 66.40%. Assigned to the AS3 subcluster of actinobacteriophages based on gene content, its genome is notably shorter than the average genome (38,373 bps) of other AS3 bacteriophages.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究报道了从夏威夷环境样本中分离的噬菌体StuartMinion的基因组序列。该噬菌体具有siphovirus形态，可感染球形节杆菌，基因组长度为35,207 bp，包含61个预测基因，GC含量为66.40%。基于基因内容被归类为放线菌噬菌体AS3亚群，其基因组显著短于该亚群的平均长度。

articles.title: Genome Analysis of Microbacterium foliorum Bacteriophage Annapurna.
articles.summary: Bacteriophage Annapurna is a siphovirus discovered within a soil sample collected in North Georgia. Annapurna was isolated and amplified using the host Microbacterium foliorum prior to genome sequencing. Annapurna contains 84 predicted protein-coding genes encoded across a genome 56,247 base pairs in length. Based on gene content, Annapurna is assigned to actinobacteriophage cluster EF. Like other phages in the EF cluster, Annapurna appears to lack both integrase and repressor genes and is therefore predicted to be a virulent phage.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究从土壤样本中分离出噬菌体Annapurna，通过基因组测序分析其56,247bp基因组包含84个预测蛋白编码基因，属于EF簇放线菌噬菌体。研究确认其为烈性噬菌体，主要贡献于基础微生物学研究领域。

articles.title: Wear resistance of composite repairs: Direct vs. semi-direct techniques in simulated oral aging.
articles.summary: Wear resistance of composite repairs, especially under severe chemical-mechanical challenge, has not been investigated. This in vitro study evaluated the wear resistance of composite restorations repaired using different techniques in simulated oral aging. Sixty human molars with direct Mesio-occluso-distal composite restorations were aged in the "Rub&Roll" device simulating two years of clinical service. The restorations were repaired using direct (n = 29) or semi-direct (n = 29) techniques. Specimens were randomly divided into three aging media for an additional two-year simulation: deionized water (control), 1% citric acid solution (chemical-mechanical challenge), and yellow millet seed solution (mechanical challenge). Wear was assessed using profilometry
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估了直接与半直接技术在模拟口腔老化环境下修复复合树脂的耐磨性。通过体外实验模拟两年临床使用，比较不同修复技术在化学-机械挑战下的性能表现。该研究主要关注牙科材料性能，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域相关性有限。
articles.journal: Dental materials : official publication of the Academy of Dental Materials

articles.title: Where veterinarians spend their professional formative years may exert less influence on workplace location in recent veterinary cohorts than in earlier cohorts.
articles.summary: To determine in-state retention of Indiana-based Purdue University veterinary graduates and contextualize their out-migration within population-based movements of Indiana veterinarians. Indiana veterinary license (IVL) information was accessed from April 18 to July 7, 2025, to determine the number of recent graduates with an IVL, map the location of all veterinarians with an IVL, and compare the longevity of IVLs with in-state and out-of-state addresses. Among 483 graduates from DVM classes of 2019 to 2024, 191 (39.5%) registered for an IVL; 173 (35.8%) had an Indiana address, while 48.7% of students admitted to the DVM program 4 years earlier represented Indiana residents. In 2025, 177 of 483 graduates (36.7%) had an active IVL; 161 (33.3%) were active and had an Indiana address. Of 6,825
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过分析印第安纳州兽医执照数据，追踪普渡大学兽医毕业生在州内的执业留存情况。结果显示近年毕业生在印第安纳州的执业比例有所下降，探讨了兽医教育背景对工作地点选择的影响变化。
articles.journal: Journal of the American Veterinary Medical Association

articles.title: Evaluation and Short-Term Conservation of Thrinax radiata (Arecaceae) seeds.
articles.summary: Physiological characterization and quality evaluation of seeds stored in germplasm banks is a challenge in seeds that present complex mechanisms of seed dormancy, underdeveloped embryos and/or abundant endosperm. Neutral red staining is proposed as a complementary method to standard viability and germination tests for cellular viability evaluation of Thrinax radiata (Arecaceae) seeds.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究评估了Thrinax radiata棕榈种子的短期保存方法，提出中性红染色可作为标准发芽测试的补充手段，用于检测种子细胞活性。主要涉及植物种质资源保存技术，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联性较弱。

articles.title: Multiple adsorptions Shape Collective T-Even Phage Lysis Dynamics: Insights From an Individual-Based Model.
articles.summary: Bacteria infected by T-even bacteriophages exhibit a variety of multiplicity of infection (MOI) dependent behaviours, including lysis from without (LO), cell lysis induced by an exceptionally high number of secondary adsorptions, and lysis inhibition (LIN), a phenomenon in which host cell lysis is delayed as the same bacterium adsorbs multiple phages. We propose an individual-based model that captures these MOI-dependent dynamics phenomenologically. The model takes into account the development of LO resistance (LOR) after the primary infection, and LIN is modelled by a fixed average delay in latent period per secondary adsorption with stochastic variability. The model successfully reproduces the experimentally observed multiple peaks in phage production following controlled phage addition.
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过个体模型探讨T偶数噬菌体多重吸附对细菌裂解动态的影响，包括高感染复数下的外部裂解和裂解抑制现象。该基础研究主要揭示噬菌体-细菌相互作用机制，与生物医药应用领域直接关联性较低，但对理解微生物系统具有理论价值。

articles.title: Electrochemical Corrosion and Safety Hazards in Sustainable Batteries: Corrosion Mechanisms, Safety Challenges, and Protection.
articles.summary: The swift transition to sustainable energy has heightened demand for high-performance, safe, and environmentally responsible battery technologies. Zn₋, Mg₋, Na₋, Al₋, Fe₋, organic, and bio-based systems offer several advantages over traditional resource-intensive and toxic alternatives. However, their practical implications are significantly challenged by their susceptibility to electrochemical corrosion, which adversely affects their efficiency, longevity, safety, recyclability, and reversibility. Corrosion is one of the most significant and persistent barriers to the development of next-generation energy storage systems. This review comprehensively presents unified mechanisms of corrosion across diverse sustainable battery systems, with a detailed accou
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述可持续电池中的电化学腐蚀问题，分析锌、镁、钠等电池体系的腐蚀机制及安全挑战。虽涉及材料毒性与环保议题，但主要聚焦能源存储领域，与生物医药核心方向关联度较低。

articles.title: Prevalence and causes of indirect veneer failure: a retrospective analysis from a university dental hospital.
articles.summary: Indirect veneers are widely used as an esthetic restorative option in dentistry however, complications may occur leading to failure and the need for replacement. Understanding the prevalence and contributing factors to veneer failure is essential for proper diagnosis and for improving clinical outcomes. This study aimed to assess the prevalence, patterns, and causes of indirect veneer failures among patients receiving replacement restorations at the Dental University Hospital, King Saud University, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. A retrospective analysis was conducted on 194 replaced veneer restorations. Data extracted from patient records included patient demographics, tooth location, type of failure, survival duration, veneer material, cement type, and preparation design. Descriptive statistics an
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究回顾性分析了沙特大学牙科医院194例更换的间接贴面修复体，探讨了贴面失败的患病率、模式和原因。研究发现贴面失败主要与美观修复并发症相关，对改善牙科临床诊疗具有指导意义，但与创新药、生物制造等领域关联度较低。

articles.title: Stomata as a Defence Nexus: Integrating Drought and Pathogen Stress Signalling.
articles.summary: Plant stomata are microscopic leaf pores that regulate gas exchange but also serve as pathogen entry points and frontline sensors for stresses like drought. This review synthesises current understanding of stomata's dual defensive roles in coordinating responses to pathogen invasion and drought stress, highlighting sophisticated synergistic and antagonistic mechanisms governing stomatal dynamics under combined pressures. Guard cells integrate diverse stress signals through complex, overlapping signalling networks involving mitogen-activated protein kinase cascades, reactive oxygen species bursts, Ca2+ oscillations, and small signalling peptides. Functioning as pivotal nodes in the evolutionary 'arms race' between plants and pathogens, stomata exhibit significant crosstalk between abscisic
articles.chinese_summary: 本文综述植物气孔在协调干旱与病原体胁迫防御中的双重作用，重点阐述保卫细胞通过MAPK级联、活性氧爆发等信号网络整合胁迫信号的分子机制。该研究属于基础植物生物学范畴，与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联性较低，主要提供植物应激反应的学术参考。

articles.title: TE-pass polarizer with high polarization extinction ratio based on thin-film lithium niobate.
articles.summary: A compact on-chip polarizer with a high polarization extinction ratio is proposed and experimentally demonstrated on thin-film lithium niobate (TFLN). The device consists of a dual-taper structure and a dual-side asymmetric directional coupler (ADC) to enable efficient polarization separation. Experimental results show an average insertion loss below 0.5 dB over the wavelength range from 1500 to 1600 nm, while a polarization extinction ratio (PER) exceeding 20 dB is maintained across 1505-1575 nm, reaching a maximum of 43 dB at 1550 nm. With a compact footprint of only 193 µm and full compatibility with standard TFLN fabrication processes, the proposed polarizer provides an effective approach for polarization management in integrated ph
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究基于薄膜铌酸锂平台，提出并实验验证了一种具有高偏振消光比的紧凑型片上偏振器。该器件采用双锥形结构和双非对称定向耦合器实现高效偏振分离，在1500-1600nm波长范围内插入损耗低于0.5dB，在1505-1575nm范围内偏振消光比超过20dB，最高达43dB。该器件与标准薄膜铌酸锂制造工艺完全兼容，为集成光子学中的偏振管理提供了有效解决方案。

articles.title: Operando Depth-Resolved Measurement of Solvation Entropy, Interfacial Transport, and Charge-Transfer Kinetics in Lithium-Ion Batteries.
articles.summary: Understanding and improving the performance and longevity of lithium-ion batteries critically depends on insight into the dynamic processes occurring at buried electrode-electrolyte interfaces. However, direct, depth-resolved, and operando diagnosis of these interfaces remains a longstanding challenge due to their inaccessibility beneath bulk materials, the limitations of conventional surface- and bulk-sensitive characterization tools, and the difficulty of maintaining realistic cell environments during measurement. These challenges have made it nearly impossible to uniquely resolve important interfacial properties such as charge transfer resistance, SEI (solid electrolyte interphase) resistance, and solvation entropy at the individual electrode interfaces within a working cell, informatio
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究开发了operando深度解析技术，用于测量锂离子电池中电极-电解质界面的溶剂化熵、界面传输和电荷转移动力学。虽然对电池性能优化有重要意义，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域直接关联度较低，主要属于电化学与能源存储领域的基础研究。

articles.title: Effects of storage condition and duration on viability and starch metabolism in biochar-coated rice seeds.
articles.summary: Seed storage conditions are critical determinants of rice seed viability and subsequent germination performance; however, the extent to which biochar-based seed coatings enhance storage tolerance and the underlying physiological mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this study, biochar-coated and uncoated rice seeds were stored for 0-8 months under three contrasting conditions: low temperature, room temperature with low humidity, and room temperature with high humidity. Seed germination characteristics, seedling establishment, respiratory metabolism, carbohydrate contents, activities of key starch-metabolizing enzymes, and changes in endosperm ultrastructure were systematically assessed. Low-temperature and room-temperature/low-humidity storage effectively maintained seed germination and
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨生物炭包衣对水稻种子在不同储存条件下（低温、室温低湿、室温高湿）0-8个月内活力及淀粉代谢的影响。通过分析发芽特性、呼吸代谢、碳水化合物含量及淀粉代谢酶活性，发现低温和室温低湿储存能有效维持种子发芽性能，揭示生物炭包衣通过调节淀粉代谢增强种子储存耐受性的生理机制。

articles.title: Suspected Hypersensitivity Reaction to Titanium Screws Following Kalish Osteotomy for Hallux Valgus.
articles.chinese_summary: 本文报道一例接受Kalish截骨术治疗拇外翻后疑似对钛螺钉产生过敏反应的病例。该研究聚焦于骨科植入物的生物相容性问题，属于医疗器械安全范畴，与创新药、生物制造领域直接关联性较低，主要涉及临床医疗实践中的不良反应监测。

articles.title: Life history and ecology shape global patterns in avian hatching failure rates.
articles.chinese_summary: 该研究探讨鸟类生活史特征与生态环境如何影响全球范围内孵化失败率的模式。作为基础生态学研究，其发现可能间接为生物多样性保护提供参考，但与创新药、生物制造及大健康领域的直接关联性较弱。

articles.title: Densely packed needles along the shoots of evergreen conifers exhibit shade-acclimated photosynthetic characteristics even under full sunlight.
articles.summary: Evergreen conifer shoots that develop under full sunlight eventually move to the shade within the canopy as the tree grows. We hypothesized that densely packed needles develop shade characteristics even under full sunlight due to mutual shading, allowing them to survive longer in the canopy shade. To test this hypothesis, we measured photosynthetic light responses at the shoot and needle levels in four species: Picea glehnii (shade-intolerant), P. jezoensis (intermediate shade-tolerant), Abies sachalinensis (shade-tolerant) and Taxus cuspidata (highly shade-tolerant), grown under open (100 % sunlight) and shade (10 % sunlight) conditions. In P. glehnii, P. jezoensis and A. sachalinensis, needle-level photosynthetic and morphological traits showed minimal differences between l
articles.chinese_summary: 研究四种常绿针叶树发现，即使在全光照条件下，枝条上密集排列的针叶仍表现出适应遮荫的光合特性。这有助于它们在树冠遮荫环境中长期存活，揭示了植物结构对光合特性的调控机制。

articles.title: Pregnancy outcomes after TAI with cooled versus frozen bovine semen: A meta-analysis.
articles.summary: Bovine cooled semen (CS) has been selectively re-incorporated as a mitigating strategy to frozen semen (FS) in timed artificial insemination (TAI) programs, raising questions about the biological limits of cryopreserved sperm cells in synchronization protocols. This meta-analysis evaluated the impact of semen type and selected management-related factors on P/AI in bovine TAI. Fourteen studies encompassing 8785 inseminations and 3816 pregnancies were analyzed following PRISMA guidelines. Risk difference (RD) was used to compare P/AI between CS and FS. Overall, CS showed a tendency toward greater P/AI (RD = 2.95%; 95% confidence interval [CI]: -2.75-8.64; P = 0.075), with substantial heterogeneity (I² = 81.8%). The most pronounced differences favoring CS were observed in c
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究通过荟萃分析比较牛人工授精中使用冷却精液与冷冻精液对妊娠率的影响。结果显示冷却精液有提高妊娠率的趋势，但差异不显著。该研究主要关注畜牧繁殖技术，与人类医药领域的创新药、生物制造及大健康相关性较弱。

articles.title: Unveiling in-pipe carbon-sulfur transformation and microbial function during urine transport for centralized management.
articles.summary: Source-separated urine collection and centralized nutrient recovery at city-scale hold great potential for advancing sustainable resource management. As the critical link between urine collection systems and nutrient recovery facilities, urine-transporting sewer systems have recently been incorporated into life cycle assessments (LCA), yet their potential for biochemical transformations has not been explored. Here, for the first time, we experimentally unveil key pollutant transformations and microbial functions in a urine-fed bioreactor (representing urine transport), with a sewage-fed bioreactor serving as a control. Major urine nutrients (N, P, and K) remained largely stable during transport, whereas organic carbon and sulfate decreased markedly. Methane production was negligible over 1
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究首次通过实验揭示了尿液输送过程中碳硫转化及微生物功能，发现主要营养元素保持稳定而有机碳和硫酸盐显著减少。该研究为城市规模尿液分离收集和营养回收提供了科学依据，主要聚焦于污水处理和资源可持续管理领域。

articles.title: Revelation of hydraulic retention time (HRT) on nitrogen and sulfur metabolism balance in pyrite-loaded biochar denitrogen system treating aquaculture wastewater.
articles.summary: Hydraulic retention time (HRT) is a critical operational parameter influencing bioreactor efficacy, yet its impact on a co-calcined pyrite-loaded biochar mixotrophic system remains underexplored. In this study, a novel co-calcined pyrite-biochar composite was used to construct bioreactors for treating catfish aquaculture wastewater at an HRT of 4.8, 6, 8, or 12 h. The aim was to elucidate how HRT affects nitrogen and phosphorus removal, microbial community succession, and functional gene dynamics, as well as the interactions among these factors. Accordingly, optimal performance was observed at an HRT of 8 h, when NH4+-N, NO3--N, total nitrogen, and PO43--P achieved percentage removal of 92.46 ± 2.40%, 90.16 ± 5.42%, 86.00 ± 4.31%, and 90.90 ± 1.75%, respectively. Meanwh
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究探讨了水力停留时间对黄铁矿-生物炭复合系统处理水产养殖废水性能的影响。研究发现HRT为8小时时氮磷去除率最佳（NH4+-N 92.46%，PO43--P 90.90%），通过分析微生物群落演替和功能基因动态，揭示了HRT调控氮硫代谢平衡的机制，属于环境工程与微生物生态交叉领域的基础研究。

articles.title: Prognostic value of quantitative multiparametric magnetic resonance imaging parameters and histopathologic features for disease-free survival in locally advanced non-mucinous rectal adenocarcinoma.
articles.summary: To develop a postoperative risk stratification model integrating baseline T2 mapping and histopathologic factors for predicting disease-free survival (DFS) in patients with locally advanced non-mucinous rectal adenocarcinoma after neoadjuvant chemoradiotherapy (NCRT) and surgery. This retrospective study included 116 patients with non-mucinous rectal adenocarcinoma who underwent NCRT followed by surgery. Baseline T2 values and apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC) values were measured. Prognostic factors for DFS were assessed using Cox proportional hazards regression. Given the limited number of DFS events, the multivariable model size was prespecified, with baseline pretreatment T2 forced into the model. To assess the incremental prognostic value of T2, a clinicopathologic model was compar
articles.chinese_summary: 本研究开发了一种术后风险分层模型，整合基线T2 mapping成像参数和组织病理学因素，用于预测局部晚期非粘液性直肠腺癌患者在新辅助放化疗及手术后的无病生存期。研究为回顾性分析，通过多参数MRI和病理特征评估预后，属于肿瘤精准医疗范畴。

articles.title: MHAFNet: multi-stage hybrid attention and adaptive feature fusion network for image restoration.
articles.summary: Image restoration is a vital research area in computer vision, focusing on reconstructing high-quality clear images from degraded observations. Common types of degradation include noise and blur, which may stem from imaging device limitations, environmental interference, and other factors. This paper centers on the design and optimization of multi-stage image restoration networks, conducting in-depth exploration of feature extraction, feature fusion, attention mechanisms, and their practical applications. A multi-stage hybrid attention mechanism-based image restoration network is proposed. Initially, each stage progressively extracts and restores image features. Then, an adaptive feature fusion block enables effective cross-stage information transfer. Finally, by calculating losses at each
articles.chinese_summary: 本文提出MHAFNet多阶段混合注意力网络用于图像恢复，通过渐进式特征提取和自适应特征融合技术处理噪声和模糊等图像退化问题。该研究属于计算机视觉领域，与生物医药无直接关联。
